name: Your America
subject: Bill O Reveals Biden Made Recession Could Devastate Retirement Funds
body:
We can't stop the recession from happening, but you can prepare for it. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7927%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=kmvNUaYfr4rGxwWvuQD21g&sysid=1)
**Hello Friends Bill O'Reilly Here,**

I remember how the **Great Recession of 2008 wiped out $2.4 trillion dollars from retirement funds.**

And now it looks like history is repeating itself.

**Experts forecast the coming recession will be even worse than the 2008 financial crisis, including:**

• More than 2 million lost jobs

• Stocks plummeting over 20%

• IRAs and 401(k)s to lock in losses of 25% and keep falling

**We can't stop the recession from happening,**but you can prepare for it.****

That's why I've put together **_[a concise guide to help you protect your finances](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c05817%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NbNLFgJhZ5zW1jMB2jgc3A&sysid=1)_** during this downturn.

**_[Request your free guide now to recession-proof your life](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c05818%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Fwmk5lrAZV5aWihbHt%2bV1Q&sysid=1)_** and protect your IRA, 401(k) and pension savings. But you can't use it if you don't know the details.

**Don't put your future in someone else's hands.** The time to prepare for an economic hurricane is before it hits. Seize the opportunity to protect your finances while you still can.

Contact the people I trust at American Hartford Gold and

**_[Request your free copy of my new guide now to protect yourself from a recession.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c05819%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HkJONV5w3kAjqTDnk6eGQg&sysid=1)_**

**_[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c05810%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WSoPPizTGuqg18CT%2fN8q%2fA&sysid=1)_**

[GET THE FREE GUIDE](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c05812%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7sBQL9Zz5zpPI2dPidr22Q&sysid=1)

Regards,

**Bill O'Reilly**

**P.S.** The 2008-2010 crisis wiped out almost 50% of the value of retirement funds. If you knew it was coming, wouldn't you do the one thing that could've protected your savings? **_[Request your free guide now and do the smart thing before it's too late.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c05813%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5dEdKK1KtXFFi7QNYL6%2bUQ&sysid=1)_**

name: Hillary Scholten
subject: fighting for our small businesses
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
It’s an honor to advocate for small businesses in West Michigan and across the country.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58420721/391019695/205369934?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230207-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGI2Y2FmMC00NGE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PEPocyGNXnEmcdF_hJ2maCssKGrahc6Nls9xHJqwPak=)
---
| Folks,

Last week, I received my official committee assignments here in Washington, and I’m excited to share that I’ve been seated on the House Committee on Small Business.

I’m particularly proud to be serving on this committee because West Michigan is home to so many fantastic small businesses. From coffee shops to restaurants to stores, small businesses make our district a great place to live.

Whenever I’m back in West Michigan, I love to visit local gems – and visiting our residents and small businesses reminds me of why I stepped up to serve my community. **Here’s where I’m asking for your input: do you have a favorite local business that I should visit in the Third Congressional District?[_If you do, I’d love to hear about it!_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58420722/391019696/-709567153?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGI2Y2FmMC00NGE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PEPocyGNXnEmcdF_hJ2maCssKGrahc6Nls9xHJqwPak=&emci=d2bba365-faa6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a4b6caf0-44a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=750857)**
---
| [SHARE NOW ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58420723/391019697/-709567153?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGI2Y2FmMC00NGE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PEPocyGNXnEmcdF_hJ2maCssKGrahc6Nls9xHJqwPak=&emci=d2bba365-faa6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a4b6caf0-44a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=750857)
---
Supporting our local economy helps to create a healthy and prosperous community for us all. It’s an honor to advocate for small businesses in West Michigan and across the country. I look forward to reading – and visiting – your suggestions!

Best,
Hillary

name: ShariceForCongress.com
subject: Give us your thoughts before the State of the Union
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Tonight, we will hear the State of the Union address. President Biden will discuss the major accomplishments — _many of them bipartisan_ — of the last Congress and will lay out his plans for 2023.

The president is going to be laying out his priorities, but Team Sharice wants to hear from you: **_[We’re looking for 1,000 of our supporters to take the 2023 State of the Union Survey before the speech commences tonight to tell us about the issues you want Sharice to work on. Answer here:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58420731/391020438/431889204?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230207_SV_1.1_0_3MO_website_NA_NA_SOTU&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWNkNTM0MC00NWE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d8V8NCDOWJ-lZSceFrFmUaHLJhMbb7Uff_j-ivmU7nE=&emci=af306139-45a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=fecd5340-45a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)_** | | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58420732/391020439/431889204?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230207_SV_1.1_0_3MO_website_NA_NA_SOTU&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWNkNTM0MC00NWE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d8V8NCDOWJ-lZSceFrFmUaHLJhMbb7Uff_j-ivmU7nE=&emci=af306139-45a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=fecd5340-45a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)
---
Sharice has invited Jessica Kidd, a recent graduate of the Johnson County Community College Commercial Driver’s License program, to attend the speech with her tonight. This invitation highlights the women who are making a career and supporting their families in trucking.

Sharice helped lead a series of bipartisan laws to improve infrastructure, supply chains, domestic manufacturing, and more across the finish line — and Kansans like Jessica will now benefit from the newly created jobs in these strengthened industries.

And she is proud to have introduced bipartisan legislation that supports women entering the trucking industry.

To ensure we’re always fighting for you, Team Sharice wants to hear about the issues you’re focused on. **_[Before tonight’s speech, please take our 2023 State of the Union Survey so we know your priorities:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58420733/391020440/431889204?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230207_SV_1.1_0_3MO_website_NA_NA_SOTU&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWNkNTM0MC00NWE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d8V8NCDOWJ-lZSceFrFmUaHLJhMbb7Uff_j-ivmU7nE=&emci=af306139-45a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=fecd5340-45a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)_**

| Peter,

Tonight, I will be attending President Biden’s State of the Union address. I expect the President will discuss the work Democrats have done to make life easier for American families – and how that progress is being attacked by Republicans in the House.

With Republicans planning to attack a woman’s right to choose, cut Social Security, raise health care prices, and more, there is a lot on the line.

That is why I want to hear from you. name: Ilhan Omar
subject: After 4 proud years of service, I was just removed from the House Foreign Affairs Committee.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Nobody — not Kevin McCarthy, not the Republican Party, not the billionaires who fund them — will ever stop me in my fight for a more equitable, just, and peaceful world.
#
Kevin McCarthy kept his word, Peter.
**After 4 proud years of service, I was just removed from the House Foreign Affairs Committee.**
I want to be perfectly clear: This political stunt is a personal one — the result of years of xenophobic, Islamophobic, and racist attacks that started the moment I was elected.
The far-right have spent millions of dollars in campaign ads against our movement stoking fear and division, and a constant stream of hateful and violent rhetoric has led to hundreds of death threats against me and my family.
Now, in their latest move, they've attempted to silence my voice and begin undoing the incredible progress our movement has helped make both at home and abroad.
I'm here to tell you that's not going to happen.
**My commitment to justice for all people across the globe — no matter their race, religion, nationality, or anything else — does not begin or end with a committee assignment.**
The simple truth is that McCarthy's actions to remove me from the Foreign Affairs Committee does absolutely nothing to address the issues our constituents deal with at home, or to promote the well-being of people around the world.
What it does is further enable his party's hatred and corruption, and promote fear and violence against Somali-Americans, Muslims, immigrants, and anyone else who shares my identity all across the country.
We already know that these attacks are just beginning, which is why it's so important that our progressive movement stays united, and is ready and able to fight back. So please:
[**Will you split a contribution — of $5 or any amount you can — between our campaign and Cori Bush so we have the resources required to stand up to Kevin McCarthy and his far-right Republican allies? I would not ask if your support were not so important to our success.**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230207.5R8-hP&amount=5&refcode=em20230207-2138&t=1&akid=2138%2E1082990%2Ea8uVQX)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230207.5R8-hP&amount=5&refcode=em20230207-2138&t=20&akid=2138%2E1082990%2Ea8uVQX)**
Nobody — not Kevin McCarthy, not the Republican Party, not the billionaires who fund them — will ever stop me in my fight for a more equitable, just, and peaceful world.
From tirelessly advocating for policies like a Green New Deal and Medicare for All at home, to standing up against violence and injustice worldwide, I promise that nothing will stand in the way of me doing what the people of Minnesota's 5th district elected me to do.
Thank you, as always, for being a part of our fight.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230207.5R8-hP&amount=5&refcode=em20230207-2138&t=21&akid=2138%2E1082990%2Ea8uVQX)**

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230207?refcode=em20230207-2138-footer&t=22&refcode2=2138_1082990_a8uVQX&akid=2138%2E1082990%2Ea8uVQX) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress

name: Rachel Petri
subject: Excited to work with you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
and to be back on Team Sherrod for 2024! |
---

| | | | Hi, I want to introduce myself -- I’m Rachel Petri, Sherrod’s new campaign manager. I’m thrilled to be back on Team Sherrod! (I worked on Sherrod’s communications team during his 2018 campaign.) Fun fact: My first job with Sherrod was as an intern in his D.C. office. This job is personal to me. I was raised in eastern Ohio -- St. Clairsville to be exact -- and graduated from Miami University. After working as Deputy Campaign Manager for Senator Raphael Warnock in 2022, I’m proud to be working with you to re-elect Sherrod so he can keep fighting for our state. He’s a champion for all Ohioans. And our job over the next two years is to do everything we can, every single day we can, to show them he’s on their side -- always. [_**As I drop into the campaign and we start ramping up, it’d mean a lot to have you on board. Will you start by making a contribution today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58420936/391029642/1543099888?refcode=sbe230207&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTVkZjA2Zi00OGE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=POTmJvSIhzOwkfbOj_Nndk7-1NIOgoaEOEiU-vq4JD0=)

Make no mistake: This is going to be a tough race -- our toughest yet. We already have one opponent and several more are likely to join the race. The GOP has already launched attack ads targeting Sherrod. And so far, all the top analysts consider this race a toss-up. It’s only going to get tougher from here, but I am confident that together, we can ensure that Sherrod wins in 2024. I know tough races. So does Sherrod. And since many of you have been on Team Sherrod for a long time now, I also know you’re up to the challenge in front of us. **I’ll be in touch with updates from the campaign trail and to ask for your help -- starting right now. It’d mean a lot to have your early support. name: Senator Katie Britt
subject: Don’t miss this!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:
Tonight, Sarah Huckabee Sanders will stick it to Joe Biden | | |
---
[](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=ad7390a763cf4f22bad90a7a6fee78ba&_e=D1QablTnY6PzqBEj1giVYiCyzs7puPZzngNkMPLNOzQJ7uCkVJpqJ-d_l-_EHojNwcmzNOIjiSju8aXqAhwYvCzsjXI5LfXXI39sagBI2lEOAXH6ME8P3XwYucQQZX8z3tQB3EpBKtr9oeDZPCgQpbrGHq3HGO_NZEnac66dYr_YgXS76ufOcNGsZa0fnpjqMVHXRsZKDNbfkQuLa4sndP-CDPzQC76jxsQXADQ0JLi9IsQi5pzHprLmLaaVzd3yxYc7isCFvxRLQBWScST1CO5eWWUt85OuDaTrGtWcHKUVZhMMwXXAc9IdW3PkHPCjuUP6tnaShTO9DaDoA-Vapq5onxSZn0LM-xtLtgV_YF4_k7tDFBoKJFnwuTAcVREIdddRYlKEqomZVmdGXr5FZw5jGlm5cTak7P3zDk0EYwY%3D)
---
Peter, Tonight, after Joe Biden’s State of the Union address, my friend and Arkansas Governor, Sarah Huckabee Sanders, will deliver the GOP’s Response to the American people. As a mother, I’ve seen how this administration is setting our kids up for failure. [**Whether it be the economy, parental rights, or our border’s security, our Nation is in dire straits with President Biden at the helm.**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=ad7390a763cf4f22bad90a7a6fee78ba&_e=D1QablTnY6PzqBEj1giVYiCyzs7puPZzngNkMPLNOzQJ7uCkVJpqJ-d_l-_EHojNwcmzNOIjiSju8aXqAhwYvCzsjXI5LfXXI39sagBI2lEOAXH6ME8P3XwYucQQZX8z3tQB3EpBKtr9oeDZPCgQpbrGHq3HGO_NZEnac66dYr_YgXS76ufOcNGsZa0fnpjqMVHXRsZKDNbfkQuLa4sndP-CDPzQC76jxsQXADQ0JLi9IsQi5pzHprLmLaaVzd3yxYc7isCFvxRLQBWScST1CKMAE4-2yatM_9rIiRRuqGpFcJgW60LYS__6sVz2pX4NbnBGDRxf6MMsQ2w7Pkbb_p5mSuLEvjQS0h54abMXDL_b0k3Z57v3khbAeoGCj0JZ38AxdnNoXofWtMAjaJHGSD176y9_HyCqFgAMhWEchns%3D) [**Moms like Sarah & I won’t stay silent as President Biden sells out our children’s future, and I know you won’t either.**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=ad7390a763cf4f22bad90a7a6fee78ba&_e=D1QablTnY6PzqBEj1giVYiCyzs7puPZzngNkMPLNOzQJ7uCkVJpqJ-d_l-_EHojNwcmzNOIjiSju8aXqAhwYvCzsjXI5LfXXI39sagBI2lEOAXH6ME8P3XwYucQQZX8z3tQB3EpBKtr9oeDZPCgQpbrGHq3HGO_NZEnac66dYr_YgXS76ufOcNGsZa0fnpjqMVHXRsZKDNbfkQuLa4sndP-CDPzQC76jxsQXADQ0JLi9IsQi5pzHprLmLaaVzd3yxYc7isCFvxRLQBWScST1CHgOlglfrMLNwd1zYKh1QUXEZGIR43Z8mwhR3Y34BIBiXgjmgxgVrLofLDFuKDxVzro5niUoVtchy1T8Z25591f29p3I5-XHgHF1q2oDUlf6H34iYLshB1e2GfB3DdnDFNm9TnsVKmFjwnVRCmQtcUA%3D) Before tonight, I have a favor to ask, Peter: can you step up & help support Republicans fighting for America’s next generation?
---
[**Take a Stand TODAY!**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=ad7390a763cf4f22bad90a7a6fee78ba&_e=D1QablTnY6PzqBEj1giVYiCyzs7puPZzngNkMPLNOzQJ7uCkVJpqJ-d_l-_EHojNwcmzNOIjiSju8aXqAhwYvCzsjXI5LfXXI39sagBI2lEOAXH6ME8P3XwYucQQZX8z3tQB3EpBKtr9oeDZPCgQpbrGHq3HGO_NZEnac66dYr_YgXS76ufOcNGsZa0fnpjqMVHXRsZKDNbfkQuLa4sndP-CDPzQC76jxsQXADQ0JLi9IsQi5pzHprLmLaaVzd3yxYc7isCFvxRLQBWScST1CALFjHIummEeqaP6HOHEdeZfiSYAQwmmAwjHy4RsCkpb7hC1hszKolxdBeT693kao8JIZVdccY53oT7ZBLpRb6cp1qXS_4JSrzKOCxPDAJdDIhOsaztajK-E12UWQKz6Xh0v2CKx4axOXaWjOoQp720%3D)

name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: Meet the new environmental champions in Congress.
body:
__These environmental advocates represent Americans, not corporations. |
---

| Dear Peter,
Last November, champions of democracy and our environment beat the political odds and are now taking office. This could not have been possible without our movement. When the pundits counted us out, _you showed up and made your voices heard._

****While we are disappointed that pro-polluter politicians like Kevin McCarthy and Steve Scalise now run the U.S. House, our pro-climate action candidates helped keep their majority razor thin. Advocates like you helped bring new leadership to elected offices across the country. We couldn 't be more excited to work with them to achieve a more sustainable, healthy, and just future.

LCV's [_New Member Guide_](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/~NwYfDqK-yMG/NWdMSU92K0VNd3l6Z0ErZ3BwRkNUNUdiQi90cndWL1JOdlp0bXVJcGd5MnlTZUZ6WVBpNlc0eWxIdURyUTRiYzk4MDlYWjF2RElOVjV1ZDVHVTN6cmZjeGdiZDdDSDdtL3BLcXBaTHdtbHc9S0/OWU1eDVad21vSEUyanQrdmpKU1hteHdOcXJib2FRRlR6QzlJYmtqMzBDa3pVS29weVZJRjRZYXQrZDl3YUZFTkEzQnpHZmwrSnpSdEVPcXBPUUtvVVQ5MWZnMFk5MHNISFhkUlVZUFRJajg9S0) showcases the backgrounds and positions of dozens of newly elected federal candidates supported by our movement. Here are just a few environmental champions we think you should know about:
| | [Rep. Maxwell Frost](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/G8bxcgAY-0TV/NWdMSU92K0VNd3l6Z0ErZ3BwRkNUNUdiQi90cndWL1JOdlp0bXVJcGd5MnlTZUZ6WVBpNlc0eWxIdURyUTRiYzk4MDlYWjF2RElOVjV1ZDVHVTN6cmZjeGdiZDdDSDdtL3BLcXBaTHdtbHc9S0/OWU1eDVad21vSEUyanQrdmpKU1hteHdOcXJib2FRRlR6QzlJYmtqMzBDa3pVS29weVZJRjRZYXQrZDl3YUZFTkEzQnpHZmwrSnpSdEVPcXBPUUtvVVQ5MWZnMFk5MHNISFhkUlVZUFRJajg9S0) (D-FL) is the first Afro-Cuban member of Congress and the first federally-elected official from Generation Z. He is a former organizer with extensive experience with engaging youth. He has promised to enact bold policies that combat the climate crisis, prioritize working class families, and center environmental justice so that all communities have access to clean water, air, and healthy food.

---|---
| [Rep. Becca Balint](https://links.messages.lcv.) (D-VT) is the first woman and first openly LGBTQ+ person to represent Vermont in Congress. She previously served as president pro tempore of the Vermont Senate. During her tenure, she has received perfect scores on the Vermont Conservation Voters' Legislative Scorecard for her work helping to shepherd landmark climate and environmental justice legislation.

| [Rep. Robert Garcia](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/RZbkcvb_ZGsK/NWdMSU92K0VNd3l6Z0ErZ3BwRkNUNUdiQi90cndWL1JOdlp0bXVJcGd5MnlTZUZ6WVBpNlc0eWxIdURyUTRiYzk4MDlYWjF2RElOVjV1ZDVHVTN6cmZjeGdiZDdDSDdtL3BLcXBaTHdtbHc9S0/OWU1eDVad21vSEUyanQrdmpKU1hteHdOcXJib2FRRlR6QzlJYmtqMzBDa3pVS29weVZJRjRZYXQrZDl3YUZFTkEzQnpHZmwrSnpSdEVPcXBPUUtvVVQ5MWZnMFk5MHNISFhkUlVZUFRJajg9S0) (D-CA) is the former mayor of Long Beach, California and has a history of championing environmental causes. Rep. Garcia has promised to fight for reduced pollution and to equitably address the impacts of pollution and climate change on the health and well-being of communities. He is the first openly LGBTQ+ immigrant elected to Congress and will serve as the president of the freshman class of House Democrats.

| [Rep. Summer Lee](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/gryxfj-q~psW/NWdMSU92K0VNd3l6Z0ErZ3BwRkNUNUdiQi90cndWL1JOdlp0bXVJcGd5MnlTZUZ6WVBpNlc0eWxIdURyUTRiYzk4MDlYWjF2RElOVjV1ZDVHVTN6cmZjeGdiZDdDSDdtL3BLcXBaTHdtbHc9S0/OWU1eDVad21vSEUyanQrdmpKU1hteHdOcXJib2FRRlR6QzlJYmtqMzBDa3pVS29weVZJRjRZYXQrZDl3YUZFTkEzQnpHZmwrSnpSdEVPcXBPUUtvVVQ5MWZnMFk5MHNISFhkUlVZUFRJajg9S0) (D-PA) is an outspoken advocate for climate and environmental justice. As a member of Pennsylvania's legislature, she fought fracking and cosponsored efforts to achieve 100% clean energy by 2050, implement energy efficiency tax credits, protect clean air and water, address PFAS pollution, and support community solar. She is the first Black woman to represent Pennsylvania in Congress.

| [Rep. Delia Ramirez](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/YYbZByej-LTY/NWdMSU92K0VNd3l6Z0ErZ3BwRkNUNUdiQi90cndWL1JOdlp0bXVJcGd5MnlTZUZ6WVBpNlc0eWxIdURyUTRiYzk4MDlYWjF2RElOVjV1ZDVHVTN6cmZjeGdiZDdDSDdtL3BLcXBaTHdtbHc9S0/OWU1eDVad21vSEUyanQrdmpKU1hteHdOcXJib2FRRlR6QzlJYmtqMzBDa3pVS29weVZJRjRZYXQrZDl3YUZFTkEzQnpHZmwrSnpSdEVPcXBPUUtvVVQ5MWZnMFk5MHNISFhkUlVZUFRJajg9S0) (D-IL) was elected to the Illinois state Legislature in 2018, earning a 100% every year on the Illinois Environmental Council's scorecard. She has refused to take campaign contributions from the fossil fuel industry and was an early cosponsor of the landmark Clean Energy Jobs Act, which will transition Illinois to 100% clean energy by 2045. She is the first Latina to represent a midwestern state in Congress.

**It gets better, Peter -- our [_New Member Guide_](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/~NwYfDqK-yMG/NWdMSU92K0VNd3l6Z0ErZ3BwRkNUNUdiQi90cndWL1JOdlp0bXVJcGd5MnlTZUZ6WVBpNlc0eWxIdURyUTRiYzk4MDlYWjF2RElOVjV1ZDVHVTN6cmZjeGdiZDdDSDdtL3BLcXBaTHdtbHc9S0/OWU1eDVad21vSEUyanQrdmpKU1hteHdOcXJib2FRRlR6QzlJYmtqMzBDa3pVS29weVZJRjRZYXQrZDl3YUZFTkEzQnpHZmwrSnpSdEVPcXBPUUtvVVQ5MWZnMFk5MHNISFhkUlVZUFRJajg9S0) features 3 members of the U.S. Senate and 34 members of the U.S. House.** LCV is committed to continue working with both new and returning members of Congress to protect our environment, public health, and democracy.

You can view or download the full New Member Guide in [English (pdf)](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/z9e0fb~NLwcY/NWdMSU92K0VNd3l6Z0ErZ3BwRkNUNUdiQi90cndWL1JOdlp0bXVJcGd5MnlTZUZ6WVBpNlc0eWxIdURyUTRiYzk4MDlYWjF2RElOVjV1ZDVHVTN6cmZjeGdiZDdDSDdtL3BLcXBaTHdtbHc9S0/OWU1eDVad21vSEUyanQrdmpKU1hteHdOcXJib2FRRlR6QzlJYmtqMzBDa3pVS29weVZJRjRZYXQrZDl3YUZFTkEzQnpHZmwrSnpSdEVPcXBPUUtvVVQ5MWZnMFk5MHNISFhkUlVZUFRJajg9S0) and [Spanish (pdf)](https://links.messages.lcv.).

Thank you for standing with our movement. We're so excited to see what these new members can achieve with us in their corner.

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters

---

If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9170858&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY4MDE4NTEzNAS2&spReportId=MTY4MDE4NTEzNAS2). name: =?utf-8?Q?Michael=20Maher?=
subject: Republican Michael Maher's statement in advance of tonight's State of the Union Address
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/maherforcongress/merry-christmas-11835884?e=1722d05e10)
---
| |
---
| | February 7, 2023

Dear Friend,

As people in the Central Valley struggle with inflation, a border crisis that worsens by the day, record crime rates, and a school system failing our children, President Biden will offer nothing but empty rhetoric, weak leadership, and broken promises in his State of the Union address. After two years under Biden’s leadership, China and Russia have been emboldened and continue to challenge our National Security. Here at home, people are significantly worse off, and Congressman Jim Costa has done nothing to help fix that. In fact, both Biden and Costa are part of the same leadership problem.

Inflation has been surging [above 5% for 21 months](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=70e66686eb&e=1722d05e10), and Americans have [lost over $9,300](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=16d1948f94&e=1722d05e10) on average paying for the increased cost of living since Biden took office. Since 2021, [real wages](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=052ba4ef1b&e=1722d05e10) are down, [incomes](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=e51e9025ac&e=1722d05e10) are down, and [savings](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=5274c55ab8&e=1722d05e10) are down.

Because of Biden’s open border policies, the border crisis has [spiraled out of control](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=11f05eba73&e=1722d05e10), enriching criminal cartels, drug and human traffickers, and local gangs. Fentanyl continues to pour into our Central Valley, killing our youth and exploding gang violence. Last week's execution of our local Selma Police officer by a Fresno gang member and convicted felon who used a ghost gun in the murder, or last month's massacre of six people including a teen mother and her baby by gang members, who later engaged in a gun battle with federal agents, must not be allowed to continue. Biden and Costa's soft-on-crime policies hurt every community, from the smallest town to the largest city.

We face a major growing threat to our national security from China. Just this past week, the inability of Biden’s administration to identify and shoot down a Chinese spy balloon before it passed over our country— loitering over sensitive nuclear installations, our homes, commercial infrastructure, government buildings, and military facilities— only continues to put each of our families and this nation at greater risk.

Americans deserve better than Joe Biden and Jim Costa's runaway inflation, surging crime, open borders, and national security weakness. What America needs – and what Republicans are offering – are common-sense policies that will help lower your cost of living, strengthen our national security resolve, and stop the fentanyl epidemic.

I support the House Republican plan to fix the failures of Democrats and the Biden administration with their Commitment to America plan.

_**Already they have voted to:**_
* Stop the Biden administration's plan to hire 87,000 IRS agents to go after hard-working Americans.
* Stand up against the Chinese Communist Party’s agenda.
* Restore individual liberty by ending the Biden administration’s COVID-19 vaccine mandates on certain healthcare workers and return to pre-pandemic life by ending the COVID-19 National Emergency.

The Central Valley has turned mainly to Republicans to provide a clear vision for our country. Republicans represent the new generation of leaders that will turn this country around and advocate for families, parents, workers, and small business owners.

**_Regardless of what Biden says tonight, the facts are clear: his policies are failing our nation, and Americans need more leaders with foundations based on integrity who will represent all the people leading them to a brighter and prosperous future._**

Sincerely,

Michael Maher
---
| _**Background** : Michael Maher is a former FBI Special Agent and US Navy Veteran, who was raised in the Central Valley. Michael and his wife Ann are raising their young family in Fresno County, and he owns and operates an aviation business. Michael was the 2022 nominee for California's 21st Congressional District._
---
| | | | | | | [](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=3991f3af65&e=1722d05e10)
---
| | [](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=34099339a3&e=1722d05e10)
---

subject: [Survey] We want your thoughts on the State of the Union
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
President Biden just concluded his State of the Union address, and we want to know your thoughts.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230207-3866-header&t=1&akid=3866%2E2526796%2Er5RXMO)
President Biden just concluded his State of the Union address. From rebuilding our country’s infrastructure to bringing back manufacturing and strengthening gun safety — President Biden had a lot to say for the progress he believes we’ve made.
But we want to hear from YOU. What did you think of the State of the Union address? And do you think the state of our union is strong?
[Please take the next two minutes to fill out our State of the Union survey.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/state-union-survey/?source=em20230207-3866-P_FND_RES_MIS&t=2&akid=3866%2E2526796%2Er5RXMO) Your input is valuable as we set our goals for the next two years of President Biden’s first term.
[Do you think the State of the Union is strong?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/state-union-survey/?source=em20230207-3866-P_FND_RES_MIS&t=3&akid=3866%2E2526796%2Er5RXMO) Yes No Unsure **[Take the survey →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/state-union-survey/?source=em20230207-3866-P_FND_RES_MIS&t=4&akid=3866%2E2526796%2Er5RXMO)**

Thank you in advance for sharing your comments.
— Team AOC

name: Team Casey
subject: What comes after tonight's State of the Union address
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
We need to keep our momentum going to put this agenda into action. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58422393/391049229/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWJmNDE2Yy02MGE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hHEP-qiWsw1eU6B-39_0FgQGksKh0NAdDMxWZRTu2jk=&emci=ca8908b3-1aa7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=2ebf416c-60a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=8943725) Peter,

**Did you watch the State of the Union address tonight?**

President Biden presented a vision for our future where more Americans can afford vital health care and prescription drugs, where more children and families can thrive, where we all pay our fair share for our shared prosperity, and where more of us have the freedom to succeed. And we heard our president reassure the world that we will not let tyranny stand here at home or across the globe.

President Biden presented a vision for our future where more Americans can afford vital health care and prescription drugs, where more children and families can thrive, where we all pay our fair share for our shared prosperity, and where more of us have the freedom to succeed. And we heard our president reassure the world that we will not let tyranny stand here at home or across the globe. name: Replace Sinema
subject: DEPLORABLE behavior from Sinema tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC
body:
| |
---
Peter,
Sorry for emailing you at this late hour, but Sinema's behavior during President Biden's State of the Union address tonight was deplorable -- even for her. First, she sat on the Republican side of the aisle. Then, she spent the majority of the speech on her phone. Cameras caught her texting several times. clean_body: | | Peter, Sorry for emailing you at this late hour, but Sinema's behavior during President Biden's State of the Union address tonight was deplorable -- even for her. First, she sat on the Republican side of the aisle. Then, she spent the majority of the speech on her phone. Cameras caught her texting several times. Whether it was because she was distracted by her phone, or because she simply didn't care, she also remained seated with Republicans while Democrats stood for important pieces of President Biden's speech -- including when he discussed lowering the cost of prescription drugs, and when he called for raising taxes on corporations. Based on the fact that she's been a shill for Wall Street and Big Pharma, we have a good hunch about why she remained seated. clean_body: ICYMI: this is what Republicans are offering the American people. | | | | | Peter, I just got done delivering the State of the Union response. In the radical left’s America, Washington taxes you and lights your hard-earned money on fire, but you get crushed with high gas prices, empty grocery shelves, and our children are taught to hate one another on account of their race, but not to love one another or our great country. Whether Joe Biden believes this madness or is simply too weak to resist it, his administration has been completely hijacked by the radical left. The dividing line in America is no longer between right or left. The choice is between normal or crazy. It is time for a new generation of Republican leadership. Chip in now to help make that happen: -Sarah Huckabee Sanders | | | | | | Paid for by Sarah for Governor | | PO Box 26340, Little Rock, AR 72221 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | | |

name: Response Requested (via DLCC)
subject: Did you approve of President Biden’s State of the Union?
body:
President Joe Biden just delivered his second State of the Union address | | |
---
| | President Joe Biden just delivered his second State of the Union address – unequivocally defending democracy and putting workers, families, and small business at the center of his plan to build back a better America. [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0gVmqLBk4ptk_P_GMRx-1TZXpJD8qeEx7kU3Bbk6JnmAhzXTgO7qnEWJrTJ_skMFaCgEMVxDbKnxv157bSQU-HlWbfrEDIggLOPBdaBlu-tl9TVfrbL5V6JjqsRhC4HuTA3xkQt4z0eEH2kG3u2nbMDp10UWmHkmHyUCxqcQs1S7AebzLE_woppBdnuY0JbD7t6ZxJ6MJ-pTXSr1pcL0DWTUVtUiosZE3sszH786L9BM4O7PtXWgsbGFNT5mnQJrpf3LPZ9iFoMr_2ZMvC2nXU-AGkZ0VH6sEemoOKlChmxPW7A1el3vlb9n52MShUdQVjslEjXhx32VkZ9zefpVokbsQEY2nzKq9kkYGRE-pI4g6YlR3VJx0FTkIJerELVZ4tpgXmhHKk84aihnog-Hoes/3tj/UaYlEGvUTk66MApb4YNTdg/h0/fvB19OznHMPTrtzWq4IuArdOiZuRO59HprIJsgzjpbo) President Biden’s speech affirmed that Democrats are doing everything they can to restore democracy – from adding a record number of jobs, expanding health care to millions of Americans, and passing major gun safety legislation. **But as the Biden-Harris administration works to build back America, MAGA Republicans are doubling down on destroying any progress made. From spewing election fraud conspiracies to introducing extreme abortion bans, Republicans are not giving up.**That’s why we need to band together _right now_ and stand behind President Biden and his agenda. **** [_**We want to know what local Democrats think about President Biden’s State of the Union address – can you take our quick poll today? It’ll take less than 60 seconds, and we want to hear directly from you >>**_](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0gVmqLBk4ptk_P_GMRx-1TZXpJD8qeEx7kU3Bbk6JnmAhzXTgO7qnEWJrTJ_skMFaCgEMVxDbKnxv157bSQU-HlWbfrEDIggLOPBdaBlu-tl9TVfrbL5V6JjqsRhC4HuTA3xkQt4z0eEH2kG3u2nbMDp10UWmHkmHyUCxqcQs1S74gIQiR3SPFHMG06i1Pjq9mVVe2-BHNZorGJmoBBE8K3qPnK2Qo1wkHqqV0zWFcxcZZwgRIoOYOIFYPe2R60BKKmW6u8EudvteA8h-MCS14cjCh4mkOvzsJyYwe351FWfL2syVCMlsB-TsvQh9tAgwoM16KBmK-rY-GuzjQn34jLJux-o8BnMAfNAhImVuBgyKcdIOZZpB9amwy7YBzFfr5apaAy63TvHt-eKgtUzBmE/3tj/UaYlEGvUTk66MApb4YNTdg/h1/HkrcfY7OZ6lZXYr6eotmo2NQnJ_3vc5Ebkjcx2C6U2o) | **Did you approve of President Biden’s State of the Union Address?**

Yes
No
Unsure
**[TAKE THE POLL →](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0gVmqLBk4ptk_P_GMRx-1TZXpJD8qeEx7kU3Bbk6JnmAhzXTgO7qnEWJrTJ_skMFaCgEMVxDbKnxv157bSQU-HleJqurCQThe4DoPdqnAtZt2AlPUOksEkEBzCWipUM3R1yrm5GeZ2kBA0DC2n5n38WeynPmb2i0HR17Y9L1c_vSDlAmcw5HX9WSuzhL9veD1augM_cn_qp3FA4yoMq9daWfLzI376XcKPMrqW9Ba7kZxrLJjjcVvrfJWECl3sk67e14AyDTc4Qq3cEcvK1O6LmyTEyGBnDEhcnSvwK2F-ouTddTZtyUDc-RHwAapRI8PRkP-2D6s5mNr2MTZHrmsu14tTARvsb0XPiQLyWjoL1SDDSAsNo_xcAsKXtrKR5LUDMWfltqJLpA0t3ca-gCuh2xKTGUta88LVV9SBu8lbHr/3tj/UaYlEGvUTk66MApb4YNTdg/h2/kWQvUpcJUAPL4fRgVE-RxZPHJrOF-7YmYAxg7elGgF4)**
---
After two years in office, the Biden-Harris administration has kept its promise to restore democracy after four destructive years of Donald Trump. But that responsibility not only falls on our Democratic leaders in Washington – it’s up to us as well, to fight hard to protect progress by electing state Democrats.
**Your state legislators are doing the work that impacts your day-to-day life. They are passing legislation affecting everything from the roads you drive on to the education your children receive. Now, they are facing nearly a dozen special elections in 2023.**
So we need to be ready if we want to win in every corner of the country and protect the progress we’ve made. That means ensuring President Biden’s vision of building a better future from the bottom up and middle out – and we can start by electing Democrats _up and down_ the ballot!
[Take a moment and let us know what you thought of President Biden’s State of the Union address >> ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0gVmqLBk4ptk_P_GMRx-1TZXpJD8qeEx7kU3Bbk6JnmAhzXTgO7qnEWJrTJ_skMFaCgEMVxDbKnxv157bSQU-HlWbfrEDIggLOPBdaBlu-tl9TVfrbL5V6JjqsRhC4HuTA3xkQt4z0eEH2kG3u2nbMDp10UWmHkmHyUCxqcQs1S74gIQiR3SPFHMG06i1Pjq9uWG2uFE7PJH9zQqz5MHtx8m4wEnmswdm-_56ORDlir9xUDOWO35nhqewgzbiarTxYB7lnnEsVZSa5LjkhVSdvbCTIf7vjnyiEpQ0bkD9Qq-OvXZEwbeekLR6opCsQCbUKNKkks_SCeLTqT2VhFaR0smg56MVIkRcNSMyJx0EQiq6fIqGbwzoqKlXiBv3qcQwca_yCFfw2DALbBpV1MPCd8/3tj/UaYlEGvUTk66MApb4YNTdg/h3/zudIdKRPMg0bCPio8W-pyy26mfqyy-vENzEif9shH3g)
We can’t wait to hear from you!
_Team DLCC_

name: President Joseph R. Biden, Jr.
subject: Let’s finish the job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
I just finished my second State of the Union address. Take a moment to read my message: | |
---
I just finished my State of the Union address. I hope I made you proud -- we’ve gotten a lot done together over the past two years. But there’s more to do to build an economy that works for working families. **As I said tonight, we’ve got to finish the job. But here’s the deal: I can’t do it without your help, Derek.** **[Will you take a moment to chip in $7 or more to help elect Democrats and build a brighter future for all Americans? name: Right Wing Report
subject: FILED: Five MASSIVE new lawsuits!
body:
unsubscribe

Dear Patriot,
Below is an important sponsored message for
your consideration. Messages like these enable us to continue
bringing you the latest news at no cost.
Courtesy of Right Wing Report

The Globalist Gun
Control Agenda is back from the dead
Dear Fellow Patriot,

The United Nations' "Small Arms Treaty" has
been the Gun Control Lobby's crown jewel for decades.

They've been waiting for an anti-gun
President, like Joe Biden, to take the White House so they can
launch an all-out effort to ratify it in the U.S. Senate.

Now they think they finally see their
opportunity to ram it through!

But you and I have a chance to stop them cold
-- as long as we take IMMEDIATE action to help dismantle this
dangerous Treaty.

I'm Dudley Brown, President of the National
Association for Gun Rights, and as I explain in the email below,
it's absolutely critical we act now!

For Freedom,

Dudley Brown
President
National Association for Gun Rights

Dear Fellow Patriot,

"BIDEN AIMS TO SIGN ON TO UN'S GLOBAL GUN
REGISTRATION TREATY."

That was the headline in the Washington
Examiner shortly after President Biden's State Department
spokesman told international bureaucrats of "the continuing
commitment of the United States" to the UN's "Small Arms Treaty"
during the gun control Conference of State Parties in Geneva,
Switzerland.

Just a few weeks later, President Biden
himself spoke before the United Nations in New York City,
stating:
"We'll continue to uphold the
long-standing rules and norms... Bedrock commitments, like
support for arms control measures to reduce the risk and enhance
transparency." Fellow Patriot, anyone hoping that
President Biden wouldn't use his bully pulpit to RAM the UN's
"Small Arms Treaty" down the throats of Americans just got those
hopes CRUSHED.

The battle over implementation of the UN's
"Small Arms Treaty" -- the crown jewel in the gun grabbers'
designs for the globe -- is about to reach a fever pitch.

That's why I'm counting on you to please sign
your OFFICIAL FIREARMS SOVEREIGNTY SURVEY to tell your U.S.
Senators "NO UN GUN BAN" at once!

As you'll see, this survey insists that your
U.S. Senators do everything in their power to oppose the UN
"Small Arms Treaty" in the U.S. Senate.

If there's anything we've learned, it's that
globalists have been telling LIES about the supposed "need" for
the UN's "Small Arms Treaty" for years.

From the beginning, gun grabbers have claimed
the purpose of the Treaty is keeping arms out of the hands of
terrorists, insurgents, rogue states, and gang members.

But at the very same time the Biden
Administration was pledging their support for the UN's "Small
Arms Treaty," they were leaving $83 BILLION in U.S. military
weaponry to the Taliban!

They don't care about keeping guns out of the
hands of terrorists.

They care about keeping guns out of the hands
of law-abiding Americans!

Reading through the details of the UN "Small
Arms Treaty," it's hard to see how our Second Amendment could
survive, if ratified.

For starters, the Treaty text demands the
U.S. identity "end users" (gun buyers), document "the quantity,
value, and model/type" of firearms and ammunition, and develop
"national control standards" to regulate transfers.

In other words, by design it's an
International Gun Registry that'll include detailed information
on American gun owners just like you -- the first step toward
outright CONFISCATION.

Worse, all that information would be made
accessible by despots and foreign governments including the
Treaty's largest signer -- Communist China.

As you can see, it's vital you sign your
OFFICIAL FIREARMS SOVEREIGNTY SURVEY to your U.S. Senators
demanding they reject this scheme!

Once a nation signs on, the UN's goal is to
quickly impose "International Small Arms Control Standards"
(ISACS) on them. Introductory language already includes:

*** Mandated national "screening" for those
seeking to own guns, giving bureaucrats the final say on whether
or not you're "competent" enough to own a firearm;

*** Restrictive licensing for gun and ammo
sales, and perhaps even bans on anything from semi-auto rifles to
shotguns and handguns;

*** Restrictions on the number of guns and
amount of ammo any "properly-licensed" individual may legally
own;

*** Bans on magazines holding more than ten
rounds; and

*** Bans on owning a firearm for self-defense
-- unless a citizen can somehow get government approval (which
will only happen if you're "connected" -- or paid half-a-million
dollars for one of Hunter Biden's paintings).
Believe me, the United Nations has no
intention of slow walking any of this. To them, your Second
Amendment freedoms are a threat to their grand "utopian" designs.

Enemies like Red China are so eager to see
every American disarmed they're pouring money into the UN "Small
Arms Treaty" hand-over-fist.

So, it's no wonder why they're hell-bent on
forcing the U.S. to submit to this globalist gun control scam --
and why we must defeat it!

I'm counting on you to help beat the UN by
signing your OFFICIAL FIREARMS SOVEREIGNTY SURVEY to your U.S.
Senators.

As soon the gun grabbers have 67 votes to
ratify the Treaty in the U.S. Senate, you can bet Biden's pal,
Sen. Chuck Schumer, will call for the vote.

But we can't wait until then to fight back
because even now, one-world bureaucrats are these gun controls
deep into every part of government.

On top of Biden's ATF anti-gun executive
actions, a headline from The Hill shows how "Democrats' latest
backdoor plan to limit gun ownership" involves new State
Department "sanctions" designed to drive the price of ammo by
BANNING imports.

That's the same State Department which NAGR
caught red-handed trying to siphon your tax dollars into funding
the UN "Small Arms Treaty."

Worse, since day one of the COVID-19
outbreak, our court system has said yes to almost any politician
cooking up any unconstitutional idea so long as it's under the
guise of "public health."

So now Biden's Center for Disease Control
(CDC) is pushing a new Euro-centric gun control framework that
says "Using a public health approach is essential to addressing
firearm violence and keeping people safe and healthy."

That's why insisting that your U.S. Senators
OPPOSE the ratification of the UN's "Small Arms Treaty" is not
enough.

We must insist that the U.S. Senate ensures
that NOT ONE TAXPAYER CENT is spent by Biden on implementing any
part of this Treaty or what it stands for.

But I'm counting on your help to send that
message -- before it's too late.

First, please sign your OFFICIAL FIREARMS
SOVEREIGNTY SURVEY to tell your U.S. Senators "NO UN GUN BAN" at
once.

Second, please agree to your most generous
contribution to help the National Association for Gun Rights
mobilize a grassroots firestorm against the UN's "Small Arms
Treaty" -- using everything from U.S. Mail, to phones, to email,
blogs, and guest editorials, hard-hitting video and even paid
media if we can raise resources.

If at all possible, I'm hoping you'll agree
to $100.

I know that's a lot to ask for, believe me.
But the fight is here, {{first_name:Fellow Patriot}}. It's on.
There's no time to wait.

But if $100 is just too much -- even given
the urgency of the situation -- please agree to $30, or at least
$15 TODAY.

Whatever you can do, please act IMMEDIATELY.
There's no time to waste.

For Freedom,

Dudley Brown
President
National Association for Gun Rights

P.S. Reports say the Biden Administration
will be signing on to the UN "Small Arms Treaty" any day, setting
up an all-out fight over ratification and implementation here in
the United States.

Please help fight back.

So will you please sign your OFFICIAL
FIREARMS SOVEREIGNTY SURVEY IMMEDIATELY along with your most
generous contribution of $100 TODAY?

Whatever you can give, even just $30 or $15
will go a long way towards helping NAGR defeat this
unconstitutional Treaty once and for all.

The National
Association for Gun Rights, Inc. is a non-profit tax exempt
advocacy organization under Section 501(c)4 of the IRC.
Contributions or gifts to NAGR are not tax-deductible for IRS
purposes. Not paid for or mailed at taxpayer expense. The
National Association for Gun Rights' mailing address is P.O. Box
1776, Loveland, Colorado 80539. They can be contacted toll-free
at 1-877-405-4570. Its web address is www.NationalGunRights.org

Not produced or
emailed at taxpayer expense.

name: Margaret Mary Dunn
subject: Save my son from the woke mob
body:
I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

_**But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.**_

[**Will you help my son?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4rc5kndc72uef91eg2rjkmnae3pvk8n6ooc6n3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3im2o34cjh2bs)

That's Michael in the photo.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdoilje4jrr8hoecbn431n1hopjgmttomccals0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3im2o34cjh2bs) [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z29q0udrjigmt39vl4oeqqa3cg1rraiqm44ekk3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3im2o34cjh2bs)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael 's_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlt5hsqj6ghn3dhpn141blt31vbr82h92ligrmlo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3im2o34cjh2bs)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zm8d6s80094vsfdq4v2scsb2opgl6n94gj4ruego_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3im2o34cjh2bs)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" \- and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zop9rpjl7jndgv2ktsnv0heeg0hq2jdbe68meej8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3im2o34cjh2bs)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a **[gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkdeb8mtvcqt9du0ug3n2oh8bglk0ra92k36kk50_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3im2o34cjh2bs)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3e8otbnfpuaflk46jp8b46gkvuq9j2sirc6rju0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3im2o34cjh2bs)
_That 's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv48u79p7n4v7sdedapmpncuqtuj382ge7lh0s9g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3im2o34cjh2bs)
_That 's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William_

I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today.

Sincerely,

Margaret Mary Dunn

PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind **[donation today of $35, $50, or $100](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7vvgmbk1icmpvqphc2c9p0sodvkslsaloltmhh8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3im2o34cjh2bs)** to help Michael will mean so much to my family.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, [please use this preferences page](http://e.1600daily.com/prefs/9z2zts9f92bvnn0trgtjhqf18q07mv00dbndpd03h5o).
625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvjo0be5ulmsj6o9gsqv94ta45j6uvtn5vvd6ch8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7clgeaob0chie49fg)

# **Biden’s Sneaky H.R. 5376 Is A Nightmare For 401(k) And IRA Savers**
---
### **Biden’s Sneaky H.R. 5376 Is A Nightmare For 401(k) And IRA Savers**

| | | Hi, Dr. Ron Paul here.

Biden just made the lives of American retirement savers much harder.

_And the mainstream media is ignoring this story!_

**Here’s what happened:**

Joe Biden couldn’t get his “Build Back Better” bill passed last year because everyone knew it would cause **more inflation**. So he stubbornly pushed it through Washington in “H.R. 5376”.

Without a doubt, this sneaky move confirms what I’ve always believed:
* Governments will never stop printing fiat currency until it is worthless!
* Anyone keeping their savings in dollars or stocks should consider smarter options, TODAY!

---
| | _So is there something you can do?_

YES! Physical gold offers an opportunity to **escape wealth confiscation**. And the best way to protect your savings with gold is through a PHYSICAL GOLD IRA.

Why? Because:
1. You avoid taxation just like with any other retirement account.
2. The gold is in PHYSICAL form. Which is far more trustworthy than "paper" gold.
3. You _**won’t pay a DIME in penalties or taxes**_ when you sell your stocks and buy gold.

This is the perfect scenario if you are approaching or are already in retirement.

# Congress To Revoke The Dollar From Circulation And Replace It With A Government Controlled Digital Coin? Feds Testing Digital Money With 9 Banks
---
Wired Magazine Says It's: **"A Tool for Government Surveillance of Citizens
and Control Over Their Financial Transactions."**
---
My Fellow American Patriot, The world's biggest economies, including the United States, are rapidly ramping up to digitize their currency and **end "paper cash."** On the agenda: Eliminate or reduce untraceable, untaxable cash and crypto transactions, and **clear the way to establish a national government-controlled digital currency.** Did you know that on March 9th, Biden signed into law something known as **Executive Order 14067**?
---
---
Yet we discover that this digital currency mentioned here **has been in development for TEN years**. The legislation is already on the docket in the Senate. It's the new pro-digital dollar draft, **Senate Bill 3571 - Banking for All Act**. **You can protect yourself with this Complimentary[Protection Guide](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11530/6374453/c31a2a37d798ee7744039a340f531e4a6c5b289d/aa21be05af149697a89aa924c71ae32576312da1).** But what they’re doing with this bill is much, much worse. __**They’re Going After Your Money.**__ The goal of this bill is simple. What Democrats want is nothing more than to make the US dollar obsolete. They want to do away with paper cash. **THE NEXT STEP;_"EVERYBODY" ...Stand in Line and Get Your " FedAccount."_** Here are some comments from the news media about Joe's executive order and digital currency:
---
---
This [Protection Guide](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11530/6374453/c3b0f423b6b61aee80131fd24caa4f8b055c5b38/aa21be05af149697a89aa924c71ae32576312da1) is Complimentary; your's for the asking. Here: A white paper issued by the Fed's BOARD OF GOVERNORS OF THE FEDERAL RESERVE SYSTEM titled: **• Money and Payments: The U.S. Dollar in the Age of Digital****Transformation, published January 2022.** Direct quotes from the white paper:
---
---
What does that mean for the dollar twenty years from now, thirty? What does that mean for all the time you've invested in building your retirement account? This is entirely different from online banking and nothing like crypto. It’s like having spyware installed in your bank account. Malware that tracks your every move and reports it back to the powers that be. China and Russia have launched their digital currencies, and they are backed by gold. _Ours, "Fedcoin," will be backed by our debt._ **We don’t know it, but we’re already enslaved!** In addition, 90% of central banks are testing or exploring this concept. It’s not a question of “oh, this might happen someday.” _**It’s happening NOW.**_ And the reality is that it’s only a matter of time until Americans are FORCED to use digital currencies. I want you to grab the [Complimentary Guide](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11530/6374453/2b8b3fc247af3606ac349cf2b7c9b87d3349fa73/aa21be05af149697a89aa924c71ae32576312da1) right now. Time is of the essence. You can legally secure your money and believe it or not, even GROW it. Yes, it’s possible to do all this while hiding it safely away from Democrat surveillance and control. **And When These Digital Currencies**
**Are Implemented its Game Over** **Everything you need to get you on the path of protection is in this Complimentary Guide.** You'll Learn the following: • About the particular account, rich people use to shield their assets • About the world’s most powerful anti-inflation fighter • About what you must do now to protect your retirement...plus how to profit from the coming turmoil • Plus, we’re also going to reveal the secret IRS loophole that could save you $1,000s in taxes **_The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago; the second best time is now._** ACT NOW. It's important not to delay. **Grab it here[Complimentary Protection Guide](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11530/6374453/15df28f7448136f4e2a6bcd05f055a0714ba69ff/aa21be05af149697a89aa924c71ae32576312da1).**

subject: Are you reading these?
body:
If you’re watching–if you’re reading these–it’s because you care a lot, just like I do.
[](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-nuylljy-dytiuyidkd-r/) If you're watching-if you're reading these-it's because you care a lot about our commonwealth and its future, _**just like I do.**_ [__**Give my latest message to you and Kentuckians everywhere a watch!**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-nuylljy-dytiuyidkd-j/)**⬇ ️ ⬇️ ⬇️** [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-nuylljy-dytiuyidkd-t/) _We want Kentucky to be a better place._ We want preserved the freedoms that -- maybe for too long -- we've taken for granted in this country._To get that done, _we need a governor who 's going to not only lead, but listen.__We need a governor who's gonna bring people together on the challenges that have plagued for generations the Commonwealth we love-_**because here is the truth, Kentucky 's not winning anymore. **_When I say 'Kentucky Wins,' it's not a talking point, _we 've actually gotta start winning again. _Tennessee, Ohio, Indiana, _**they 're kicking our butt and I've had enough of it.**_ [__**Have you?**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-nuylljy-dytiuyidkd-i/) [JOIN ME AS A PIONEER ON TEAM KECK](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-nuylljy-dytiuyidkd-d/) When I ran for mayor, we said that Somerset would stop taking a backseat to anybody in the region and we would start to win again _and guess what?**We did.**_ We built a great team, we listened to our community and we started to execute.I'm just gonna tell you, _**Kentucky should take a backseat to nobody in this region**_ , I want Texas, Florida and other states to also start wondering what in the world is going on in the Commonwealth. What's happening in Kentucky? _**I think unequivocally that it 's possible.**_[__**So, I 'm asking you to be a pioneer with me. Join me as we march up the hill.**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-nuylljy-dytiuyidkd-h/) _Take our flag and the hill with me and**let 's get this done.**_ [JOIN ME AS A PIONEER ON TEAM KECK](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-nuylljy-dytiuyidkd-k/) Only together will we prove that #KentuckyWins.God bless. [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-nuylljy-dytiuyidkd-u/) [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-nuylljy-dytiuyidkd-o/) Alan Keck ### | [Unsubscribe](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-u-nuylljy-dytiuyidkd-b/)

We want preserved the freedoms that -- maybe for too long -- we've taken for granted in this country.To get that done, we need a governor who 's going to not only lead, but listen.We need a governor who's gonna bring people together on the challenges that have plagued for generations the Commonwealth we love-because here is the truth, Kentucky 's not winning anymore. When I say 'Kentucky Wins,' it's not a talking point, we 've actually gotta start winning again. Tennessee, Ohio, Indiana, they 're kicking our butt and I've had enough of it. When I ran for mayor, we said that Somerset would stop taking a backseat to anybody in the region and we would start to win again and guess what?We did. We built a great team, we listened to our community and we started to execute.I'm just gonna tell you, Kentucky should take a backseat to nobody in this region , I want Texas, Florida and other states to also start wondering what in the world is going on in the Commonwealth. What's happening in Kentucky? I think unequivocally that it 's possible. Take our flag and the hill with me andlet 's get this done._ Only together will we prove that #KentuckyWins.God bless. Alan Keck ### |

name: Greater Georgia
subject: KELLY LOEFFLER CALLS FOR INVESTIGATION INTO NEW ZUCKERBUCKS SCHEME IN DEKALB COUNTY
disclaimer_text: paid for by special interests, and now, that's the law
body:
| | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE WEDNESDAY, FEBRUARY 8
KELLY LOEFFLER CALLS FOR INVESTIGATION INTO NEW ZUCKERBUCKS SCHEME IN DEKALB COUNTY
ATLANTA - Today, Former U.S. Senator and Greater Georgia Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler called for an investigation by Georgia's oversight agencies into the DeKalb County Board of Elections after it announced last week that it would [accept](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ClGtCoEzlYpJenj4Yonx7emA6AJ17up4-IQWByHtsq-j6-JFakAO1ATyDzAFmEcENW0C58Ds17kGAmZZNnWEQWo3YfhtKNHnYXcTE7GWvfjRkSILrER0QqdLAIYQxSwlTSa38T9sf8WLyl2y8zd5ZnMIslu87g8BpWLmyBmvzsdTiDLPPcRG7r3cWmTA5uzgW7xkOqR7sCICEpsbcf0Xe8IpDphOZRF2BBkROEfUm48zLz012dbOMOtl4x82t1eNNO788oKifYVl7EMtPCg0dg==&c=UwpCwhqkT8m0rCzZ7TTtNhHqoS9cDlDA5rWn8fItZvbKyzFskNxA5g==&ch=3UNweV-O30JTpwfwlMYlCpGs7kJncc0beLhHNoyL_hu3Mj2kBQHuPg==)[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ClGtCoEzlYpJenj4Yonx7emA6AJ17up4-IQWByHtsq-j6-JFakAO1ATyDzAFmEcENW0C58Ds17kGAmZZNnWEQWo3YfhtKNHnYXcTE7GWvfjRkSILrER0QqdLAIYQxSwlTSa38T9sf8WLyl2y8zd5ZnMIslu87g8BpWLmyBmvzsdTiDLPPcRG7r3cWmTA5uzgW7xkOqR7sCICEpsbcf0Xe8IpDphOZRF2BBkROEfUm48zLz012dbOMOtl4x82t1eNNO788oKifYVl7EMtPCg0dg==&c=UwpCwhqkT8m0rCzZ7TTtNhHqoS9cDlDA5rWn8fItZvbKyzFskNxA5g==&ch=3UNweV-O30JTpwfwlMYlCpGs7kJncc0beLhHNoyL_hu3Mj2kBQHuPg==)$2 million in grant money from the U.S. Alliance for Election Excellence (the Alliance). The Alliance is backed by the Center for Tech and Civic Life (CTCL), the same group that, in 2020, [partnered](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ClGtCoEzlYpJenj4Yonx7emA6AJ17up4-IQWByHtsq-j6-JFakAO1CbkFBxjd9g9no-9Xc9FsX3W93J2bTWsxSd0ogyq239wsy8xNzRhruFoGnMF0kRHK-9R1pCkH4-ENPvtMspjQnxGDM2cY3m_vcHqfm3RDuGiXaNw-v6sJawRorl9R6FLXtnUVNOYd_AhPH4v0QSFEEc=&c=UwpCwhqkT8m0rCzZ7TTtNhHqoS9cDlDA5rWn8fItZvbKyzFskNxA5g==&ch=3UNweV-O30JTpwfwlMYlCpGs7kJncc0beLhHNoyL_hu3Mj2kBQHuPg==) with Mark Zuckerberg to funnel $45 million into Georgia in mostly blue counties ahead of the election - boosting turnout in Democratic counties and benefitting liberal candidates at the top of the ticket. Zuckerberg continues to [fund](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ClGtCoEzlYpJenj4Yonx7emA6AJ17up4-IQWByHtsq-j6-JFakAO1ATyDzAFmEcEl3vOP49mHkjyBpHmHbLzgYS7ik_UI99w4ZhuP3ZirjKKD7wabeSZkiF97vp7BYbtHCS6vPq_roqnTsVYR6niJquUrLZ1u-VZZADQPahVlDFMXAXMCGrmKWV5U2t3uW361OPf-nbZY-iqpCxRZr1pKj0OARTNXXODJurvgnQvLu4ZzfH9S5Tm-Q==&c=UwpCwhqkT8m0rCzZ7TTtNhHqoS9cDlDA5rWn8fItZvbKyzFskNxA5g==&ch=3UNweV-O30JTpwfwlMYlCpGs7kJncc0beLhHNoyL_hu3Mj2kBQHuPg==) this latest effort, which brings external influence to local election operations despite existing laws banning the practice in Georgia.
"After the 2020 elections, Georgia lawmakers acted swiftly to ban Zuckerbucks - and all other outside money - from influencing our elections. Today, two years later, deep-blue DeKalb County is blatantly skirting that law to get the same money, while undermining trust and fairness in our electoral process," said Loeffler. "The bottom line is that Georgia's election operations should not be bought and paid for by special interests, and now, that's the law. That is why, on behalf of Georgia voters, I am calling for an investigation into DeKalb County's clear violation of the law, and to shut down this partisan Zuckerbucks slush fund."
In 2021, Georgia lawmakers [banned](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ClGtCoEzlYpJenj4Yonx7emA6AJ17up4-IQWByHtsq-j6-JFakAO1BS3Uk2op_AiJfY3m1Y62rJL5CCmCHVYafeVDTNNlilrdsWviZ4ld09_v01JjK5kuan-h9XiaiuPnd_f_MK3-RpbvEBhXtmXBdWWCpikBBE7QukAZhTRUT4=&c=UwpCwhqkT8m0rCzZ7TTtNhHqoS9cDlDA5rWn8fItZvbKyzFskNxA5g==&ch=3UNweV-O30JTpwfwlMYlCpGs7kJncc0beLhHNoyL_hu3Mj2kBQHuPg==) local election officials from accepting outside money through the Georgia Election Integrity Act (SB 202). But according to DeKalb County Board of Elections Chair Dele Lowman Smith, the county [found](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ClGtCoEzlYpJenj4Yonx7emA6AJ17up4-IQWByHtsq-j6-JFakAO1ATyDzAFmEcEYv8tt45NCylC59M-cC8D4z9aY9VetvmcibqGD5URi5nP3mwg1Q7VA5R8u6dFROT9GuE928P6urL2aGb3mu4iS_yMdo85bP8S1UDmNg8tUsOeE3kdbiWqPRbH4wPRYTiFDoLCjiLEOXfSJ3xq4T9BYwmLQzXf215PFdaiofOk5i225rF4wLfL6TlomrHLxB2qXjV_v34Cw64=&c=UwpCwhqkT8m0rCzZ7TTtNhHqoS9cDlDA5rWn8fItZvbKyzFskNxA5g==&ch=3UNweV-O30JTpwfwlMYlCpGs7kJncc0beLhHNoyL_hu3Mj2kBQHuPg==) a way to skirt state law. As paraphrased by a local media outlet: "since election offices are not allowed to receive grants directly, the lengthy application process was led by the county's finance department."
The grant, which is [part](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ClGtCoEzlYpJenj4Yonx7emA6AJ17up4-IQWByHtsq-j6-JFakAO1ATyDzAFmEcEJgioinOACzEDRTNjZjhy6gzhglSlCMzPGTl_A2PNwMkqjfjzbxEV4DbbhsnH2QL3BJg75rqWyW-XVbS3tEOaPpPTgWHNeone8BaPi5weEbUFjNS6VCNQNRDiUwGAbS5k6Q67LtPTBLzwD3DxoZUzmw==&c=UwpCwhqkT8m0rCzZ7TTtNhHqoS9cDlDA5rWn8fItZvbKyzFskNxA5g==&ch=3UNweV-O30JTpwfwlMYlCpGs7kJncc0beLhHNoyL_hu3Mj2kBQHuPg==) of CTCL's U.S. Alliance for Election Excellence program, is unambiguously designed to fund certain local boards of election. As DeKalb County CEO Michael Thurmond [emphasized](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ClGtCoEzlYpJenj4Yonx7emA6AJ17up4-IQWByHtsq-j6-JFakAO1ATyDzAFmEcEi8M3WArrTWUVw2oar8pi8OcpiFaJlg_mo1hbl7LiWsL6io3v5x3hqo4As79ySJsIBdPiGPYZyuJiGdre63Vo0jRahTD6xOnD9vkg53T2tJKnyQ-3_GsZZr6eUaRJ8Dup6dKw66HBJ_KS1DVbOZ--yR-4YEsvB626JO1VKnY9wyy-qBdCIVP6QWlwAXKLvnGbC2ob6AzIjlSecXITzeWsKdw1bqrST9crtKjmCc_TZzKoPsmH1hKU8luWvR7U08NzYAnbD89EjrIYePDzXutsxuwmsgi_A6ZfySxWY4ZTQYcgNBAJX7NdqdGwNRh-2g8Ul5linfbr_M-cXNkLfWehGRsyz-BW-osQ-dWmRq2ZRnD8sOWw1z2idZQO3ldPN7mFmqAfkYxYpWfMr5DOqjUKnGxak_KUZ_OQtQ8ve1XpTUlfqwcQ4ujOtTTo0IyivLSY&c=UwpCwhqkT8m0rCzZ7TTtNhHqoS9cDlDA5rWn8fItZvbKyzFskNxA5g==&ch=3UNweV-O30JTpwfwlMYlCpGs7kJncc0beLhHNoyL_hu3Mj2kBQHuPg==) in a public statement, "The county is pleased to be a recipient of this funding in support of the Elections Department's ongoing efforts to serve as a model for election integrity not just in Georgia but throughout our nation." In 2020, before the practice was outlawed, the DeKalb County Board of Elections [received](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ClGtCoEzlYpJenj4Yonx7emA6AJ17up4-IQWByHtsq-j6-JFakAO1ATyDzAFmEcENW0C58Ds17kGAmZZNnWEQWo3YfhtKNHnYXcTE7GWvfjRkSILrER0QqdLAIYQxSwlTSa38T9sf8WLyl2y8zd5ZnMIslu87g8BpWLmyBmvzsdTiDLPPcRG7r3cWmTA5uzgW7xkOqR7sCICEpsbcf0Xe8IpDphOZRF2BBkROEfUm48zLz012dbOMOtl4x82t1eNNO788oKifYVl7EMtPCg0dg==&c=UwpCwhqkT8m0rCzZ7TTtNhHqoS9cDlDA5rWn8fItZvbKyzFskNxA5g==&ch=3UNweV-O30JTpwfwlMYlCpGs7kJncc0beLhHNoyL_hu3Mj2kBQHuPg==) about $10 million in grants funded by Mark Zuckerberg and funneled through CTCL.
Potential investigatory agencies for DeKalb County's malfeasance include the Georgia Attorney General's office, the State Ethics Commission, and other bodies empowered with oversight authority.
Greater Georgia, launched by former U.S. Senator Kelly Loeffler in 2021, is a 501(c4) nonpartisan nonprofit dedicated to growing participation in the democratic process by mobilizing and empowering voters. The group works year-round to educate and register voters, engage with diverse and underrepresented communities, and protect election integrity.

The Alliance is backed by the Center for Tech and Civic Life (CTCL), the same group that, in 2020, == with Mark Zuckerberg to funnel $45 million into Georgia in mostly blue counties ahead of the election - boosting turnout in Democratic counties and benefitting liberal candidates at the top of the ticket. Zuckerberg continues to == this latest effort, which brings external influence to local election operations despite existing laws banning the practice in Georgia. But according to DeKalb County Board of Elections Chair Dele Lowman Smith, the county == a way to skirt state law. As paraphrased by a local media outlet: "since election offices are not allowed to receive grants directly, the lengthy application process was led by the county's finance department." The grant, which is == of CTCL's U.S. Alliance for Election Excellence program, is unambiguously designed to fund certain local boards of election. As DeKalb County CEO Michael Thurmond == in a public statement, "The county is pleased to be a recipient of this funding in support of the Elections Department's ongoing efforts to serve as a model for election integrity not just in Georgia but throughout our nation." In 2020, before the practice was outlawed, the DeKalb County Board of Elections == about $10 million in grants funded by Mark Zuckerberg and funneled through CTCL. Potential investigatory agencies for DeKalb County's malfeasance include the Georgia Attorney General's office, the State Ethics Commission, and other bodies empowered with oversight authority. Greater Georgia, launched by former U.S. Senator Kelly Loeffler in 2021, is a 501(c4) nonpartisan nonprofit dedicated to growing participation in the democratic process by mobilizing and empowering voters. name: Alliance Defending Freedom
subject: Are you still devoted to the fight for life? Sign the Pledge today!
body:
Unfortunately, it seems that many pro-life Americans believe that the fight has been won and may have disengaged from the cause.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z2r0tc4d9slras35gbniscsrhiogds73iut738h8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s7262pm0o9j6dqecc77m1oj2cllchij6d3me3gb8pr2mko70t5m69ir2tj1eprjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj32t5lmhjr4t366pib6or7m2qmash1k8gn48n24hhmepb0sdgm1p33c8iv0)
Are you still devoted to the fight for life? Sign the Pledge today!
| | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zf0vtsqek012ulik9a0up3kk3ojr71ocjv9c9tm0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3hm2o74cdh2bs)
---
Fellow Pro-Life American, The recent overturning of the disastrous _Roe v. Wade_ decision that enabled the killing of over 60 million babies was a blessing from God — one of the most amazing victories for biblical values in our lifetime. We at ADF are proud to be a part of the legal team that secured this historic, generational win — a victory only made possible by the prayerful and generous support of friends just like you! But as you and I both know, the recent decision in _Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization_ did not mark the end of abortion in America. Far from it, in fact. **Unfortunately, it seems that many pro-life Americans believe that the fight has been won and may have disengaged from the cause.** I urge you, friend — don't give into that temptation! The war for the rights of the unborn and the protection of their mothers has just begun. As we continue into the next phase of the fight, can I count on your commitment to this movement until abortion is eradicated in America once and for all? [**If your answer is “YES,” will you please join thousands of your fellow Americans in signing this national pledge of support for the pro-life cause?**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zgekp590i6vf0feenv8aimd84848k2qm994k1iq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3hm2o74cdh2bs)
---
[**Sign the Pro-Life Pledge**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zdaeha3c0dq4fkr0hhfei2h377br0peug0vhhljo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3hm2o74cdh2bs)
---
**When you reaffirm your commitment, we'll immediately give you access to ADF’s widely popular digital guide,_Critical Conversations: LIFE - 3 Myths and 3 Facts_ , at no cost!** This powerful resource will equip you with the knowledge and confidence you need to respectfully but convincingly defend the pro-life position in this new post-_Roe_ age, whether you're engaging with family, friends, coworkers, or complete strangers. And as you and I both know, those conversations are only going to become more common — and more contentious. The leftist media and their allies in the pro-abortion movement have treated the _Dobbs_ decision like it’s the end of the road for abortion. It seems like nearly every day that we hear another story of activists hysterically protesting, committing acts of violence, lobbing threats at crisis pregnancy centers, or worse. There can be no doubt about it — the pro-abortion activists haven't abandoned this battle. They've doubled down. [**We need to do the same. Will you let me know that you’re still praying, working, and interceding for the right to life by signing ADF’s Pro-Life Pledge right now?**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z9u05e2bednlu3s4c3j84h1f53uq4v0bhshi3v48_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3hm2o74cdh2bs) The pro-abortion activists would love nothing more than for the pro-life movement to rest on our laurels and consider our work done. That’s why we must continue praying, acting, and speaking out to defend the thousands of innocent, pre-born children who are victims of abortion every day, until the very last one is saved. Every step of the way, you can count on ADF to lead on the legal front. Our attorneys are the tip of the spear in numerous pro-life legal efforts all across the country, including:
* **ADF has litigated dozens of cases against Planned Parenthood** —several implicating Planned Parenthood affiliates for millions in taxpayer fraud.

* **Multiple cases that will protect vulnerable women.** These cases will ensure that mothers have the right to know the truth about abortion and that abortionists follow basic health and safety laws

* **Cases that will protect the conscience rights of healthcare workers** and the free speech rights of pro-life advocates.

In each of these battles, the prayerful and generous support of friends just like you make all the difference. Can I count on you to stand with us once again as we enter this new chapter of the movement to end abortion and defend the sanctity of life? [**Please sign the declaration here. Remember — when you sign, you'll immediately get access to our popular digital guide,_Critical Conversations: LIFE - 3 Myths and 3 Facts_ , at no cost****!**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zimj778773p6sk8jmk0tn39ns0cv7cibslj9kuso_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3hm2o74cdh2bs)
---
[**Sign the Pro-Life Pledge**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zlktsh07v4n1h3oe88c7f1jcnf4s38s9d7buf23o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3hm2o74cdh2bs)
---
Thank you, and God bless you! For life, Michael Farris President & CEOAlliance Defending Freedom
---
15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260
All donations are secure, private, and tax-deductible. Member ECFA.
---

625 First Street #183 Alexandria, VA 22314
