name: VADEMS
subject: Let's finish the job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
|
---
Derek, Last night, President Biden gave his first State of the Union Address to a divided Congress. During his speech, President Biden brought out the greatest hits: the list of accomplishments made during his first two years in office. Bringing the nation out of a pandemic, **creating 12,000,000 new jobs,** unemployment at a 50-year low, **signing key legislation like the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law,** the American Rescue Plan,**the CHIPS Act,** the PACT Act, **and the Inflation Reduction Act,** accelerating the Cancer moonshot, **nominating the first African-American woman to the Supreme Court of the United States,** tackling the mental health crisis, **fighting the opioid epidemic,** and more. Put simply: Democrats in Washington have been delivering for us. The president outlined the next two years during his speech. The progress we can make and the possibility it brings to the American people. Rebuilding the middle class – the backbone of our nation – police reform, banning assault weapons, moving on voting rights, and defending the right to an abortion. We are at another inflection point in our nation’s history — and we must continue to restore the soul of our nation. It’s time to finish the job that Americans sent President Biden, Vice President Harris, and every Democrat in Congress to Washington to do. **Will you show your support for our Democrats in Washington and help us bring their successes back to the Commonwealth?[Together, we can build on the historic victories of the Biden Administration here at home. name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Revealed: Plan to Transform America
body:
| **Why are Bezos and Musk Investing Billions to 'Transform' the American Economy? And What Does It Mean for Your Money?** Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system. Right now, the mainstream media is completely ignoring what might be the most important story in the financial world that nobody is talking about. Amid the distractions caused by conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation, Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at an event called COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world's most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President, Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...

From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a [$150 trillion 'global transition' of our economy. ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c1cf8a847fc84b899509cc11ee9c08f7&_e=2qc5robdztQ87Az3nDvbWxjxs73jg5pxD6NK2w6Zd93dLEXjSOJRgYrVA0VXWRFL7g8vqPVvGlLlggpoEeBwTTsyB6KbIsKIKeZiMppZMsDXtTukXsgY45FDCB1K2NacYtuqIF2kM4GbuViGx_TpWDqQR48IMnInQC_qJg7BzXipAe6Tjz-btLLt2OYTN33JUNq83lkbKLETx3V_kHLJlKGqVK8h4N9XO13_swl4NO0rSYnQY7Rh9RX-Hed61aBS) Since then, Bank of America has committed, along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world's biggest companies. Several billionaires, led by Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this 'transformation' as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for with their 'transformation'? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins, who predicted the 2008 market meltdown has followed the money... And what she's discovered is startling. It has nothing to do with a market crash... a new reserve currency... or the end of fiat. Prins says: **" While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines, I've found evidence the elites are spending $150 trillion to 'transform' our economy into something we didn't vote on... didn't ask for... and very few are prepared for.** **In essence, we 're about to see a stranger, more extreme 'new normal' in America.** **Most people will be shocked when they see what happens in the months ahead. "** Prins considers this transformation so urgent, she has agreed to sit down for an interview to get her message in front of as many Americans as possible. For now, there's no cost to watch. clean_body: | Why are Bezos and Musk Investing Billions to 'Transform' the American Economy? And What Does It Mean for Your Money? Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system. Right now, the mainstream media is completely ignoring what might be the most important story in the financial world that nobody is talking about. Amid the distractions caused by conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation, Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at an event called COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world's most powerful people, including: U.S. President, Joe Biden... British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson... Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau... French President, Emmanuel Macron... ... and many more... What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for with their 'transformation'? And what does it mean for your money? name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Tell Congress: Pass the Stop Scam PACs Act
body:
Stop these scammers!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta306d750-411e-4e28-a1c5-3b8256bf9685/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, The petition to Congress reads: **_" Scam PACs have been taking advantage of senior citizens, veterans and other Americans for far too long. Pass Rep. Katie Porter’s Stop SCAM PACs Act without further delay."_** **[Click here to add your name to oppose SCAM PACs!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfc82bb7e-7e7d-4acb-9327-5e18ba749418/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Scam PACs, which pose as legitimate political action committees but exist solely to enrich their founders, are a major problem on both sides of the aisle. They rip people off by taking money that was intended to help support a particular candidate or cause and using it to instead line someone’s pockets. And in some instances, when donors find out what happened, they erode trust in the political process, discouraging people from staying involved and making it harder for legitimate campaigns and PACs to raise money online. Thankfully, progressive champion Katie Porter (D-CA) recently introduced the Stop Scam PACs Act, which would finally crack down on scam PACs and help protect political donors from being scammed.
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**SIGN THE PETITION**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7e5cac73-ef53-41cf-97de-82c3d03bea96/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| According to Rep. Porter’s office, the Stop Scam PACs Act would "empower the Federal Election Commission to take action against fraudsters who pose as political action committees (PACs) to cheat Americans." "Americans who want to participate in our political process should be protected from con artists trying to take advantage of them," Rep. Porter, a longtime consumer protection advocate said in a press release. "I’m proud to work across the aisle on this legislation that will protect Americans, regardless of party or ideology, from being cheated." Sadly, as The New York Times reported in a heartbreaking story in 2021, these types of unscrupulous political fundraising schemes often victimize senior citizens and veterans. As Cyrus Kohn, a former top digital staffer for the Republican National Committee bluntly put it, "you leverage data, technology, emotion and digital tactics to take advantage of a population." **[Add your name to the petition calling on Congress to pass the Stop Scam PACs Act to protect seniors, veterans and all Americans from shady and unethical scam PAC operators.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4dc10db6-2f82-4943-a523-4e6b9c2872d0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6978451a-7696-4d3a-b595-51107cb12794/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: PENDING: I want to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
I want to hear from you. What are the top issues you want to see addressed in the Senate? | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61475995:s0olsIDNq:m:1:877327319:67724F34F227EFE83BF1F398052B03E5:r)
---
Fellow American -

A lesson I learned early from my parents was to ask the right questions and listen.

My parents ran our family-owned restaurant, liquor store, and pool hall, where they would listen to our customers talk about all kinds of issues.

>From watching my parents interact with customers, I learned early on that listening is just as important as asking the right questions.

**That's why I want to hear from you, Fellow American. If we are going to move our nation in the right direction, it's important for me to take a moment to listen to what YOU think are the most important issues in 2023.**

| [** 2023 Issues Survey
Begin Now -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61475995:s0olsIDNq:m:1:877327319:67724F34F227EFE83BF1F398052B03E5:r)
---

I sincerely hope that you'll take just a few minutes right now to complete this important survey.

There's a lot happening in our nation. We have a crisis at our southern border, the cost of goods continue to soar, and we're still dealing with the lasting effects of the COVID-19 pandemic.

**[Your feedback will help me make informed decisions as a U.S. Senator, so please let me know what you think.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61475995:s0olsIDNq:m:1:877327319:67724F34F227EFE83BF1F398052B03E5:r)**

In 2022, we hoped to Reclaim the Majority in the U.S. Senate, but we fell short.

Here's the good news, Fellow American - **Republicans have a narrow majority in the House of Representatives, and the 2024 election map is favorable to Republicans in the Senate. Democrat senators like Joe Manchin and Jon Tester will have to overcome Joe Biden's double-digit deficits from 2020.**

We can win next year - but we need a winning message TODAY.

Fellow American, I am counting on you to help craft our winning message. **[Please start Team Graham's 2023 Issues Survey NOW:](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61475995:s0olsIDNq:m:1:877327319:67724F34F227EFE83BF1F398052B03E5:r)**

[** BEGIN SURVEY NOW -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61475995:s0olsIDNq:m:1:877327319:67724F34F227EFE83BF1F398052B03E5:r)
---

Thanks,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61475995:s0olsIDNq:m:1:877327319:67724F34F227EFE83BF1F398052B03E5:r)

Lindsey Graham

P.S. As a United States Senator, it's my job to listen. Once I hear the feedback, I can integrate those ideas to find solutions to our nation's toughest problems. **[Please complete our 2023 Issues Survey, and after- I hope you will also include a personal contribution of $10 or more to help us RECLAIM THE MAJORITY in 2024!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61475995:s0olsIDNq:m:1:877327319:67724F34F227EFE83BF1F398052B03E5:r)**

[** BEGIN SURVEY NOW -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61475995:s0olsIDNq:m:1:877327319:67724F34F227EFE83BF1F398052B03E5:r)
---

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61475996:s0olsIDNq:m:1:877327319:67724F34F227EFE83BF1F398052B03E5:r)
For text updates from Team Graham, **[click this link to subscribe!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61475996:s0olsIDNq:m:1:877327319:67724F34F227EFE83BF1F398052B03E5:r)**
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61475997:s0olsIDNq:m:1:877327319:67724F34F227EFE83BF1F398052B03E5:r)
In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges.

| [** Support Senator Graham! **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61475997:s0olsIDNq:m:1:877327319:67724F34F227EFE83BF1F398052B03E5:r)

name: Breaking News via [AOTL]
subject: This isn’t good, team
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
North Carolina’s Supreme Court showed their extremist views
|
---

Team -- North Carolina Supreme Court decisions in _Harper v. Hall_ in 2022 were monumental in our fight against gerrymandering and for protecting North Carolinians’ ability to exercise their right to be heard.
But last week, newly sworn-in justices on North Carolina’s Supreme Court showed their extremist views by agreeing to reconsider the _Harper v. Hall_ ruling that struck down the legislature’s gerrymandered state senate map.
[**‘’This is not a function of legal principle -- it is an indication of political opportunism.’’**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58446883/391121726/2105777232?refcode=20230208_AOTL_F_NCRR_RedLiteXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE4MmY2YzMxLWQ2YTctZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZUpvgoNdKNlVzIYbLbfooirFYEHkAD7EeIk0GCtaagI=)
**\-- A.G. Eric Holder**
| [**HELP US ADVOCATE FOR FAIR MAPS**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58446884/391121727/2105777232?refcode=20230208_AOTL_F_NCRR_RedLiteXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE4MmY2YzMxLWQ2YTctZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZUpvgoNdKNlVzIYbLbfooirFYEHkAD7EeIk0GCtaagI=)
---
Our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation (NRF), has been in North Carolina fighting gerrymandered maps for the past five years. And amidst this attempt to politicize the state’s judicial branch, the NRF remains steadfast in its support of the plaintiffs in _Harper v. Hall_ , who are standing tall against gerrymandering.
_**So, what’s changed?**_

[**Let’s be clear. Nothing in state law has changed.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58446885/391121728/2105777232?refcode=20230208_AOTL_F_NCRR_RedLiteXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE4MmY2YzMxLWQ2YTctZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZUpvgoNdKNlVzIYbLbfooirFYEHkAD7EeIk0GCtaagI=) But Republican legislative leadership filed their petition to **_undermine the state’s system of checks and balances_** , under their belief that new justices on the state supreme court would side with them simply because they have the same party affiliation.
We can’t stress enough that the fair maps movement is about putting people over politics. And we won’t stand for lawmakers continuing to damage our democratic infrastructure that safeguards people’s rights.
We need your help. All On The Line is committed to advocating for fair maps in North Carolina and across the county. **[Will you make a donation to support our fight to end gerrymandering?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58446886/391121729/2105777232?refcode=20230208_AOTL_F_NCRR_RedLiteXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE4MmY2YzMxLWQ2YTctZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZUpvgoNdKNlVzIYbLbfooirFYEHkAD7EeIk0GCtaagI=)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: North Carolina’s Supreme Court showed their extremist views | Team -- North Carolina Supreme Court decisions in Harper v. Hall in 2022 were monumental in our fight against gerrymandering and for protecting North Carolinians’ ability to exercise their right to be heard. But last week, newly sworn-in justices on North Carolina’s Supreme Court showed their extremist views by agreeing to reconsider the Harper v. Hall ruling that struck down the legislature’s gerrymandered state senate map. = \-- A.G. Eric Holder | = Our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation (NRF), has been in North Carolina fighting gerrymandered maps for the past five years. And amidst this attempt to politicize the state’s judicial branch, the NRF remains steadfast in its support of the plaintiffs in Harper v. Hall , who are standing tall against gerrymandering. So, what’s changed? = But Republican legislative leadership filed their petition to undermine the state’s system of checks and balances , under their belief that new justices on the state supreme court would side with them simply because they have the same party affiliation. We can’t stress enough that the fair maps movement is about putting people over politics. And we won’t stand for lawmakers continuing to damage our democratic infrastructure that safeguards people’s rights. We need your help. All On The Line is committed to advocating for fair maps in North Carolina and across the county. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Your donation helps All On The Line’s work to stop these anti-democratic threats pushed by extremist lawmakers for political opportunity. \-- All On The Line All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. name: Aadland For Colorado
subject: Make Caucuses Great Again
body:
From Erik Aadland
| | | |
---
---
|
# Make Our Republican Caucuses Great Again
---
|
---
| | |
---|---
|
------Since being enacted through law in 1910, caucuses have been one of the prime bedrocks of Colorado politics. When done well, caucuses serve as an energizing political influence, a rallying point for bringing like-minded people together to exchange ideas, to discuss what is important to them, and to determine which candidates should move forward onto each party's primary ballot. For candidates without significant funds, this is the grassroots process for making the ballot, and it involves tremendous blood, sweat and tears; trust me, I know having made the Congressional District 7 ballot through the caucus process. I am also a Precinct Committee Person (PCP).
------Unfortunately, participation in the Republican caucus in the past several election cycles has dwindled to a point where many precincts across the state have little to no membership, leaving many counties under-represented at State GOP assemblies. When the caucuses have low participation, candidates selected for the primary ballot may not fully represent the ideals of the registered voters for a particular party. Furthermore, when precincts are unfilled, counties lose precious access to would-be volunteers, miss significant opportunities to garner support for candidates, and overall voter turnout is harmed statewide.
This isn't good for Republicans and winning elections; we must turn this around quickly and Make our Republican Caucuses Great Again.
---
# Here is the way forward:
---
## 1) We must attract participation to the caucuses.
---
| |
---|---
|
This begins with clear communication (advertising) regarding dates, times and locations in every county, well in advance of the caucus. We should also make our caucuses festive and fun to attend, especially to attract younger voters. Cash bar anyone? Caucuses are a phenomenal way to meet like-minded people who share similar values.
| |
---
---
|
## 2) We must educate Republicans on the purpose, value, and importance of the caucus system.
---
| | |
---|---
|
We must have persistent outreach to convince Republicans that their time is well-spent being involved in the caucus, or in assuming a leadership role in their county's caucus process. We must educate voters about the critical role caucuses play in selecting candidates.
|
---
## 3) We must train county leaders, district captains, precinct committee people and volunteers on how to execute a well-run caucus.
---
| |
---|---
|
The official Republican Party of Colorado must help county leadership succeed by arming them with training, voter data, and the funds to run an exciting, well-attended caucus. This should include virtual and in-person training.
| |
---
## 4) We must fund the caucus process in every county
---
| |
---|---
|
For counties to successfully run their caucus, they must have the appropriate funds to do so; funding will go towards advertising, recruiting, and training. The state party must assist counties' fundraising efforts.
|
---
------Currently, there are many advocates for discarding the caucus system altogether. One argument is the significant time, energy, and effort to run the caucus does not have an equivalent dividend. Another is that ballot access should be more streamlined to reduce the strain on candidates seeking access to the ballot. A third, and perhaps the most compelling argument, is the currently low participation of voters in the caucus. We face a crossroads where there are advocates for removing the process altogether.
---
------For the caucus to endure, and to aid Republicans in winning elections, we must make the caucus successful, ensuring it is efficient, funded, well-attended, and a means of positively promoting conservative values.
---
------What I propose is that we make our caucuses great again, revitalizing the process in a way that inspires Republicans, restores fun to the process, increases voter turnout, selects the best, most winnable candidates and serves as a way of compelling our party to victory.
------It can be done, should be done, and as the next Chairman of the Colorado GOP, I will see it done.
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
---
| | [Send Erik your feedback](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nP9cvaZwbkhqk5oY5y_oJ9DbBoBFPjupyykkald6GXlb2VpwfdYaApv7jq6Sxrtck_UvSvIEt0ragRqnGqY4NjQa8q7OFRAdAyaoMDn60AnWSzo54QMxKDoZEMsV3MRDgOaqWMXL3Zom1fabWRJ2yzn96Uy93pdDNsV1J1nX0CT6CieTLZ_9el3ObASn-vj6_P5Obt1X9xU=&c=UVFVPhYyjwj6ggrUGPASwnjv7YGWOeFWi3r_1ch_D8dKRWHaM-8v9A==&ch=TGTtl0lYYoQaUjnYxgQUo-Gujdk2lxS4SzOl3FKeP-ys_HG9dObeAg==)
---
|
---
---
|
## About Erik
---
| |
---
| Jefferson County resident Erik Aadland is a former Congressional Candidate (CO-7), West Point graduate and a twice-decorated Bronze Star veteran--one for valor--from his time in Iraq and Afghanistan. Concluding his army career in 2011 as a Captain, he pursued a career in the oil and natural gas industry with his work culminating as a project manager directing the onshore construction of the Leviathan Project in Dor, Israel. This project resulted in Israel being energy-independent and a net exporter of natural gas. Erik holds a master's degree in the field of psychology. He is a devoted husband and proud father of three children.
---
---
|
---
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nP9cvaZwbkhqk5oY5y_oJ9DbBoBFPjupyykkald6GXlb2VpwfdYaApHJn8i4rDbXYYHBINMfwSBFxcznKuG8GRzmwPAWNvohrdjFHgVZIo0smETbCROiCMzgJGEAUQfju8wgydsSsmP4FZ_0sZUGyF6cwwfR5lfriyx8KdPq89CVSA6WCplmNZYrFD9DUi5JachHMElNfHg=&c=UVFVPhYyjwj6ggrUGPASwnjv7YGWOeFWi3r_1ch_D8dKRWHaM-8v9A==&ch=TGTtl0lYYoQaUjnYxgQUo-Gujdk2lxS4SzOl3FKeP-ys_HG9dObeAg==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nP9cvaZwbkhqk5oY5y_oJ9DbBoBFPjupyykkald6GXlb2VpwfdYaAowrhN5pENALdYkRrpQFTfkyDQoJ10EzCCxmiXsjRe-n7CYuR05nSHD_RCgQbSI-IP3iJoUPT8nclk8m2Gch7s0sp07IqNWnD00zghtHCeHv1cN0qLDR0emaEyBSZd5PAg==&c=UVFVPhYyjwj6ggrUGPASwnjv7YGWOeFWi3r_1ch_D8dKRWHaM-8v9A==&ch=TGTtl0lYYoQaUjnYxgQUo-Gujdk2lxS4SzOl3FKeP-ys_HG9dObeAg==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nP9cvaZwbkhqk5oY5y_oJ9DbBoBFPjupyykkald6GXlb2VpwfdYaApHJn8i4rDbXhqN1GDuaYZtpuUvKisEmy8uOyoMD5rmM-J7mS_IqKll7UsSPxuJmOYpMqLdPO7nDLzx-KB3tQ0LaH_AJt8S8k2Ixge2xF_rq&c=UVFVPhYyjwj6ggrUGPASwnjv7YGWOeFWi3r_1ch_D8dKRWHaM-8v9A==&ch=TGTtl0lYYoQaUjnYxgQUo-Gujdk2lxS4SzOl3FKeP-ys_HG9dObeAg==)

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zm5s12jokjsicj7j36dm5q7mub5ji6588822ike0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3jm1p32cth2bs) | #### [ DeSantis Touts Republican Edge Over Democrats In Florida: 'Freedom Is Here To Stay' Florida Governor Ron DeSantis proudly shared that Republicans have made more history in his state, as registered Republicans now outnumber Democrats by 400,000 voters. A red wave has washed over the sunshine state in recent years, shifting the political demography and thrusting its tenacious governor into the spotlight. “In 2018, Democrats outnumbered Republicans by nearly [...] READ MORE](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zk7875qv2n5s2hdmnc5ag3lc9gku3poaseoflikg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3jm1p32cth2bs)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Commissioner=20Kent=20Leonhardt?=
subject: Commissioner Kent Leonhardt Releases Statement on Political Future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kent for WV
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1bca3e8315d8/commissioner-kent-leonhardt-releases-statement-on-political-future?e=2e56df4f78)
---
| |
---
| |
# **FAIRVIEW, W.Va. -** Commissioner of Agriculture Kent Leonhardt released the following statement regarding his plans for the 2024 election:
“When I first began my political career, I vowed to always do what was right for West Virginia and the citizens of our State. Right now, that includes continuing to advocate for West Virginia agriculture in order to tackle rising food prices, looming shortages, and our mission to create more resilient agricultural systems. With the war in Ukraine, increasing energy prices, supply chain issues and attacks by foreign agents, securing our agricultural industries is now more important than ever.”

“When I originally ran in 2012, it was to make West Virginia a better place to live, raise a family and start a business. After my victories in 2014, 2016 and 2020, I believe we have implemented policies to take our State down that path. If we are going to continue these initiatives and given so many of my colleagues have aspirations to advance their own political careers, keeping experience on the Board of Public Works will be vital. Therefore, I will be staying in my current position and running for re-election. I began my political career running for Commissioner of Agriculture and that is where I will finish it.”

"My team and our supporters may be disappointed, that I did not throw my hat into the race for Governor, but I want to assure them I will not be sitting idly by in that decision. As I seek re-election, I will also be throwing my support behind those who have the best interests of the State, as well as agriculture. Candidate quality and integrity matters and it is essential the leaders of our state voice their opinions in the upcoming 2024 primary and general elections."

Kent Leonhardt was first elected in 2014 to the West Virginia State Senate representing the Second Senatorial District. In 2016, he was elected as the West Virginia Commissioner of Agriculture and then reelected in 2020. Before running for office, Kent served in the United States Marine Corps for 20 years and retired at the rank of Lieutenant Colonel in 1996. During that time, he served on multiple joint service assignments leading men and women in war and peace. Throughout his service, Kent received a variety of decorations including the Legion of Merit, Combat Action Ribbon and eight other personal decorations.

Kent received his formal education at the University of Missouri, earning a Bachelor's Degree in Wildlife Management. Kent furthered his education by earning a Master’s in Business Management from Central Michigan University. Kent and his wife, Shirley, live on a farm near Blacksville, W.Va. Together, they have three sons, six grandchildren. Kent is a member of the Monongalia County Farm Bureau, past president of the Southern Association of State Departments of Agriculture, President of the Agriculture and Forestry Hall of Fame, and on the board of Directors for Operation Welcome Home. He is a life member of both the Marine Corps League, and The American Legion.

**During his State of the Union Address, Biden promised A LOT. He _spouted meaningless platitudes of compassion while forgetting to mention the many ways his administration is making life unbearable for millions of Americans._**
However, Biden **FAILED** to mention the consequences of his **[**EMPTY**](http://links.houseconservatives.org/u/click?_t=a828c22267f2452d9c778060a3aea04e&_m=d62a4197a0404eadb60afdda1bb7403a&_e=MOs4t1ORbKLlj-PBHczgjn-vMZhzucRGVgK9sZW71rkpXEZtRaEO0lgoXjHq2QVdUQ1LJ7pli1oOvb6LRYaioGZ8fvAQbiwcWj2CVix28wNNZIZJmtFs1ggNOsLePcbYStGWXVDwoO5Sg8GPL6U2l2dShFE2uTyzZ0WMjLAtNEjyiJMtgIb9z_PhwTm3MB3s0G3xtHvXrwRHTO6jzP98aVqfiPbHCarBP1O3Q6OgEEqw2hhh0qUUJjx4Mcu6IOmvB-cQ35cQo0jsn9jlIomNwSGjnbJo_XqtgcaWyDhjZ2XhxMR6qGLmJUWy6rxV5vqZzoRsexkUvUA6YtxcBvBg6z8giUCHCVkyCxldwvls-fmPZ-7OFkMKCxN0dpheQALw1STN_z3Ku03XMqMzC33wcHR3Nw8grxXJepHd3HDqNxWOJHtA5ZgOS4hpWUNif6vrI19edSENFjnF0PQZcE77kSgtLkc2r1dw8JseIWt8--8ZPHjEjfvYUoF1afRJd1Nc)** promises and he **IGNORED** the problems millions of Americans are facing! **_I'm here to tell you that none of the policies he bragged about would benefit our country. The State of our Union is at an all-time low._**

[ **CHIP IN $10 IMMEDIATELY »** ](http://links.houseconservatives.org/u/click?_t=a828c22267f2452d9c778060a3aea04e&_m=d62a4197a0404eadb60afdda1bb7403a&_e=MOs4t1ORbKLlj-PBHczgjn-vMZhzucRGVgK9sZW71rkpXEZtRaEO0lgoXjHq2QVdUQ1LJ7pli1oOvb6LRYaioDsGmSjlGUo796ChozFJUFbvXw27OVZwEbv7C6HjGEHZXufXvg0Fig5Ct_qiSZg9DIPBdWqqAOxXq1Ww0iEjQQP3WZomKKGzzf5AAL-bjAkLXBQyDIyTnfL2Jf6O3mxamFiI-1Wc_AJyYRviA3NldOwSVeUU-4E1tpLZxgdNTzwAUhErKfLD1HprXM4w9xs1pCZU2Ij7qMS0L_yIWwMKJnN0_vwqm54wNdwRztn0mmGTJ7Z53f_NIhe1Rb0dBsEaOrgirf4ljCPAl8IQI9X7PdfW6qLBxAgMkvS39VzwsVAYvuIK5xwJiPaV3_mjgoz8fFgS1G9m2vapbIsxk2AcWawq6CXS74oDgV327wEufUI9_gv9RB_L68raI-kb-JevdH_VZ4kJiFHWqCtcb4vjxXILpXrkv2u9FFwVe0yIZCOm)
---

**__The Woke Biden Agenda directly attacks our core values as a nation. It seeks to tear us apart and push us further down the path of socialism. It's an agenda that will pit us against each other and erase the American values that made our country great.__**
That's why I'm speaking out and standing up for what I believe in. But I need YOUR help, Friend. **[Will you chip in _today_ and help me stand against the Woke Biden Agenda?](http://links.houseconservatives.org/u/click?_t=a828c22267f2452d9c778060a3aea04e&_m=d62a4197a0404eadb60afdda1bb7403a&_e=MOs4t1ORbKLlj-PBHczgjn-vMZhzucRGVgK9sZW71rkpXEZtRaEO0lgoXjHq2QVdUQ1LJ7pli1oOvb6LRYaioGZ8fvAQbiwcWj2CVix28wNNZIZJmtFs1ggNOsLePcbYStGWXVDwoO5Sg8GPL6U2l2dShFE2uTyzZ0WMjLAtNEjyiJMtgIb9z_PhwTm3MB3s0G3xtHvXrwRHTO6jzP98aVqfiPbHCarBP1O3Q6OgEEqw2hhh0qUUJjx4Mcu6IOmvB-cQ35cQo0jsn9jlIomNwSGjnbJo_XqtgcaWyDhjZ2XhxMR6qGLmJUWy6rxV5vqZzoRsexkUvUA6YtxcBvBg6z8giUCHCVkyCxldwvls-fkH2xN41Oed7cnfZlGDLSmUuU0TWFkKgdTMrJ7ywY6QJEXQCSCYmkRL9JLwYRh002NZdCWGl8h0PSmKS2syOSbI-SWokBHZp-9kgrGaZYieF8OQyvWtKNSKYpjxoH7T3pI-dBRJf8gBOAhAraMadWDw)**

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Joe Biden Brought Fire Last Night 🔥??, in the single greatest State of the Union speech I have ever seen. And I am not as young as I'd like to be :)
body:
He fought with the crowd and won
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf099dedf-227d-46f9-b2b1-7af3c2ae700f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Joe Biden Brought Fire Last Night 🔥🔥, in the single greatest State of the Union speech I have ever seen. And I am not as young as I'd like to be :)** _On the priorities & policies we care about, President Biden was unbelievable. To the commentariat in mainstream media--who care only for performance, often to our great detriment--he was unparalleled. To the whining, slithering snakes of the GOP, he was unbowed._ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2db59a16-9d01-4c81-b0bc-8bb54e776f81/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**President Biden rightfully bragged about the 500,000+ jobs he created in January, lowest unemployment since before we walked on the Moon. He called for a national abortion rights guarantee for a ban on all assault weapons. But it's how he did it that was even better.**_
---

We fight for these values every day. Friend, two quick things...
1. More than 250 supporters accepted Governor Hogan's challenge, and we surpassed our goal to prove that this movement is growing and serious.

2. Now that the 2023 State of the Union speech has concluded, we are curious if you thought Biden struck the right tone for the challenging and divisive times we are experiencing as a country.

Please give us a quick [_**thumbs up (👍)**_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=d0c157a0c90e49789230b8f9201590a1&_e=no_G4VdcoYUhltzx3QXSqDt5Vs9lHFJ4EO2vHWj5AvRXox8lkyhyhTyrKWlmK5N3goPlS_Qxj6lOJNzfca1Ygl6p_TQ_Dq5a3TocJs5jdF8gqUWJZQ4IKpsSbc4uc1jCRxKdbFCLgJYv7MhNQ9FXg5HjrArkvWdLDn8nvRZ1aurZ__Lv68gTEo-dYVvwjLYa9m-6m0QhKN6HP0_4LkfyZrdK46R1nnMFdEGY8B_HyBjGGnBj80ctjCuBXZMwfvyX) or a [**_thumbs down (👎)_**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=d0c157a0c90e49789230b8f9201590a1&_e=no_G4VdcoYUhltzx3QXSqDt5Vs9lHFJ4EO2vHWj5AvRXox8lkyhyhTyrKWlmK5N3goPlS_Qxj6lOJNzfca1Ygl6p_TQ_Dq5a3TocJs5jdF-Qqs6qekMy3I_IBbF8Zm7b8lkhpqIExrx22vpiXYbjhg6C0nRDSoSS737cVmiqN_9PzBXNvDNONk8uSW1U5uMDeYqHHIhSDrfnfI7T6Far2jV3dUgdUKMdh1vVDeQAppX1KcY0_iUU9L8g-NpDKu-L) to the president's speech:

name: Adam Frisch
subject: Should I run against Lauren Boebert again?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado
body:
It’s true. I am considering running against Lauren Boebert again in 2024...
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58430720/391063857/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzgzMjdlMC1iOGE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I35ptYcMKYlqpYkZyVp77hTt7aGhz83eP0PGbpjFDB0=&emci=d652657e-3aa7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=9c8327e0-b8a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58430738/391063885/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzgzMjdlMC1iOGE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I35ptYcMKYlqpYkZyVp77hTt7aGhz83eP0PGbpjFDB0=&emci=d652657e-3aa7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=9c8327e0-b8a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
I want to start this email by saying two simple words that not enough politicians say: Thank you.
When I decided to run against Lauren Boebert last year, I thought we’d have a good chance of winning.
I knew if we made it through the primary, ran the right campaign, and worked hard, we could beat Boebert in 2022. After all, she had only won by 5 percent in 2020.
Very few people believed we could actually win. All of the national pundits said it was a “Safe Republican” seat. But you and I... We proved them wrong.
On Election Night, the talking heads on cable news couldn’t believe the results coming in. **The race went to a recount, and ultimately, after all the ballots were counted, we came up just 546 votes short.__It was the closest race in the entire country.__**
Lots of people have asked me how we got so close. And sure, I think it has a lot to do with how fed up voters are with Lauren Boebert caring more about herself than about the district. But we also put in the work.
My family and I drove 24,000 miles in my red pickup truck to every corner of the district. We showed up, met people where they were, and spent time _listening_ to everyone – something Rep. Boebert might consider actually doing herself from time to time.
And then, there was you. People like you volunteered, donated, made phone calls, sent postcards, knocked on doors... Our campaign was truly grassroots-powered. We couldn’t have done it without you.
**So yes, it’s true. I am considering running against Lauren Boebert again in 2024.** It’s not going to be easy. Her Super PACs are going to spend millions saying the nastiest things they can dream up about me on TV. That’ll be hard for my family and me – especially my two children.
But Lauren Boebert continues to be everything that’s wrong with Congress right now.
I want to hear your thoughts: **Reply directly to this email, and let me know what you think. Would you be all-in to do this with me if I run again?**
I’m eternally grateful for everything you did to support our team during the last campaign. It’d mean a lot to hear from you.
With gratitude -
Adam

clean_body: It’s true. I am considering running against Lauren Boebert again in 2024... Hello, I want to start this email by saying two simple words that not enough politicians say: Thank you. When I decided to run against Lauren Boebert last year, I thought we’d have a good chance of winning. I knew if we made it through the primary, ran the right campaign, and worked hard, we could beat Boebert in 2022. After all, she had only won by 5 percent in 2020. Very few people believed we could actually win. All of the national pundits said it was a “Safe Republican” seat. But you and I... We proved them wrong. On Election Night, the talking heads on cable news couldn’t believe the results coming in. The race went to a recount, and ultimately, after all the ballots were counted, we came up just 546 votes short.It was the closest race in the entire country. Lots of people have asked me how we got so close. And sure, I think it has a lot to do with how fed up voters are with Lauren Boebert caring more about herself than about the district. But we also put in the work. My family and I drove 24,000 miles in my red pickup truck to every corner of the district. We showed up, met people where they were, and spent time listening to everyone – something Rep. Boebert might consider actually doing herself from time to time. And then, there was you. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: I’m running for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter,

I wanted you to hear it directly from me: I’m going to be challenging
Kyrsten Sinema and running for the United States Senate in Arizona.

If that’s all you need to hear, I am asking you to become a Founding Donor
to our historic campaign. The amount of the donation is not nearly as
important as the number of people contributing today. Use this link to
split a donation between my campaign and Charles Booker:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18881?t=1001&akid=2963%2E346206%2EjA4akU ]secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-rg

CHIP IN →

Here is the truth:

The rich and the powerful don’t need more advocates in the Senate. It’s
the people deciding between groceries and utilities who need help.

For too long, Senator Sinema has used her position of power to help those
who already have it all. She has stood in the way of raising the minimum
wage, protecting voting rights, lowering the cost of prescription drugs,
and more.

Now, we can argue about different ways to do the job as a United States
Senator, but at the core of it all, if you are more likely to be meeting
and helping the powerful than the powerless, you are doing this job wrong.

I am sorry that politicians like Senator Sinema have let you down.

I am going to change that.

But in order to win this race against Senator Sinema and whoever the
Republicans nominate, it’s going to take a historic grassroots effort.
From day one.

And that is why I am asking:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18881?t=1002&akid=2963%2E346206%2EjA4akU ]Can you please split a $20 contribution between my campaign and Charles
Booker to become a Founding Donor to my campaign for U.S. Senate today? It
all adds up when we’re all chipping in, and that’s how we’ll win this
race. Together.

Thank you,

Ruben Gallego

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230208-2963-footer&t=1003&refcode2=2963_346206_jA4akU&akid=2963%2E346206%2EjA4akU

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2963%2E346206%2EjA4akU

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

Friend, it's Senator Tim Scott. I've been trying to get a hold of you all week.

I need you to see this major announcement before 11:59 PM tonight. I've always been able to count on you in the past, so please don't let me down this time.

Access here before midnight tonight:
📎 **[majorannouncement.timscott.doc](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z68omn1f5n4sj9vhc32s90o4s6fvmftng99sokh8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3ge4pb4c1h2bs "majorannouncement.timscott.doc")** 📎

---

Senator Tim Scott here. Serving the people of South Carolina is the most incredible honor of my life, but none of this would be possible without your support.
I made a promise many years ago that I would do everything possible to restore the American Dream and create opportunities for other kids who grew up like I did-in a single-parent home with a mom who worked two jobs just to put food on the table and keep the lights on.

**_Only in our great country can the grandson of a cotton picker grow up to serve in both chambers of Congress. _**
This is just the beginning. **[Can I count on you to join my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z0t6sluh98ka2d47ccsokke1ppocgra4qrp75ufg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3ge4pb4c1h2bs "Can I count on you to join my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?")**

---

Thank you for everything, and God Bless,

Tim Scott

name: CAPT Hung Cao
subject: Not the America I escaped to
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unleash America PAC
body:
When I was four years old, my family and I escaped communist Vietnam because my father was put on an execution list for resistin
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zh3qvka4cqdn4nm1hhre9hfghaav2psijq85o0bg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3geco35c1h2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, When I was four years old, my family and I escaped communist Vietnam because my father was put on an execution list for resisting the communist leaders’ tyranny.

When we made it to America, I didn’t speak a word of English. But I worked hard in school to catch up and went on to graduate from the U.S Naval Academy and serve in combat in Afghanistan, Iraq, and Somalia, fighting to protect the country that saved my life’s freedom from the same kind of tyranny my family and I escaped.

**I’m Captain Hung Cao** – I started a conservative movement in Virginia’s 10th district in 2022, and now, I’m ready to take that movement to the next level.

**[We’re launching a new initiative called Unleash America to help elect TRUE conservative leaders and stand up to the radical Left agenda that restricts our personal freedoms, destroys our economy, and threatens our national security.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3e18lgk0h1kklp7r3o40uttm21hm0pl7dhcahco_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3geco35c1h2bs)**
---
[**JOIN HUNG CAO NOW >>>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zghtr4p301s7vjofq2d3bn226vmj76s6jb4rrhp0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3geco35c1h2bs)
---
Defending America in the U.S. Navy for the past 25 years has been the greatest honor of my life, **but our country is not the same America that my family and I came to years ago.**

The Left is dimming America’s light as the land of promise and opportunity, and its shining beacon of freedom is starting to go out.

Now, our elected officials run from our enemies, fail our men and women in uniform, look the other way when our laws are broken, and ignore the threats unsecured borders bring to our national security and personal safety. They’re making it nearly impossible for new generations to achieve the American dream while forcing woke political correctness on freedom loving Americans.

**_America needs REAL leadership again!_** We need patriots who can restore America to a nation that upholds economic & personal freedom, believes in law & order, supports our troops, and stands up to enemies foreign & domestic.

**[I’m Captain Hung Cao, and I'm working with Unleash America PAC to help bring this exact leadership back to our country. Will you stand with us today?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt1o4en1pumagpo69kdo7isu2ngh9g380mhl2hh8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3geco35c1h2bs)**
---
[**JOIN HUNG CAO NOW >>>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2a4rn77qhssu872adigt0er76424tp0bjn34jp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3geco35c1h2bs)
---
For America,
---
CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret)

body:
Marjorie Taylor Greene interrupted Joe Biden to say...

| | Last night, Marjorie Taylor Greene showed up to the State of the Union in a jacket that can only be described as Cruella de Vil-esque. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58434311/391072484/710125701?refcode=20230208.1_MTG_2AA&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjk0NGMyZC1iY2E3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sDvW0BB1IkOk2Xjx1RoDNZYw082gUyu1uRXlQplFRxo=)
---
And her villainy didn’t stop at what she wore. Instead, Marjorie Taylor Greene _**continuously**_ interrupted President Biden, even having to be *shushed* by Kevin McCarthy!

At one point, Marjorie Taylor Greene shouted out “LIAR!” when Joe Biden stated that Republicans want to cut access to Medicare and Social Security.

**Here’s the deal Peter:_they do._**

GOP Senator Rick Scott came out with a plan for the national GOP Senate campaign wing that would sunset _**ALL**_ federal programs and raise taxes on retirees.

Just last week, former Vice President Mike Pence called for Social Security “reform” – which we all know is GOP code for cuts to Social Security.

**Marjorie Taylor Greene is the liar and an embarrassment to Georgia, Peter.** [**_Will you rush a donation to help us ensure we don’t have to hear more news about the next crazy thing she says or does?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58434312/391072485/710125701?refcode=20230208.1_MTG_2AA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjk0NGMyZC1iY2E3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sDvW0BB1IkOk2Xjx1RoDNZYw082gUyu1uRXlQplFRxo=)

name: Congressman Brendan Boyle
subject: About Last Night...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Citizens for Boyle
body:
Team, last night, President Biden did two things, first he laid out for the American people the good things that our government and Congress have done...| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58434755/391074401/1060786640?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDY2ZWI0Yy1iZmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ezhYqYr0SQHOUSXt7SRIUqlq-GBDy4ItuLMna7GuG8=)
---
| | Friend, last night President Biden did two things. First, he laid out for the American people the good things that our government and Congress have done over the last two years for the people...**
** Pass the largest infrastructure bill in American history... Make the largest investment in combating climate change ever... Take unprecedented steps to make insulin and prescription drugs more affordable for Americans... Ensure millions of businesses and people are supported and protected during the worst periods of a once in a century pandemic. **It's a list we should all be proud of not just as Democrats, but as Americans. President Biden also discussed the next two years.**
---
[STAND WITH US](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58434756/391074402/1060786640?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDY2ZWI0Yy1iZmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ezhYqYr0SQHOUSXt7SRIUqlq-GBDy4ItuLMna7GuG8=)
---
| | **The President didn't mince words. He has a long list of things he wants to get done, but that can only happen if Republicans in Congress, particularly in the House, are willing to put getting things done for the American people ahead of scoring cheap political points.
** **I'm ready to get to work to continue the progress of the last two years for my constituents and the American people. But neither President Biden or I will compromise on our commitment to supporting working families and protecting the rights of every American._
_** I'm ready to work with any and all of my colleagues to Pass the PRO Act, so that every American has to right to form a union to bargain for fair wages for honest work. I'm ready to vote today to make the Child Tax Credit permanent, so we can eradicate child poverty across our nation.
And I'm ready to pass many other pieces of important legislation, including the Social Security 2100 Act, to ensure that the wealthiest Americans pay their fair share to keep Social Security and Medicare on solid ground for generations to come.
---
[STAND WITH US](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58434757/391074403/1060786640?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDY2ZWI0Yy1iZmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ezhYqYr0SQHOUSXt7SRIUqlq-GBDy4ItuLMna7GuG8=)
---
_Between now and the end of next year, House Democrats and I are willing to work with our colleagues on the other side of the aisle to get things done._ **_But if Republicans in the House are only willing to use their majority to hold the American people hostage to an extreme agenda, we will first stop that agenda in its tracks, then we will work like hell to take back the majority in 2024 to finish what we've started._**
I'm ready to get to work, and I hope you'll join me. Thanks for standing with us in this fight.
Congressman Brendan Boyle

clean_body: Team, last night, President Biden did two things, first he laid out for the American people the good things that our government and Congress have done...| | | = | | Friend, last night President Biden did two things. First, he laid out for the American people the good things that our government and Congress have done over the last two years for the people... Pass the largest infrastructure bill in American history... Make the largest investment in combating climate change ever... Take unprecedented steps to make insulin and prescription drugs more affordable for Americans... Ensure millions of businesses and people are supported and protected during the worst periods of a once in a century pandemic. It's a list we should all be proud of not just as Democrats, but as Americans. President Biden also discussed the next two years. = | | The President didn't mince words. He has a long list of things he wants to get done, but that can only happen if Republicans in Congress, particularly in the House, are willing to put getting things done for the American people ahead of scoring cheap political points. I'm ready to get to work to continue the progress of the last two years for my constituents and the American people. But neither President Biden or I will compromise on our commitment to supporting working families and protecting the rights of every American. I'm ready to work with any and all of my colleagues to Pass the PRO Act, so that every American has to right to form a union to bargain for fair wages for honest work. I'm ready to vote today to make the Child Tax Credit permanent, so we can eradicate child poverty across our nation. And I'm ready to pass many other pieces of important legislation, including the Social Security 2100 Act, to ensure that the wealthiest Americans pay their fair share to keep Social Security and Medicare on solid ground for generations to come. = Between now and the end of next year, House Democrats and I are willing to work with our colleagues on the other side of the aisle to get things done. But if Republicans in the House are only willing to use their majority to hold the American people hostage to an extreme agenda, we will first stop that agenda in its tracks, then we will work like hell to take back the majority in 2024 to finish what we've started. I'm ready to get to work, and I hope you'll join me. Thanks for standing with us in this fight. Congressman Brendan Boyle | | ---|--- | | Paid for by Citizens for Boyle. Citizens for Boyle P.O. name: NextGen America
subject: President Biden supports the Youth Agenda
body:
State of the Union recap

| | | President Biden renewed his dedication to the issues the youth vote movement is fighting for. Will your members of Congress do the same?
---
| [Take action](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58460052/391144508/1686028639?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjkxYjYyYS1lYmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v_t2eIeJAlIPDjclCbNwJ1mNmAKNPoYXLd73lTxiwqM=&emci=7e14f7ce-29a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=cf91b62a-eba7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172) |
|
Friend,
**Yesterday, President Biden gave his third State of the Union address to the American people.**
President Biden has already made historic progress in delivering on the issues that matter most to us, the generation that will inherit this country. **The message of his speech was clear: The Biden administration is committed to finishing the job. **
**A couple youth vote highlights:**
* We heard about President Biden’s economic plan to grow the economy from the bottom up and middle out, not the top down.
* He doubled down on his promise to champion clean energy, jobs, and infrastructure — furthering the transformative climate investments the administration has already made.
* From gun safety to police reform, he’s prioritizing the fight to keep our communities safe.

clean_body: State of the Union recap | | | President Biden renewed his dedication to the issues the youth vote movement is fighting for. Will your members of Congress do the same? | | | Friend, Yesterday, President Biden gave his third State of the Union address to the American people. President Biden has already made historic progress in delivering on the issues that matter most to us, the generation that will inherit this country. The message of his speech was clear: The Biden administration is committed to finishing the job. A couple youth vote highlights: We heard about President Biden’s economic plan to grow the economy from the bottom up and middle out, not the top down. He doubled down on his promise to champion clean energy, jobs, and infrastructure — furthering the transformative climate investments the administration has already made. From gun safety to police reform, he’s prioritizing the fight to keep our communities safe. . The Youth Agenda is a list of our priorities, hopes, and vision for the future. We’ve set a goal to strive toward that will truly uphold the largest and most diverse generation in American history. Now, all that’s left is to achieve it. "CTA Button" Thank you, NextGen America | NextGen America** 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | =

After two years in office, the Biden-Harris administration has kept its promise to restore democracy after four destructive years of Donald Trump. But that responsibility not only falls on our Democratic leaders in Washington – it’s up to us as well, to fight hard to protect progress by electing state Democrats.
**Your state legislators are doing the work that impacts your day-to-day life. They are passing legislation affecting everything from the roads you drive on to the education your children receive. Now, they are facing nearly a dozen special elections in 2023.**
So we need to be ready if we want to win in every corner of the country and protect the progress we’ve made. That means ensuring President Biden’s vision of building a better future from the bottom up and middle out – and we can start by electing Democrats _up and down_ the ballot!

clean_body: President Joe Biden just delivered his second State of the Union address | | | | | President Joe Biden just delivered his second State of the Union address – unequivocally defending democracy and putting workers, families, and small business at the center of his plan to build back a better America. President Biden’s speech affirmed that Democrats are doing everything they can to restore democracy – from adding a record number of jobs, expanding health care to millions of Americans, and passing major gun safety legislation. But as the Biden-Harris administration works to build back America, MAGA Republicans are doubling down on destroying any progress made. From spewing election fraud conspiracies to introducing extreme abortion bans, Republicans are not giving up.That’s why we need to band together right now and stand behind President Biden and his agenda. ** | Did you approve of President Biden’s State of the Union Address? Yes No Unsure After two years in office, the Biden-Harris administration has kept its promise to restore democracy after four destructive years of Donald Trump. But that responsibility not only falls on our Democratic leaders in Washington – it’s up to us as well, to fight hard to protect progress by electing state Democrats. Your state legislators are doing the work that impacts your day-to-day life. They are passing legislation affecting everything from the roads you drive on to the education your children receive. Now, they are facing nearly a dozen special elections in 2023. So we need to be ready if we want to win in every corner of the country and protect the progress we’ve made. That means ensuring President Biden’s vision of building a better future from the bottom up and middle out – and we can start by electing Democrats up and down the ballot! We can’t wait to hear from you! Team DLCC ** | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. I just released my fifth executive budget recommendation that will lower costs, grow Michigan’s economy, and build a brighter future for anyone who wants to call Michigan home.

My budget includes investments to put money back in people’s pockets, help students thrive in school, put more people on paths to higher education and good-paying jobs, rebuild our infrastructure, keep our communities safe, and improve public health.

**_We’re making Michigan a place where everyone can succeed._**

We can get this and so much more done now and in the future if we keep investing in competitive races to strengthen and expand our majorities in the State House and Senate. **But let me be clear: the majorities in the legislature are narrow — too narrow for comfort.**

**[That’s why I need you to pitch in to help expand the majority so we can guarantee action on the issues we all care about. Can I count on you to pitch in $5, $10, $50, or whatever you can to help us keep moving Michigan Peter, last night, President Biden made it clear that no amount of disinformation and attacks from the GOP will stop him from making progress.
Thanks to our President’s bold leadership, our unemployment numbers are at a 53-year low, job numbers are exceeding expectations (including 100,000 Green Jobs), wages are rising, and inflation is cooling down.
**President Biden spent his first two years in office working with Democrats to build America back — from making unprecedented investments to fight climate change and our infrastructure to taking steps to keep the American people safe from gun violence. And protecting same-sex marriage.**
But there’s still much left to be done.
And, Peter, we want to know your thoughts. Unite the Country is counting on grassroots supporters to answer our official State of the Union Poll before midnight. Don’t miss your chance to lock in your response!
**Do you approve of President Biden’s State of the Union address?**

body:

| |

| | | Biden just spent an hour LYING to you and working class patriots everywhere about the state of our nation.
* The Chinese are brazenly flying spy balloons over our country
* The border remains open and the wall remains unfinished.
* Illegal border crossings are at an all time high and Fentanyl is pouring into our country by the metric ton.
* Inflation is skyrocketing and people are struggling to feed their families.

Having sat three feet away as Biden spouted his lies, I am more motivated than ever to STOP Biden's agenda and I'm not waiting a minute longer to start and neither should you.

Right now, the liberal media is spinning this speech as a major success for Joe and the Democrats and they will raise MILLIONS so they can continue running this country into the ground.

As Speaker of the House, I am standing against Joe Biden and the Democrats but I can't do this alone. If Biden's speech sickened you like it sickened me, I need you stand with me to save our great nation.

name: VADEMS
subject: The Good and the bad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
GOP Rep. Bob Good makes a disgrace of himself at the SOTU

|
---
Derek, Last night at the State of the Union, President Biden delivered a world-class address, speaking directly to the concerns facing so many American families. Meanwhile, GOP Rep. Bob Good delivered a performance that left us wondering: _didn’t his mama teach him better manners?_ One of Virginia’s own far-right congressmen, Bob Good, heckled the president midway through his speech, shouting “LIAR.” **Folks, I don’t know about you, but I was raised to show a little respect and decency when representing my neighbors.** That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Peter,

Derek- Last night, we heard from President Biden on the state of our union and he rated it as strong. He talked about how he wouldn't let Republicans gut social security and medicare, how we have accomplished so much for infrastructure, and most importantly,**how he would veto any national abortion ban that gets sent to his desk.** We felt immense pride for our party, our nation, and our President last night when we heard all that we have accomplished. From defending voting rights, to reducing the price of prescription drug costs, and building an economy that works for everyone, Democrats have and will continue to deliver on all the promises that we have made. **But we want to know what you thought:** _**We haven't heard from you yet and we want to hear your answer!**_ **DO YOU SUPPORT PRESIDENT JOE BIDEN?**

clean_body: We're collecting vital data for our outreach efforts | | Derek- Last night, we heard from President Biden on the state of our union and he rated it as strong. He talked about how he wouldn't let Republicans gut social security and medicare, how we have accomplished so much for infrastructure, and most importantly,how he would veto any national abortion ban that gets sent to his desk. We felt immense pride for our party, our nation, and our President last night when we heard all that we have accomplished. From defending voting rights, to reducing the price of prescription drug costs, and building an economy that works for everyone, Democrats have and will continue to deliver on all the promises that we have made. But we want to know what you thought: We haven't heard from you yet and we want to hear your answer! DO YOU SUPPORT PRESIDENT JOE BIDEN? Missing Response from Derek | Deadline Midnight | We at the Young Democrats value your opinion and we want to know what motivates you. We know that we all can do more to improve our political parties and we are working hard to have young voices and the voices of the people be heard. Right now, reproductive rights, environmental justice, and our democracy are all on the line in this election. That's why it's incredibly important for us all to fight back and make sure we are pushing the right messages. | The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. To help us mobilize the next generation of Democrats, | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Sent via . body:
| | | Peter,
---
I just got off the air on Fox News to warn the American people about the dangers of the Chinese Communist Party in the wake of Chinese spy balloons flying over America.
---
[](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=0e26553a29684d9dac2b74b15495f2eb&_e=pEato1fHGdCGfnUiVOT-MgPHiiL8ShozaTowkCEa2AV3cu4DbQuNwk00j9hThHF8bQrK5qTXVnM0nPrJZpd3bezKoOO5UYOarWLrMpavK7wxaKG-hdD-JJQwFz-X4J7NccoiARrtWt-_I6Gq8Bj-8UmKCRQjccvjq6rOQOnX452WBzVdPlTiGzq-Jy5fKM3rdU5t2-5a3iTrbUHJp45UjX2cameGfzSjntK7LJk70zgfbgfgQZRwNyXHi4NLxc3QM7yoFLKEYBCndEcq430eT7EpfyiWD7qgdj5RcgjfzwYtdla2CXDoUoWiXF1uuSI3knB8sWPqhAyz0ybuOKBMQA%3D%3D)

Peter, we are facing a TSUNAMI of Chinese espionage.

From Confucius Institutes in higher education to TikTok and cyber attacks, the CCP has an eye on our most sensitive intelligence data - and on YOU.

The Chinese Spy balloon is just the beginning. We are in a Cold War with the Chinese Communist Party - and this is even more dangerous than any Cold War of the past.

[**Join me today to TAKE ON the CCP and DEMAND the White House takes action to keep the American people safe from Chinese spying.**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=0e26553a29684d9dac2b74b15495f2eb&_e=pEato1fHGdCGfnUiVOT-MgPHiiL8ShozaTowkCEa2AV3cu4DbQuNwk00j9hThHF8bQrK5qTXVnM0nPrJZpd3bezKoOO5UYOarWLrMpavK7wxaKG-hdD-JJQwFz-X4J7NccoiARrtWt-_I6Gq8Bj-8UmKCRQjccvjq6rOQOnX453c2WjQ-5HlBeJZj8g4Ujvf_BKIYZ8s-G5VD1gaPFJFZ-PoLsy2yaeI2AOA7MZFtI7qqkq1QW91WhunLqvTmKROPNKC3Q_-1YjdSXRQILyK5BNmu-KBDhtdhnZ_LtJGwP_EsETPVDbUiRkg9PkzOGc3zokQrnIJ5PCJ_atsW4EbZQ%3D%3D)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tyler=20B.=20Jones?=
subject: Under the Dome - Your Update from the Legislature
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132800?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

**The legislature continues to move at full speed, debating hundreds of bills in both chambers.** Tomorrow is the deadline for floor action on general bills that originated in their own house, meaning in order for a bill to stay alive it MUST pass its original chamber floor by tomorrow at 5 p.m.

Here’s your legislative update from MCPP!
---
|
---
|
---
| While the number of active bills continues to dwindle as the session proceeds, several pieces of legislation have piqued our interest.

**GOOD BILLS**
**-_HB 850_ from Rep. Cedric Burnett authorizes county boards of supervisors to deny millage increases through school board ad valorem requests. **This ensures that school boards are properly spending taxpayer dollars and are held accountable. This bill has passed the House and has been sent to the Senate.
**_\- HB 729_ from Rep. Kent McCarty establishes the "Mississippi Successful Techniques Resulting in Delivering Excellence in Education and Employability (STRIDE) Scholarship Program."** This would make scholarships available to students who become eligible to participate in dual-enrollment courses. This bill has passed the House and will move to the Senate.
**_\- HB 510_ from Rep. Jill Ford creates the Foster Parents' Bill of Rights.** The bill helps foster parents understand their rights as overseers of the children and provides them the ability to be more involved in the education and visitation of the child. This bill has passed the House and will be sent to the Senate.

**INTERESTING BILLS**
**- _HB 1168_ from Rep. Trey Lamar seeks to limit special sales taxes to pay only for upgrades and improvements on water infrastructure. **The city of Jackson, for example, would use its food and hotel to fund water improvements. This bill has passed the House but has a motion to reconsider.
**-_SB 2228_ from Sen. Walter Michel establishes provisions for the sale and renewal of pet insurance policies. **This bill has passed the Senate and has been sent to the House.
**-_SB 2608_ from Sen. Chuck Younger requires the Mississippi Armed Forces to include the United States Space Force. **This bill has passed the Senate and has been sent to the House.
---
|
---
| **We are upbeat about several policy aims we have been pushing throughout this session that are making progress through the legislature.

\- _SB 2053_** **from Sen. John Polk ensures that state agencies better manage their budgets.** A new requirement to report deficits in a timely manner would enable our state officials to operate their overall budget in a more financially responsible and accountable way. This bill has passed the Senate and has been sent to the House.
- **_SB 2849_ from Sen. Chad McMahan ensures the board invests the state's pension funds in a manner that prioritizes the safety and highest return on investment rather than on environmental, social and governance causes. **This bill has passed out of the Senate Finance committee and is on the calendar to be discussed on the Senate floor.
**-_HB 370_ from Rep. Shanda Yates would give local residents the power to remove locally elected officials when they fail.** Too many mayors in our state are not effectively accountable outside of election time, and we feel this bill would allow citizens to take a stand against neglectful politicians. This bill is on the calendar to be discussed.

Have a great rest of your week!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=63ee782175&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
All the best,

Tyler B. Jones
Director of Communications and Legislative Affairs

---
| _PS you can stay up to date with every bill introduced during the session through the [2023 Legislative Tracker](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=1b659b54c1&e=5703353baa) found on our website. _
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=39092e3661) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=39092e3661).

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: My response to Biden's speech
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAN CRENSHAW FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HU56ToFfNSxR3nxxMKEkWrrqbWGuJDwlNJLBQxyeWM2OFFaYk-yqDAicX338qJtqQDivhkEAmwavxOY3t90zeSrpANdFU-2cIhIxidzvdsQwAtGzU5F-dgP7kesk_7Z3PM09T5WfVpQqGUYmn6lqPXQdLuwDDL8bBBUt679G1YB6HpMQRNRrCy9ZmeQsRzjoA9EvjZpkbJRBCwuR5MYp3MFnOPi0ScGvVBG8a8V4f0Y3FNbzBdeXgcGZP8JkQNx52a25LVxWhl0e3PXQ5-A6VL1XVkr-cf3mQ8uYt5W1OjydRF5_uTVIVmOrYSOFmoWwqi6jgxaGDGJSHOx_gNSpCGhISvnWVkxx&c=VQsnptaxIKmT0cpYifhIsToFIgkKFNLFBUFnPZPXcqL__zwiEFS2mw==&ch=7co3sbFWDJ4CubGQ3Mua69n2IB2NFUC8FGoUjTszfeaxK3_Kbx9kCQ==)
---
|
Peter-
---
| Is the president you saw last night someone you would trust to lead us through the toughest challenges our country faces? Nope. I don't think so. All I saw last night was Biden attempting to gaslight the American people with disingenuous claims about his "leadership." We could spend all day debunking his lies - but I'll leave you with the top five that stuck out to me. (Of course, this isn't a comprehensive list. If you have anything you'd like to add, please share by adding to this form [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HU56ToFfNSxR3nxxMKEkWrrqbWGuJDwlNJLBQxyeWM2OFFaYk-yqDC8D1PgTSjltIMm7HC4wAxVLbvjww66Ubjzg2HNEJB1W7G5S2S6qmaQMA_27IWQ23t1GLKQk9QSyWj2-ei_Jvbdbtk8i-4DmfubfhTTq0QiBBaY343FUTjfrCnw8EpvtPQxwsTQyg9hwxsHfagrV7Bkejmm9ycgTtO5XdGjoBjC0OQ_bu7KctMGN68byhFcXS5Z1o2uPEAI0ZdIrzBLQu6XM38fP6l28ZXhMQMd27zpwzHBZwTzo20zxOCS_ulyuLsU0dr9vPjMnzsotbecLKS_D0aAcS5MK7bpePv3dWTLR9PQOrgWdihJZpMoGVLEf2Q==&c=VQsnptaxIKmT0cpYifhIsToFIgkKFNLFBUFnPZPXcqL__zwiEFS2mw==&ch=7co3sbFWDJ4CubGQ3Mua69n2IB2NFUC8FGoUjTszfeaxK3_Kbx9kCQ==).) #1 BORDER CRISIS. Biden spent about four lines talking about the border (and one of those lines was promoting amnesty). He brought up the fentanyl crisis without once mentioning what's causing it - the drug cartels. The Sinaloa and Jalisco cartels are the main suppliers of fentanyl coming into this country and killing over 70,000 Americans a year. Since Biden took office, there have been over[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HU56ToFfNSxR3nxxMKEkWrrqbWGuJDwlNJLBQxyeWM2OFFaYk-yqDC8D1PgTSjlta8u_0YslRSlvp_ndZL02x_2rq9-XG0ITMOSf0UdbYU3z8Ygpdc2O91cjzFJK80NX5P6wdDlHayLIwHLaMR6p5520m46dLhAP9vZqC06bfkaL6qNQp8rRc9s5J4oq9q-dH8-aOeoKUiUqDVxcL9sokg==&c=VQsnptaxIKmT0cpYifhIsToFIgkKFNLFBUFnPZPXcqL__zwiEFS2mw==&ch=7co3sbFWDJ4CubGQ3Mua69n2IB2NFUC8FGoUjTszfeaxK3_Kbx9kCQ==)[4.5 million illegal crossings](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HU56ToFfNSxR3nxxMKEkWrrqbWGuJDwlNJLBQxyeWM2OFFaYk-yqDC8D1PgTSjlta8u_0YslRSlvp_ndZL02x_2rq9-XG0ITMOSf0UdbYU3z8Ygpdc2O91cjzFJK80NX5P6wdDlHayLIwHLaMR6p5520m46dLhAP9vZqC06bfkaL6qNQp8rRc9s5J4oq9q-dH8-aOeoKUiUqDVxcL9sokg==&c=VQsnptaxIKmT0cpYifhIsToFIgkKFNLFBUFnPZPXcqL__zwiEFS2mw==&ch=7co3sbFWDJ4CubGQ3Mua69n2IB2NFUC8FGoUjTszfeaxK3_Kbx9kCQ==) at our southern border. #2 GAS PRICES. Biden claimed he's responsible for bringing gas prices down. What Biden didn't mention was that the only reason gas prices reached record levels in the first place is Joe Biden himself. He canceled the Keystone pipeline, blocked new drilling on federal lands, and crushed the oil and gas industry with excessive regulations. The fact remains that the national average is still over a dollar more than when Biden took office. #3 SOCIAL SECURITY. This was perhaps the biggest lie of the night. Biden claimed Republicans would end Social Security. No Republican is discussing doing this. The truth is Democrats will, by their own inaction and reckless spending, inevitably cause automatic cuts to Social Security. #4 DEFICIT. Biden claimed he had record decreases in the deficit, and that President Trump is the one who spent all our money and increased our deficit to record levels. He's forgetting that the increase in the deficit under Trump's presidency was because of COVID spending during his last year in office. Why did we need COVID spending? To save small businesses that were being crushed because of Democrat lockdowns. That's what caused the deficit increase under the Trump Administration. In Biden's first two years as president, he's already surpassed what Trump's deficit spending was during his first three years. #5 JOBS/ECONOMY. Biden claimed he "created a record 12 million new jobs." Here's the harsh reality: 2.6 million fewer Americans are participating in the U.S. labor force compared to before COVID-19. Democrat-imposed lockdowns caused the economic pain which we are still feeling today. When Biden took office, inflation was at just 1.4%. The December Consumer Price Index came in at 6.5%. More Americans than ever before[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HU56ToFfNSxR3nxxMKEkWrrqbWGuJDwlNJLBQxyeWM2OFFaYk-yqDC8D1PgTSjlthlxSqppyWHdC50ux4_ZVON3QnpMOttKs6PbMcEH-i0MfczlXpiXbC_BU7FCXqAP3O65ow2DG_YabmyZqF8D8i1cJQwVNasfOcP7_QUTlfvD81aKHpgpC1qxFEOOG4wAZak_0IIne61qT2oFgTuB8fMJLMtbC18P2DHtefaooLi4IbFq4c0eb4QozEvJq1kASCh9c3ycxws4=&c=VQsnptaxIKmT0cpYifhIsToFIgkKFNLFBUFnPZPXcqL__zwiEFS2mw==&ch=7co3sbFWDJ4CubGQ3Mua69n2IB2NFUC8FGoUjTszfeaxK3_Kbx9kCQ==)[say](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HU56ToFfNSxR3nxxMKEkWrrqbWGuJDwlNJLBQxyeWM2OFFaYk-yqDC8D1PgTSjlthlxSqppyWHdC50ux4_ZVON3QnpMOttKs6PbMcEH-i0MfczlXpiXbC_BU7FCXqAP3O65ow2DG_YabmyZqF8D8i1cJQwVNasfOcP7_QUTlfvD81aKHpgpC1qxFEOOG4wAZak_0IIne61qT2oFgTuB8fMJLMtbC18P2DHtefaooLi4IbFq4c0eb4QozEvJq1kASCh9c3ycxws4=&c=VQsnptaxIKmT0cpYifhIsToFIgkKFNLFBUFnPZPXcqL__zwiEFS2mw==&ch=7co3sbFWDJ4CubGQ3Mua69n2IB2NFUC8FGoUjTszfeaxK3_Kbx9kCQ==) they are worse off financially under this administration. So those were the top five claims from Biden's SOTU that I wanted to debunk for you today. There were many more problems I had with the speech - like not once mentioning Iran, North Korea, or the multitude of foreign policy failures under his presidency. What else would you add? Let me know [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HU56ToFfNSxR3nxxMKEkWrrqbWGuJDwlNJLBQxyeWM2OFFaYk-yqDC8D1PgTSjltIMm7HC4wAxVLbvjww66Ubjzg2HNEJB1W7G5S2S6qmaQMA_27IWQ23t1GLKQk9QSyWj2-ei_Jvbdbtk8i-4DmfubfhTTq0QiBBaY343FUTjfrCnw8EpvtPQxwsTQyg9hwxsHfagrV7Bkejmm9ycgTtO5XdGjoBjC0OQ_bu7KctMGN68byhFcXS5Z1o2uPEAI0ZdIrzBLQu6XM38fP6l28ZXhMQMd27zpwzHBZwTzo20zxOCS_ulyuLsU0dr9vPjMnzsotbecLKS_D0aAcS5MK7bpePv3dWTLR9PQOrgWdihJZpMoGVLEf2Q==&c=VQsnptaxIKmT0cpYifhIsToFIgkKFNLFBUFnPZPXcqL__zwiEFS2mw==&ch=7co3sbFWDJ4CubGQ3Mua69n2IB2NFUC8FGoUjTszfeaxK3_Kbx9kCQ==).
---
| In Service,

| Dan Crenshaw
