clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | Peter- | Is the president you saw last night someone you would trust to lead us through the toughest challenges our country faces? Nope. I don't think so. All I saw last night was Biden attempting to gaslight the American people with disingenuous claims about his "leadership." We could spend all day debunking his lies - but I'll leave you with the top five that stuck out to me. (Of course, this isn't a comprehensive list. If you have anything you'd like to add, please share by adding to this form ==.) #1 BORDER CRISIS. Biden spent about four lines talking about the border (and one of those lines was promoting amnesty). He brought up the fentanyl crisis without once mentioning what's causing it - the drug cartels. The Sinaloa and Jalisco cartels are the main suppliers of fentanyl coming into this country and killing over 70,000 Americans a year. Since Biden took office, there have been over== at our southern border. #2 GAS PRICES. Biden claimed he's responsible for bringing gas prices down. What Biden didn't mention was that the only reason gas prices reached record levels in the first place is Joe Biden himself. He canceled the Keystone pipeline, blocked new drilling on federal lands, and crushed the oil and gas industry with excessive regulations. The fact remains that the national average is still over a dollar more than when Biden took office. #3 SOCIAL SECURITY. This was perhaps the biggest lie of the night. Biden claimed Republicans would end Social Security. No Republican is discussing doing this. The truth is Democrats will, by their own inaction and reckless spending, inevitably cause automatic cuts to Social Security. #4 DEFICIT. Biden claimed he had record decreases in the deficit, and that President Trump is the one who spent all our money and increased our deficit to record levels. He's forgetting that the increase in the deficit under Trump's presidency was because of COVID spending during his last year in office. Why did we need COVID spending? To save small businesses that were being crushed because of Democrat lockdowns. That's what caused the deficit increase under the Trump Administration. In Biden's first two years as president, he's already surpassed what Trump's deficit spending was during his first three years. #5 JOBS/ECONOMY. Biden claimed he "created a record 12 million new jobs." Here's the harsh reality: 2.6 million fewer Americans are participating in the U.S. labor force compared to before COVID-19. Democrat-imposed lockdowns caused the economic pain which we are still feeling today. When Biden took office, inflation was at just 1.4%. The December Consumer Price Index came in at 6.5%. More Americans than ever before== they are worse off financially under this administration. So those were the top five claims from Biden's SOTU that I wanted to debunk for you today. There were many more problems I had with the speech - like not once mentioning Iran, North Korea, or the multitude of foreign policy failures under his presidency. What else would you add? Let me know ==. | In Service, | | Dan Crenshaw | | | | | == | If you'd prefer to donate by check, please make your check payable and mail to: Dan Crenshaw for Congress, 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007. name: Sara Jacobs
subject: 👏 Our President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
Did you watch last night’s State of the Union? If not, I encourage you to check out NPR’s recap [https://www.npr.org/2023/02/07/1155250237/biden-makes-a-pitch-to-finish-the-job-in-his-state-of-the-union-address] (and if you’re interested in my live reactions, take a scroll through my Twitter feed [https://twitter.com/SaraJacobsCA] from last night!).
I won’t add much to what was admittedly a long speech - but I had to take a minute to say 👏YES👏 to President Biden. Watching him stand on the dais, with Vice President Harris behind him, making our values and priorities clear to the entire world, was incredibly moving.
It can be easy to get caught up in the day to day of politics - from cable news and partisan back-and-forth to the creeping demands of re-election campaigns - but for me, the State of the Union offers a respite from all that. Not only has the State of the Union been happening as long as our country has existed (it’s Constitutionally mandated!), watching it each year serves as a reminder that America has an immense opportunity - and an immense responsibility - to lead the way on the global stage.
Last night, it was clear that we are in very good hands as we navigate that challenge - and that the state of the Union is STRONG ! We celebrated the creation of 12 million (!!) jobs, our lowest unemployment rate since 1969, and the historic investments this Administration has made in our nation’s infrastructure.
I was particularly glad to hear President Biden call out some of the issues I care about most deeply and prioritize in my work: affordable child care for all, reproductive rights and bodily autonomy, and supporting our veterans.
President Biden and Vice President Harris have spent two years healing our nation, renewing hope, and rebuilding democracy. With their leadership, we can keep up the fight to support kids and families across the country.
Here’s to another, even brighter, year ahead!
-Sara
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

body:
I hope you got a chance to tune in to the State of the Union address last night. I wanted to make sure you saw this note from President Biden about the work ahead. | |
---
I hope you got the chance to watch Joe’s State of the Union address last night, Derek. It was so energizing to hear him speak about what we’ve accomplished and what’s next in our fight to build a better America. clean_body: I hope you got a chance to tune in to the State of the Union address last night. I wanted to make sure you saw this note from President Biden about the work ahead. | | I hope you got the chance to watch Joe’s State of the Union address last night, Derek. It was so energizing to hear him speak about what we’ve accomplished and what’s next in our fight to build a better America. I know Joe already reached out, and I wanted to take a moment to uplift his message. Grateful to have you on this team, Kamala Kamala Harris Vice President of the United States \-----Forwarded message----- Sender: President Joseph R. Biden, Jr. Date: Tue, Feb 7, 2023 Subject: Let’s finish the job I just finished my State of the Union address. I hope I made you proud -- we’ve gotten a lot done together over the past two years. But there’s more to do to build an economy that works for working families. As I said tonight, we’ve got to finish the job. But here’s the deal: I can’t do it without your help, Derek. I’m grateful for everything you do, Joe Joseph R. Biden, Jr. President of the United States Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, **. If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, territories, and D.C., . Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. name: Margaret Mary Dunn
subject: Save my son from the woke mob
body:
I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

_**But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.**_

[**Will you help my son?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=efb1f98de3b44bb5ae2f3a702a75a513&_e=MdJbJAjIE47KmjVs2yEiY3--ssCD2rlS6CxzslTwTw6wb-CJehqtdJdxlkSkUCQvkmtgbzMiEB4kUcN6G595ixyP-wcrnjmcw-jxuTyUdb5axH7qBmf0Y9VEmj1U8EAe1RaUh7075heYxT1-NRT0o9F_9KqY35azEmEUGb6-wqea9c2l1MS_w9gSBJ0PowmbT6AChbhrU3ZI-IuZr5pXDUpmjz3lwEwt-BlEHjorng4WlVDvXzaJzfyW8QmGbJxj3Ck4cH15tpIpUv9SwUVpO5AJ3bQ0A55NPgrYIIzzkgodNvgPj90oqKjBIokohr-0ZB9Z4iHCqi9yVA4cf5G3ImeXn9UFwxCvtcs0B5zK7tw%3D)

That's Michael in the photo.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=efb1f98de3b44bb5ae2f3a702a75a513&_e=MdJbJAjIE47KmjVs2yEiY3--ssCD2rlS6CxzslTwTw6wb-CJehqtdJdxlkSkUCQvkmtgbzMiEB4kUcN6G595ixyP-wcrnjmcw-jxuTyUdb5axH7qBmf0Y9VEmj1U8EAe1RaUh7075heYxT1-NRT0o9F_9KqY35azEmEUGb6-wqea9c2l1MS_w9gSBJ0PowmbkRlsH05hqLJGwTZqYu8IsswDaA5sP5lcs8SZaU5IlLOHr92NsAENYALE6MQiBMBvF7brs_xxSsVBAhyCKaUNm-8_RE1jp7n8U4M4ujdytmbi-TihYBl_nuc9X1HeP6MPHViMp_M6VDwa4AjZVYvwKjP_Hd0d4l8xIE_qXtV9uek%3D) [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=efb1f98de3b44bb5ae2f3a702a75a513&_e=MdJbJAjIE47KmjVs2yEiY3--ssCD2rlS6CxzslTwTw6wb-CJehqtdJdxlkSkUCQvkmtgbzMiEB4kUcN6G595ixyP-wcrnjmcw-jxuTyUdb5axH7qBmf0Y9VEmj1U8EAe1RaUh7075heYxT1-NRT0o9F_9KqY35azEmEUGb6-wqea9c2l1MS_w9gSBJ0Powmb4iclO2cVzEra3iGClFr5x38qB7V_dp8GNZmb2vYPkIsvYKhvrYPs4et-svfa2nvFdEui331fc_A-cgLXJb1J2TSWgGnNlUAuxzVnyIKZWuPKBOiIrgchdLhlZbkqEC4Js_6SJPd-Zl_-HF0htkwEmGjBtawd6l8KKGmm9uWzrkE%3D)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael 's_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=efb1f98de3b44bb5ae2f3a702a75a513&_e=MdJbJAjIE47KmjVs2yEiY3--ssCD2rlS6CxzslTwTw6wb-CJehqtdJdxlkSkUCQvkmtgbzMiEB4kUcN6G595ixyP-wcrnjmcw-jxuTyUdb5axH7qBmf0Y9VEmj1U8EAe1RaUh7075heYxT1-NRT0o9F_9KqY35azEmEUGb6-wqea9c2l1MS_w9gSBJ0Powmbmglvw1R5b4XzJ60lykoab-aUU5r5Ihs-F6BJv9o8dfHE7miQhCfFHy_CrKnW-0rttji_J8CN1MIqP3j9UNWUH5Vh5LqEkjhhL5vWzuJJP3r6uRJl_O2YmskF2zqvf9Aa2cq7fKT0lQGIlYo8TtpyjBQjupoGZxiDWno1vM3ZkKk%3D)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=efb1f98de3b44bb5ae2f3a702a75a513&_e=MdJbJAjIE47KmjVs2yEiY3--ssCD2rlS6CxzslTwTw6wb-CJehqtdJdxlkSkUCQvkmtgbzMiEB4kUcN6G595ixyP-wcrnjmcw-jxuTyUdb5axH7qBmf0Y9VEmj1U8EAe1RaUh7075heYxT1-NRT0o9F_9KqY35azEmEUGb6-wqea9c2l1MS_w9gSBJ0PowmbpWjTpR3TGNh7-xRZUrNvylbDuNaph_9ybUq1IqUOJXnaXn1OxabgMa_Om_-tWxxBOt8stcjUhPmB-MRL6Dv9uJDmnx1_etn2E112C5X35Lpq0sLEwXDVPopOWdI52zwSRS_DKDMjHEX46GRWJwnsx0w9iyU6d9fRzRxAjiW0tEM%3D)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" - and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=efb1f98de3b44bb5ae2f3a702a75a513&_e=MdJbJAjIE47KmjVs2yEiY3--ssCD2rlS6CxzslTwTw6wb-CJehqtdJdxlkSkUCQvkmtgbzMiEB4kUcN6G595ixyP-wcrnjmcw-jxuTyUdb5axH7qBmf0Y9VEmj1U8EAe1RaUh7075heYxT1-NRT0o9F_9KqY35azEmEUGb6-wqea9c2l1MS_w9gSBJ0Powmb9uXAigujeBdEWBEAtNr3F52JuaPlvfs_XR2kikZEWhPD_1gUkvp3FnaPNyCDYLh9o3DdcOowvL4RUOhgLSAYrKcE_3Xcm89XZzFUCLEo_k1kXEUsvo-g2VvJBZSrMwRJ4la4b2tcenwUzsWiQVap4CS1wHRhGaBjgIg4CpG5NFM%3D)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a **[gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=efb1f98de3b44bb5ae2f3a702a75a513&_e=MdJbJAjIE47KmjVs2yEiY3--ssCD2rlS6CxzslTwTw6wb-CJehqtdJdxlkSkUCQvkmtgbzMiEB4kUcN6G595ixyP-wcrnjmcw-jxuTyUdb5axH7qBmf0Y9VEmj1U8EAe1RaUh7075heYxT1-NRT0o9F_9KqY35azEmEUGb6-wqea9c2l1MS_w9gSBJ0PowmbjQOsb7CV_-gAEBt9bskHKJvMuZ9Ls5zHmODxPdMWm8rXCE7AjGHfTepSTOZewkbMujFjdk9c_VyjnqDJ2d_XXma-L42SoL56mC9gLMmmzoK8W0qQ6mUnUNbg9Ryi92gajI9yxreouKhAHESURN1SxntZDQr3Et3V9difO3Xdz3s%3D)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=efb1f98de3b44bb5ae2f3a702a75a513&_e=MdJbJAjIE47KmjVs2yEiY3--ssCD2rlS6CxzslTwTw6wb-CJehqtdJdxlkSkUCQvkmtgbzMiEB4kUcN6G595ixyP-wcrnjmcw-jxuTyUdb5axH7qBmf0Y9VEmj1U8EAe1RaUh7075heYxT1-NRT0o9F_9KqY35azEmEUGb6-wqea9c2l1MS_w9gSBJ0PowmbqyYiedMfUqHHjNS-jOXMyAskLr3HlHz837GeuwTx5d4aVaC9--KKFR7o1ObUITh_fcOUfrCjGUV2tV-CpYBqpBkL8laUGHhBIVWJdygK29U9xBBEAQT_4zTOMTx9TPuazRkyAUxrnUeC0szy7tWGO4Xg0ZBiIdcggKyCkEVGMBg%3D)
_That's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_

clean_body: I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael. Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas. But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck. That's Michael in the photo. In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve. I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job. Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty. It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years. What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need. I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist. Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats. Fear of losing their jobs. I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back. But I was wrong. So now Michael 's life is at stake for simply doing his job and we have nobody to turn to except for good hearted strangers like you. Let me give you some more of the details... Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade." The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police. Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man. When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car. The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him. Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired. The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene. My son suffered back and leg injuries. Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck. In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community. There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day. He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others. But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years. Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did? That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died. But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified. And then our whole world was rocked. Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted. Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said: "We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never." I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court. We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense. After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser. They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" - and helping him violated their terms of service. So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds. No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process. Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime." Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael. With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading. Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have. LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty. The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department. And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son! You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers. Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a I pray you will consider doing so. Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers. My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal. That's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn That's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today. Sincerely, Margaret Mary Dunn PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind to help Michael will mean so much to my family. \---------------- More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter! (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Rick Scott
subject: Mitch McConnell booted me

body:
Mitch McConnell just removed me from a Senate Committee for challenging him for Republican Leader.
| | | Fellow conservative,
---
| | Mitch McConnell just removed me from a Senate Committee for challenging him for Republican Leader. This is what happens when you challenge leadership in Washington. It’s the kind of vintage Washington insider move you find here in the swamp. But that won’t stop me from pushing Senate Republican leaders to act like Republicans. I stand by my decision to challenge Mitch McConnell for Minority Leader, and I’ll continue to fight Washington insiders who make Washington work for _them_ instead of _you_. they say one thing, but the statistics say another.| | | Friend, President Biden says the State of our Union is improving, that Americans are better off than they were four years ago. _But our economy says otherwise._ ➡️ 166 million Americans are living paycheck to paycheck, including 51% of those making $100,000 OR MORE.➡️ Inflation continues to outpace wages.➡️ Gas prices are up.➡️ Retail spending is down while inventory is up.
---
[**IMPROVE THE STATE OF OUR UNION**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=52192142aa0f443abf64d851abc72413&_e=ACDAW7_TB2H79VLV3b23HqRdZFRDiOjbd3GpyYXQrAsHN2YFh6GbrjX8rP85C7gst92yMa9hNtR5om7z1GoFtvAF8WQuIGbI_Xqne0v-rWR2MZaCJW7pixg9Y-fPeQLwpWdW1v3_ClreObC6JxxolNbw0AcuxJuVDc-s1bUDlnRQD4YhPt9Kfwt-QqC7ZsWurbrGhgxYZPDUQ3GyBLuWsDQfw61YtQ4xlIuz-pPoagbfQYHIiersOORPwRKr9Jk5_LmtJNGFbll4nG0xOg_J_Sv1Iz4DXKaP2uR0AfRGQ-He1MmjnmNLBhpM8UnRoJUe2DCcjV3QXVjE7ArF_i8hSYrW-cdTtzOjlYQkoU2RIHDSVpLSvZhIVv_2lytlXb085G99rpEUoyy92p6kQO6s2Q%3D%3D)

| | **We do NOT need Joe Biden and progressives telling us what the state of our nation is. We know it because we live it****every single day.** We know what it’s like to have to choose between putting food on the table for our kids or filling up our tank to get to work. But our economy says otherwise. ➡️ 166 million Americans are living paycheck to paycheck, including 51% of those making $100,000 OR MORE.➡️ Inflation continues to outpace wages.➡️ Gas prices are up.➡️ Retail spending is down while inventory is up. | | We do NOT need Joe Biden and progressives telling us what the state of our nation is. We know it because we live itevery single day. We know what it’s like to have to choose between putting food on the table for our kids or filling up our tank to get to work. We know what it’s like to choose which bill will go unpaid until our next paycheck comes along. ...and we don’t need a rich elitist sitting in the White House to tell us life is getting better when that’s the furthest thing from the truth! | | Friend, House Republicans are working to advance the conservative agenda and get our nation back on track, but it’s going to take grassroots conservatives like us coming together to support their mission. name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: about last night
body:
| Friend -- I'm about to head home from DC after last night's State of the Union, but wanted to share some quick words on what I believe to be the top-line takeaway from last night: decorum matters. [](https://www.country1st.com/about_last_night?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sotu23_nd&n=1) We may not like someone, what they say, or how they act, but a democracy falters when its leaders cannot be civil toward one another. After all, politics was created so we could solve problems without violence. There are plenty of cautionary tales from history (and the present) of what happens when politics is poisoned. It doesn't end well. But that doesn't have to be our story. The Reasonable Majority can be the antidote -- but only if we awaken and activate more good people to **believe** that we not only deserve something better _but_ that it's possible. Country First is working overtime to help our nation BREAK FREE from the apathy and hopelessness that allows us to accept the kind of behavior we saw last night. It's not that we need more Republicans or more Democrats in Congress -- we need more good, reasonable people of all stripes who care more about preserving our democracy than pleasing the extremes. That's what we all deserve, and that's what we'll get when we work together to make it happen. Ok, time for my flight.. thanks for reading and let's plan to get together soon. Country First, Adam
---

To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.country1st.com/unsubscribe?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sotu23_nd&n=2).

name: Giffords.org
subject: We must do more
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Our priorities after the State of the Union
#

Friends -
During last night’s State of the Union address, President Biden addressed our progress on gun safety, but acknowledged we still have more to do to reach a future free from violence.
As President Biden said himself, _“We know our work is not done.”_
We urge the Biden Administration to continue to work with the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives to clarify their ghost gun ruling and take further action to ban devices that turn handguns into machine guns.
We urge Congress to pass the recently introduced Bipartisan Background Checks Act. We urge them to fund community violence intervention programs that save lives on the ground when given proper funding and support. We also need them to invest in research that will help us study gun safety solutions.
These priorities will save lives. But we can’t advocate for these transformative solutions alone.
[**So please, will you chip in today to support our work at Giffords and help us work towards a future free from violence?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb23.wLJBGg&refcode=em230208-1-15&t=1&akid=4235%2E3935704%2EIrcf76)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you, The team at Giffords Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

name: American Update
subject: Be one of the first
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1536%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=ogArL1hr10vNAMQ9Odp6Ag&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658372%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2M%2bTZsdJYfue%2faJZxNf6Uw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658372%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2M%2bTZsdJYfue%2faJZxNf6Uw&sysid=1) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658373%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RFcqbp14Mh2xSHtvkkrxNw&sysid=1) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---

clean_body: Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. | | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| | Peter,

**This is unacceptable.** The Democrats’ soft-on-crime” and defund-the-police movement has stoked violent, anti-police sentiments that have made our communities less safe. **_We must speak up and demand change. _** My Republican friends in the Senate asked me to reach out to supporters I trust to provide vital input to help shape our party’s decision making on key issues like crime. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Keeping our progressive agenda front and center
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Our movement will continue to deliver for working families
#
Peter,
During last night's State of the Union address, President Biden highlighted the progress we've made in the past two years — in large part thanks to our movement delivering some **BIG victories** for working people across the country.
Thanks to our tireless organizing, advocacy, and negotiating over the last two years, we secured unprecedented investments into large-scale climate action, our nation's infrastructure, gun reform, veteran's healthcare, and more.
These victories just go to show that our progressive coalition knows how to organize for and deliver the transformative, people-first policies our communities need — **while the Republicans are in ruin.**
**Since entering Congress, I have fought non-stop for the lifesaving solutions that will effectively address some of the most pressing crises we're facing.[**Will you help us today by pitching in $3 or any amount so we can continue to serve the American people?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/33984?refcode=em20230208-2140&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2140%2E420207%2Ew13p79)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/33984?refcode=em20230208-2140&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=2140%2E420207%2Ew13p79)**
What has the GOP done for the American people with their newfound, narrow House majority? Let's take a look:
* Introduced a tax proposal that would cause skyrocketing taxes for working class people.
* Continued their attack on reproductive rights by introducing two pieces of anti-choice legislation.
* Empowered extremist, election-denying members by appointing some of them to the most influential House committees.
* Proposed holding the economy hostage by refusing to increase the debt ceiling to provide necessary relief to everyday people who are struggling.

Despite the fact Republicans now control the House, **our work is far from over.** We **cannot and will not be deterred** in our efforts to achieve and deliver a better and brighter future. Unlike the GOP, I will continue to push for a **bold progressive agenda that works for all** — [**but this work can't be done alone. Can you chip in $3 or any amount to keep our progressive agenda front and center?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/33984?refcode=em20230208-2140&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2140%2E420207%2Ew13p79)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/33984?refcode=em20230208-2140&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2140%2E420207%2Ew13p79)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230208-2140-footer&t=23&refcode2=2140_420207_w13p79&akid=2140%2E420207%2Ew13p79)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2140%2E420207%2Ew13p79)

| | Friend, Last night I was proud to deliver the State of the Union response. In the radical left’s America, Washington taxes you and lights your hard-earned money on fire, but you get crushed with high gas prices, empty grocery shelves, and our children are taught to hate one another on account of their race, but not to love one another or our great country. Whether Joe Biden believes this madness or is simply too weak to resist it, his administration has been completely hijacked by the radical left. The dividing line in America is no longer between right or left. The choice is between normal or crazy. **It is time for a new generation of Republican leadership. name: Matt Gaetz
subject: SOTU Recap: The Big Guy tells Big Lies!
body:
| | |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vQ0kYf6xalaFnMfVhTvxriWcmb48_DXtiscNtKumAlWrKK7z9Hw-s_NGSz_ahAIVuYiT4NJ6cFYYrGgNN-NkxptMoxOTmzKxLgoDe__ZKjPGEBB1uASbvIFSEo1l_iwdJH6QFaEFCSNsmJ8cHdMF-pojMHmfRJAx1-I4H8A3zU3LHJcbhd6YQK-BTvIEpSfvh05STYPIrl0=&c=PZ2sH-n3k3gtf0DPOW1EqRD7Bxkb9UJ6a6A7fNewL8BZ3Y61UDl7eQ==&ch=u8iwfwYXL-JBLAVRhesl4uMWPnm0cOU-8Ql48NOmSzJd2feILV-5gA==)
---
| Peter,
---
| The addled President has just taken center stage...
Joe Biden just gave his State of the Union Address last night, and as was expected, he was more full of hot air than a Chinese Spy Balloon.
I'll unpack some of The Big Guy's biggest lies in just a minute, Peter -

body:
I brought a special guest last night to highlight Colorado's water crisis. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58445823/391117876/1601879459?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230208_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTM4NTUzMi1kM2E3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cA8Y5bwwHKycy5AUtSYsJVpw5EAj4B3h5JWJFJkEeUc=&emci=98bc840f-21a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=2a385532-d3a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1295540) Hi there — After two decades of drought, the Western water crisis is, in my view, one of the greatest challenges facing our nation today, but it was hardly a footnote in last night’s State of the Union address. **That's why I brought a special guest with me last night to highlight the threats facing our most vital resource: Our water. His name is Paul Bruchez, and he’s a rancher from Kremmling, CO.** For five generations, Paul and his family have relied on the upper Colorado River. It is their livelihood, their legacy, and their home. But in recent years, Paul has seen the river begin to dry, forcing him and his neighbors into action. Paul told his family’s story in a short film about the water crisis, and he’s working with other ranchers and landowners to conserve the river and the life it sustains. His tireless efforts took shape in a twelve mile restoration of the Colorado River. **Hardworking Coloradans like Paul are on the frontlines of the fight to save our waterways, and Congress, state, and local leaders need to do more to support their work.**[**Add your name if you agree we need to act boldly and with urgency to conserve our waterways and address drought in the Colorado River Basin.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58445825/391117878/1601879459?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230208_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTM4NTUzMi1kM2E3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cA8Y5bwwHKycy5AUtSYsJVpw5EAj4B3h5JWJFJkEeUc=&emci=98bc840f-21a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=2a385532-d3a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1295540) | **[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58445827/391117879/1601879459?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230208_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTM4NTUzMi1kM2E3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cA8Y5bwwHKycy5AUtSYsJVpw5EAj4B3h5JWJFJkEeUc=&emci=98bc840f-21a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=2a385532-d3a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1295540)**
---
As a member of the Senate Agriculture Committee, I’m calling on my colleagues to join me in addressing Western drought and make new investments in conservation, forests, and watersheds through this year’s Farm Bill.
Last year, I secured $4 billion to address drought in the Colorado River Basin in the _Inflation Reduction Act_ , but I see that as only a down-payment on the work that must be done to conserve our water supply and support sustainable agriculture.
And with Republicans now in the House majority, taking action to protect our environment will be even harder. **We need to stand together and speak out loudly to secure the resources Coloradans, like Paul, need to save our watershed.**
[**If you’re with us, please sign this petition to call on Congress and the Biden Administration to take urgent action combating Western drought.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58445828/391117882/1601879459?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230208_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTM4NTUzMi1kM2E3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cA8Y5bwwHKycy5AUtSYsJVpw5EAj4B3h5JWJFJkEeUc=&emci=98bc840f-21a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=2a385532-d3a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1295540)
**[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58445829/391117883/1601879459?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230208_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTM4NTUzMi1kM2E3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cA8Y5bwwHKycy5AUtSYsJVpw5EAj4B3h5JWJFJkEeUc=&emci=98bc840f-21a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=2a385532-d3a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1295540)**

clean_body: I brought a special guest last night to highlight Colorado's water crisis. | Hi there — After two decades of drought, the Western water crisis is, in my view, one of the greatest challenges facing our nation today, but it was hardly a footnote in last night’s State of the Union address. That's why I brought a special guest with me last night to highlight the threats facing our most vital resource: Our water. His name is Paul Bruchez, and he’s a rancher from Kremmling, CO. For five generations, Paul and his family have relied on the upper Colorado River. It is their livelihood, their legacy, and their home. But in recent years, Paul has seen the river begin to dry, forcing him and his neighbors into action. Paul told his family’s story in a short film about the water crisis, and he’s working with other ranchers and landowners to conserve the river and the life it sustains. His tireless efforts took shape in a twelve mile restoration of the Colorado River. Hardworking Coloradans like Paul are on the frontlines of the fight to save our waterways, and Congress, state, and local leaders need to do more to support their work. | As a member of the Senate Agriculture Committee, I’m calling on my colleagues to join me in addressing Western drought and make new investments in conservation, forests, and watersheds through this year’s Farm Bill. Last year, I secured $4 billion to address drought in the Colorado River Basin in the Inflation Reduction Act , but I see that as only a down-payment on the work that must be done to conserve our water supply and support sustainable agriculture. And with Republicans now in the House majority, taking action to protect our environment will be even harder. We need to stand together and speak out loudly to secure the resources Coloradans, like Paul, need to save our watershed. Thank you for reading and for standing with us. Michael Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: State of the Union
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
The GOP showed the country who they really are.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230208-3870-header&t=1&akid=3870%2E2526796%2EZdTLcX)
I’ve never seen a State of the Union that was so disruptive, even under President Donald Trump.
We saw nowhere near the level of jeering, interruption, etc. that we saw last night from some of the extreme members of the Republican Party – who are now embraced and uplifted as the center of the Republican Party.
It’s really shocking, even the things the overall Republican Party refused to stand for. Paying public school teachers. Public health policy. Basic education policy. Raising the wage for some of our lowest paid workers in the United States.
**This should be basic stuff. This is ‘sky is blue’ kind of stuff.**
The Republican Party really showed the country who they are last night. This isn’t some right-wing thing. This is the ethos of the modern Republican Party.
And this is what we’re up against for the next two years: a Republican majority that uplifts conspiracy theorists, rewards transphobia, and wants to gut Social Security and Medicare. [Can you please chip in $6 today to help our movement keep up the fight against the modern GOP and its far-right agenda? **[Contribute](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230208.-iU0UE&refcode=em20230208-3870-P_FND_RES_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3870%2E2526796%2EZdTLcX)** ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230208.-iU0UE&refcode=em20230208-3870-P_FND_RES_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3870%2E2526796%2EZdTLcX)
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230208?refcode=em20230208-3870-P_FND_RES_GOL&t=22&refcode2=3870_2526796_ZdTLcX&akid=3870%2E2526796%2EZdTLcX)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230208-3870-P_FND_RES_GOL&t=23&akid=3870%2E2526796%2EZdTLcX)**

[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=3870%2E2526796%2EZdTLcX) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=3870%2E2526796%2EZdTLcX) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=3870%2E2526796%2EZdTLcX)

Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Sen. Heidi Campbell
subject: Legislative Roundup
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for State Senate, Jacob Kleinrock treasurer
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58446460/391120135/-1335748974?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGZiMDk1My1kNWE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XnRGYh3yKUAbsbNpyhCClNUYYO7kI8PQtTi0sKqV138=&emci=639ebd51-3da7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=fdfb0953-d5a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43402173)
---
| | Hi Peter, Last week was the bill filing deadline for both the house and senate of the 113th General Assembly. My team and I are busy finalizing our legislative agenda, meeting with advocates, and getting ready to present bills to committees. The ideas behind many of the bills I filed came from constituents who reached out to me with their concerns. I’m proud of the over 60 bills I’m carrying this session and wanted to share some of them with you. **Department of Children’s Services Reform**
* Limiting the number of cases a DCS caseworker can carry to 20 by January of 2024 and to 12 by July of 2024.
* Redefining intellectual disability as it pertains to minors in DCS custody to ensure they receive necessary interventions and services.

**Education**
* Reducing the school counselor to student ratio to make certain that all Tennessee students have adequate access to a licensed counselor in their school.
* Giving third grade teachers more input in the decision whether or not to hold a student back a year because of an unsatisfactory test score.

**Environment**
* Providing tax incentives for retail and hospitality & travel related businesses to install electric chargers in their parking lots.
* Requiring sellers, distributors, and importers of certain packaging materials to take specific actions to reduce litter through the Tennessee Waste and Reduction Act.
* Changing the definition of Controlled Animal Feeding Operations (CAFOs) so that they are not protected under the Right to Farm Act.

**Cannabis Legalization**
* Legalizing cannabis for medical and adult use, creating thousands of jobs in rural counties, providing pain relief to suffering patients, and bringing in millions of dollars in tax revenue to our state.

**Suicide Prevention**
* Requiring colleges and universities to include suicide prevention hotline information on student ID cards through the Save Tennessee Students Act.

**Tax Relief**
* Eliminating the sales tax on fruits and vegetables to make healthy food more affordable for Tennessee families.

**Veterans**
* Establishing a Veterans Bill of Rights that will help veterans access jobs, and attain college degrees, healthcare and housing through proven, low-cost programs.

**Women and Families**
* Pushing for more common sense policies to help working families, including paid leave and the Family Caregiver Antidiscrimination Act, legislation to protect the rights of workers caring for a family member.
* Supporting new moms through funding nonprofits that provide childcare services, assist postpartum mothers transitioning back into the workforce, and work to improve maternal health outcomes.

**Voting**
* Working with high school and college students on the Tennessee Student Voter Act, legislation that would require all high schools to provide information to seniors about how to register to vote.
* Restoring the right to vote by absentee ballot to seniors living in independent living communities that are part of assisted living facilities or nursing homes.

You can view and track these bills as well as the others I’ve filed this year through the [Legislature's website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58446461/391120136/-871781578?ID=S200&ga=113&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGZiMDk1My1kNWE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XnRGYh3yKUAbsbNpyhCClNUYYO7kI8PQtTi0sKqV138=&emci=639ebd51-3da7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=fdfb0953-d5a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43402173). Be sure to follow me on [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58446462/391120137/-2036438440?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGZiMDk1My1kNWE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XnRGYh3yKUAbsbNpyhCClNUYYO7kI8PQtTi0sKqV138=&emci=639ebd51-3da7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=fdfb0953-d5a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43402173), [Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58446463/391120138/1999724989?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGZiMDk1My1kNWE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XnRGYh3yKUAbsbNpyhCClNUYYO7kI8PQtTi0sKqV138=&emci=639ebd51-3da7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=fdfb0953-d5a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43402173), and [Instagram](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58446464/391120139/396956864?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGZiMDk1My1kNWE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XnRGYh3yKUAbsbNpyhCClNUYYO7kI8PQtTi0sKqV138=&emci=639ebd51-3da7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=fdfb0953-d5a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43402173) for updates on my bills as they are scheduled for committee votes, as well as for important developments on other legislation being considered by the General Assembly. This year, I will be serving on the Energy and Agriculture and Natural Resources Committee and the Transportation and Safety Committee. I’m excited about both of these committee assignments as environmental issues remain a top priority for me and, with an unprecedented level of federal infrastructure money coming into Tennessee, it’s time to make long overdue investments in our state’s infrastructure and overall transportation strategy. I also continue to serve on the Fiscal Review Committee and the Tennessee Advisory Commission on Intergovernmental Affairs, also known as TACIR. Last year Rep. Powell and I passed a [bill to commission a TACIR study](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58446465/391120140/-1562530212?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGZiMDk1My1kNWE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XnRGYh3yKUAbsbNpyhCClNUYYO7kI8PQtTi0sKqV138=&emci=639ebd51-3da7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=fdfb0953-d5a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43402173) of passenger rail in Tennessee. We have also pushed to have TDOT apply for a federal grant to study an initial route. Right now we’re in the process of deciding whether a Nashville to Memphis or a Nashville to Chattanooga route makes more sense. **The controlling party continues their attempts to take over Nashville. ** First, Republican legislators filed legislation to cut the Nashville City Council in half. There is not a single legislator from Davidson County who supports this bill. While reduction of the council may be defensible, it should be a decision that’s made by residents of the county. Then, they proposed bills to allow the state to appoint board members to Metro Nashville Sports Authority and Metro Nashville Airport Authority, effectively taking control of the two bodies away from the city. Next, came a bill to pull the funding district for the Nashville Convention Center. And late last week, on the first day of Black History Month, Republicans filed legislation to rename a portion of Rep. John Lewis Way — a stretch that runs from James Robertson Parkway to Dr. Martin L. King Jr. Boulevard — to President Donald Trump Boulevard. As a reminder, civil rights icon Rep. John Lewis attended both Nashville’s American Baptist College and Fisk University, and led sit-ins to desegregate lunch counters at stores on the street now named for him. As a member of the Davidson County Delegation, I’ll be following all these bills and will push back on all attempts to take control of our city. **In the News:** [Tennessee needs $62.9 billion for infrastructure projects, report clean_body: | | | | | Hi Peter, Last week was the bill filing deadline for both the house and senate of the 113th General Assembly. My team and I are busy finalizing our legislative agenda, meeting with advocates, and getting ready to present bills to committees. The ideas behind many of the bills I filed came from constituents who reached out to me with their concerns. I’m proud of the over 60 bills I’m carrying this session and wanted to share some of them with you. Department of Children’s Services Reform Limiting the number of cases a DCS caseworker can carry to 20 by January of 2024 and to 12 by July of 2024. Redefining intellectual disability as it pertains to minors in DCS custody to ensure they receive necessary interventions and services. Education Reducing the school counselor to student ratio to make certain that all Tennessee students have adequate access to a licensed counselor in their school. Giving third grade teachers more input in the decision whether or not to hold a student back a year because of an unsatisfactory test score. Environment Providing tax incentives for retail and hospitality & travel related businesses to install electric chargers in their parking lots. Requiring sellers, distributors, and importers of certain packaging materials to take specific actions to reduce litter through the Tennessee Waste and Reduction Act. Changing the definition of Controlled Animal Feeding Operations (CAFOs) so that they are not protected under the Right to Farm Act. Cannabis Legalization Legalizing cannabis for medical and adult use, creating thousands of jobs in rural counties, providing pain relief to suffering patients, and bringing in millions of dollars in tax revenue to our state. Suicide Prevention Requiring colleges and universities to include suicide prevention hotline information on student ID cards through the Save Tennessee Students Act. Tax Relief Eliminating the sales tax on fruits and vegetables to make healthy food more affordable for Tennessee families. Veterans Establishing a Veterans Bill of Rights that will help veterans access jobs, and attain college degrees, healthcare and housing through proven, low-cost programs. Women and Families Pushing for more common sense policies to help working families, including paid leave and the Family Caregiver Antidiscrimination Act, legislation to protect the rights of workers caring for a family member. Supporting new moms through funding nonprofits that provide childcare services, assist postpartum mothers transitioning back into the workforce, and work to improve maternal health outcomes. Voting Working with high school and college students on the Tennessee Student Voter Act, legislation that would require all high schools to provide information to seniors about how to register to vote. Restoring the right to vote by absentee ballot to seniors living in independent living communities that are part of assisted living facilities or nursing homes. You can view and track these bills as well as the others I’ve filed this year through the . Be sure to follow me on , , and for updates on my bills as they are scheduled for committee votes, as well as for important developments on other legislation being considered by the General Assembly. This year, I will be serving on the Energy and Agriculture and Natural Resources Committee and the Transportation and Safety Committee. I’m excited about both of these committee assignments as environmental issues remain a top priority for me and, with an unprecedented level of federal infrastructure money coming into Tennessee, it’s time to make long overdue investments in our state’s infrastructure and overall transportation strategy. I also continue to serve on the Fiscal Review Committee and the Tennessee Advisory Commission on Intergovernmental Affairs, also known as TACIR. Last year Rep. Powell and I passed a of passenger rail in Tennessee. We have also pushed to have TDOT apply for a federal grant to study an initial route. Right now we’re in the process of deciding whether a Nashville to Memphis or a Nashville to Chattanooga route makes more sense. The controlling party continues their attempts to take over Nashville. First, Republican legislators filed legislation to cut the Nashville City Council in half. There is not a single legislator from Davidson County who supports this bill. While reduction of the council may be defensible, it should be a decision that’s made by residents of the county. Then, they proposed bills to allow the state to appoint board members to Metro Nashville Sports Authority and Metro Nashville Airport Authority, effectively taking control of the two bodies away from the city. Next, came a bill to pull the funding district for the Nashville Convention Center. And late last week, on the first day of Black History Month, Republicans filed legislation to rename a portion of Rep. John Lewis Way — a stretch that runs from James Robertson Parkway to Dr. Martin L. King Jr. Boulevard — to President Donald Trump Boulevard. As a reminder, civil rights icon Rep. John Lewis attended both Nashville’s American Baptist College and Fisk University, and led sit-ins to desegregate lunch counters at stores on the street now named for him. name: Valerie Foushee
subject: My first State of the Union address
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
Across the aisle, Republicans are threatening to hold our economy hostage and cut funding to Social Security and Medicare.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58447026/391122087/669571684?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230208-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTEwYjBjYi1kNmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C9Ziw7keKGphvA-bu6z1P7BcNXFeWINeRhQS8mSgM3E=)
---
| Peter,

Last night, President Biden delivered the State of the Union address, in which he shared the country’s economic progress and this year’s policy priorities. I was proud to be in attendance for the first time and to be seated next to colleagues committed to fighting for working families across the country.

Across the aisle, Republicans are threatening to hold our economy hostage and cut funding to Social Security and Medicare. _**We simply can’t let that happen.**_ Our priority must be to take back the House. \- Josh

body:
| |
---
| | | Biden just spent an hour LYING to you and working class patriots everywhere about the state of our nation.
* The Chinese are brazenly flying spy balloons over our country
* The border remains open and the wall remains unfinished.
* Illegal border crossings are at an all time high and Fentanyl is pouring into our country by the metric ton.
* Inflation is skyrocketing and people are struggling to feed their families.

Having sat three feet away as Biden spouted his lies, I am more motivated than ever to STOP Biden's agenda and I'm not waiting a minute longer to start and neither should you.

Right now, the liberal media is spinning this speech as a major success for Joe and the Democrats and they will raise MILLIONS so they can continue running this country into the ground.

As Speaker of the House, I am standing against Joe Biden and the Democrats but I can't do this alone. If Biden's speech sickened you like it sickened me, I need you stand with me to save our great nation.

Kevin McCarthy

name: Mark Warner
subject: Last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
President Biden spoke directly to us.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58465307/391165803/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTQ1NGI5YS0wM2E4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qwdp6DjoUiEW6kWYV_9hoBC7QWndIelweg6ROlFAhoc=&emci=5270d4b3-f4a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=6a454b9a-03a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, Last night, President Biden spoke directly to the American people in his State of the Union address.**I want to briefly share some thoughts with you—about our progress over the last two years, about my special guest to the State of the Union, and about the work ahead.** We have made historic progress under President Biden and the Democratic majority. Unemployment is at its lowest rate since 1969, and inflation is starting to come down. We have taken steps to tackle climate change, improved veterans’ healthcare, and passed a robust infrastructure bill to rebuild our roads, rails, and bridges. These are just a few of the victories Democrats have delivered for the American people in just the last two years. I chose my State of the Union guest with this progress in mind, as an opportunity to highlight our work on bringing down drug prices. Last night, I was honored to be joined by Mrs. Marguerite Bailey Young, a 94-year-old widow from Fredericksburg who relies on daily medications including two types of insulin. After Democrats passed the Inflation Reduction Act, her insulin costs dropped significantly and she no longer has to worry about whether she will be able to afford her life-saving medication. Going forward, we need to finish the job of capping exorbitant insulin prices for all Americans. I was proud to see President Biden recommit to that mission in the State of the Union. On this and a number of other issues, President Biden made clear that we are not finished making progress for the American people. Here are a few of the other priorities mentioned last night that Democrats will champion going forward into the 2024 Presidential Election:
* _With the family of Tyre Nichols and a heroic survivor of the Monterey Park shooting in the gallery, President Biden made a bold call for police reform and an assault weapons ban. Democrats can and must lead the fight to make our communities safer._
* _We know that civil rights and reproductive freedom are under attack in states around the country. The President made clear last night that Democrats won’t back down from defending the rights and dignity of every American._
* _We are also going to need a bipartisan deal to raise the debt ceiling, protect the full faith and credit of the United States, and prevent a financial catastrophe._

These are just a few of the important priorities Democrats are going to pursue in the coming months. I won’t sugar-coat things, Derek, the next couple years are going to be tough. Between the House Republican opposition, a difficult 2024 Senate map, and a potential Trump-Biden rematch, we are going to have to work hard to continue making progress for the American people. _[**In the face of that challenge, I want to ask you to stand with me, with President Biden, and with Democrats around the country who are committed to this effort. Let’s answer the call in last night’s State of the Union address to keep fighting for the American people. Will you make an investment in this progress and chip in $5 to help us continue our progress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58465308/391165804/688832202?refcode=mw_em_230208_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTQ1NGI5YS0wM2E4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qwdp6DjoUiEW6kWYV_9hoBC7QWndIelweg6ROlFAhoc=)_ Thank you, Mark Warner **[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58465309/391165805/688832202?refcode=mw_em_230208_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTQ1NGI5YS0wM2E4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qwdp6DjoUiEW6kWYV_9hoBC7QWndIelweg6ROlFAhoc=)**

clean_body: President Biden spoke directly to us. | | | Derek, Last night, President Biden spoke directly to the American people in his State of the Union address.I want to briefly share some thoughts with you—about our progress over the last two years, about my special guest to the State of the Union, and about the work ahead. We have made historic progress under President Biden and the Democratic majority. Unemployment is at its lowest rate since 1969, and inflation is starting to come down. We have taken steps to tackle climate change, improved veterans’ healthcare, and passed a robust infrastructure bill to rebuild our roads, rails, and bridges. These are just a few of the victories Democrats have delivered for the American people in just the last two years. I chose my State of the Union guest with this progress in mind, as an opportunity to highlight our work on bringing down drug prices. Last night, I was honored to be joined by Mrs. Marguerite Bailey Young, a 94-year-old widow from Fredericksburg who relies on daily medications including two types of insulin. After Democrats passed the Inflation Reduction Act, her insulin costs dropped significantly and she no longer has to worry about whether she will be able to afford her life-saving medication. Going forward, we need to finish the job of capping exorbitant insulin prices for all Americans. I was proud to see President Biden recommit to that mission in the State of the Union. On this and a number of other issues, President Biden made clear that we are not finished making progress for the American people. Here are a few of the other priorities mentioned last night that Democrats will champion going forward into the 2024 Presidential Election: With the family of Tyre Nichols and a heroic survivor of the Monterey Park shooting in the gallery, President Biden made a bold call for police reform and an assault weapons ban. Democrats can and must lead the fight to make our communities safer. We know that civil rights and reproductive freedom are under attack in states around the country. The President made clear last night that Democrats won’t back down from defending the rights and dignity of every American. We are also going to need a bipartisan deal to raise the debt ceiling, protect the full faith and credit of the United States, and prevent a financial catastrophe. These are just a few of the important priorities Democrats are going to pursue in the coming months. I won’t sugar-coat things, Derek, the next couple years are going to be tough. Between the House Republican opposition, a difficult 2024 Senate map, and a potential Trump-Biden rematch, we are going to have to work hard to continue making progress for the American people. = Thank you, Mark Warner = | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: =?utf-8?Q?Andrew=20Roth?=
subject: IL Freedom Caucus vs. IL Democrats
body:
| | | |
---
| | | **Friends,**

One thing that your state freedom caucuses are doing on a routine basis is killing procedures and legislation that will never make the headlines. What used to pass with little opposition is now being challenged...for the first time...by our 100+ state lawmakers across our 10 state freedom caucuses.

Supporters of bad bills are now realizing that they’ll actually have **to speak out and defend their bad bills. **Some of them now don’t want to go through the arduous effort. They were comfortable passing such legislation in the dark. But now that we’re exposing it to sunlight, they decline to fight...and we win.

Case in point...the blue state of Illinois.

Back in December, the Illinois Freedom Caucus called on the Springfield Establishment to end the use of the “consent calendar”.

This innocuous sounding calendar is actually quite nefarious. Liberal Democrats who control the Illinois House, along with some Republicans, allowed dozens of bills to be lumped together and passed with limited debate and only a single up-or-down vote. Most of the bills on the consent calendar are portrayed as harmless, but they include such things as automatic benefit increases for retired bureaucrats (who are already overpaid). Another bill would give woke universities the ability to more arbitrarily admit students based on things other than standardized test scores.

Last week, Illinois Democrats – faced with a possible public debate with the ILFC – decided to kill the consent calendar outright. Instead of thousands of bills passing swiftly into law without debate they must now go through the slow, deliberate process of “regular order”.

**Bottom line – Six brave conservatives in Illinois were able to face down 78 Democrat House members and won.**

Even in blue states like Illinois, we’re taking the fight to supporters of big government. This is how we win...even when the odds are stacked against us.

Please donate to the State Freedom Caucus Network TODAY. ** ** The best way to save our country is to fight in the states, so we need your help!

**Keep fighting,**

**Andy Roth**
**President
State Freedom Caucus Network**

P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation’s state capitols and in your home state. Please consider a [contribution here](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=4574189f3b&e=64ecec6d03) and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty.

But that’s the reality for so many folks across the country. | | | = Peter, Wiley ran for Congress on a message of bipartisanship. Last nights message from President Biden was right on - it's vital for lawmakers to keep working together for every American. In Congress, Wiley is working hard and fighting to lower costs for working North Carolina families. That includes: → Lowering prescription drug costs → Investing in American workers and US manufacturing → Making housing more affordable = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | = Wiley got into public service because he saw firsthand how a healthcare crisis can shake a family. Americans should not go into debt from a medical emergency. Parents should not have to choose between the medicine they need and putting food on the table. But that’s the reality for so many folks across the country. We must elect representatives who will work to build a better future. = Thank you. Team Wiley P.S. If you’re able to make a monthly commitment of just $10, which helps our campaign plan ahead more than you know, you can do that through this direct link: = Wiley Nickel is the Congressman for NC-13. His 2022 opponent, Bo Hines, has announced he'll run against Wiley in 2024. name: NRSC
subject: Biden’s report card
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Joe Biden has failed the American People, Fellow American.

**He’s opened our borders.
Inflation is out of control under his watch.
He’s stopped American energy independence.**
If you were to give a grade to President **Joe Biden** for his first two years in the White House, [**what would it be?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=998682a7b7054cfdbf39a7a606057f54&_e=BsNM5BQFXyYY09EIce2aLLtB5tHZZg3vnKa8A70H-SrogUvhQaHDF5EuFxC_f9rJ17pNPzsWvMGr3fpfpID3J01Ocd83qDu7t6vZyDCJtxAiH2L1r0yALAWw6sa1tzHTSQUixmECYDrJHUIFSIqw6ZFOKllLP0rUlNvvl_cRB_dlWGVWlXDq7iwx26Ncodsl0Ny0wtB81NOal_Ir5jugqWzF2LQ6-TSsvn8QzqNGft55l5cU5wcOCXQoG8NV9hUISEL59CX2XqfWmaOjI43fx0s5V7LgqR-jIGwB-TW7X7MsyhZ_Ql-txuu_C1y2yHKpPG5PAItKPErz-Z9uL-d83zqKfSUAfGqZmiifsBSMQ8Kr4PiCedjtJ9TJdB5hg-nr7PZxY_YsOw5IsqDa8YDgoEGOi5JQqB0mDIo9__Vi3GjVghuErLSDopGOdM8CYo12)

We know how disastrous the Biden White House has been for our country -- **which is why we’re working so hard now to win a critical new GOP Senate Majority in 2024.**

Fellow American, we’ve all seen it.

**Foreign enemies are emboldened while our allies doubt American resolve.
Crime is rising and our country is more divided.
**
So by any reasonable standard, Joe Biden deserves a great big ‘F’...

But what do you think, Fellow American? [**Tell us your own grade for Joe Biden NOW!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=998682a7b7054cfdbf39a7a606057f54&_e=BsNM5BQFXyYY09EIce2aLLtB5tHZZg3vnKa8A70H-SrogUvhQaHDF5EuFxC_f9rJ17pNPzsWvMGr3fpfpID3J01Ocd83qDu7t6vZyDCJtxAiH2L1r0yALAWw6sa1tzHTSQUixmECYDrJHUIFSIqw6ZFOKllLP0rUlNvvl_cRB_dlWGVWlXDq7iwx26Ncodsl0Ny0wtB81NOal_Ir5jugqWzF2LQ6-TSsvn8QzqNGft55l5cU5wcOCXQoG8NV9hUISEL59CX2XqfWmaOjI43fx109MWJh_OFBTk0pgWDW-ggDnXvfDVLl3cCh3-O6na8KkMcl6HJyY_psfPlWNTBbxt3TnpRRGMGaiGPKKh5d5ta1MJQCIacea-oFQRymHKMi9vogZj2SzXcuE2szyaRaApJqWzKdp6klRad8IQAbgz2Uvtd-JIGUMCsQ31irNkmL)

\- Senate Republicans

[**Grade Biden >>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=998682a7b7054cfdbf39a7a606057f54&_e=BsNM5BQFXyYY09EIce2aLLtB5tHZZg3vnKa8A70H-SrogUvhQaHDF5EuFxC_f9rJ17pNPzsWvMGr3fpfpID3J01Ocd83qDu7t6vZyDCJtxAiH2L1r0yALAWw6sa1tzHTSQUixmECYDrJHUIFSIqw6ZFOKllLP0rUlNvvl_cRB_dlWGVWlXDq7iwx26Ncodsl0Ny0wtB81NOal_Ir5jugqWzF2LQ6-TSsvn8QzqNGft55l5cU5wcOCXQoG8NV9hUISEL59CX2XqfWmaOjI43fx55GpPVH_oSX21wve6pvRkg2k1DafHbNPTAWVG4aluD3mUHFu18zky7hoqHoSqE_FFpgmdvqEgzCymXlqtGq4nTFJR7wcpeHBym9SkyIH558eP4CCQdq1xwoeNEnuDpfjf5sqRw_eTOPBuzpb3JnKZAyWo9N4ciQE6xQuOuliHR7)

body:

Friend, I have a few minutes between meetings, so I wanted to reach out with my thoughts on President Biden's State of the Union address last night.
As I sat in the House chamber listening to our president lay out his vision to build a better future for our country, I couldn't help but think about all of the GOP lawmakers who are doing everything in their power to stand in the way of that vision.
If we're going to restore reproductive rights nationwide, continue rebuilding our economy, end America's gun violence epidemic, bolster voting rights, establish paid leave and so much more, we _**cannot**_ let Republicans deliver Senate control to Mitch McConnell next year. Friend, the harsh reality is, our entire Democratic agenda hinges on keeping the Senate blue.
**But R epublicans only need to win two more seats to retake the majority, and Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is already reporting that they have a clear path to do just that. If Democrats are going to build up enough resources to defeat the GOP and their megadonor allies, we need grassroots supporters like you to invest in this fight right here, right now.**
