Experts at The Washington Post are saying that the fight for Senate control is shaping up to be brutal for Democrats, so we can't take a single seat for granted. **But here's the problem:**
**Here in New York, Republicans just had their best election cycle in _two decades_ — winning enough seats to deliver the House majority to the GOP.** Now, they’re targeting my seat as a key pickup opportunity to flip the Senate next.
**I don't take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I'm relying entirely on grassroots supporters like you to step up right away and show Mitch McConnell and his allies that this seat isn't up for grabs.[With Senate control on the line, can I please count on you to rush $5 right now to help me defeat the GOP in New York, protect our Democratic Senate majority and continue fighting for the issues you care about most?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58465841/391168098/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk3917-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2E0Y2YwMi0wNWE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zKcW4qxdjkckBNaNeRgCoi7CvJh2AFYUkoTONHerLRU=)**
Thank you for your support, friend. I can't win without you.

Kirsten Gillibrand

As a member of the Conservative Climate Caucus, _Lori is dedicated to finding practical solutions to climate change that protect our environment while also supporting energy production._

name: Tim Scott
subject: If you only open one email today, I pray it’sthis one
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---
| | | | | | [<HUGE ANNOUNCEMENT>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjdrpsb71p2pk306pibn4j52kvb8ncnrcn8akipo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3ie1p32clh2bs "Generic Button")
---
Friend, it's Senator Tim Scott. I've been trying to get a hold of you all week.

I need you to see this major announcement before 11:59 PM tonight. I've always been able to count on you in the past, so please don't let me down this time.

Access here before midnight tonight:
📎 **[majorannouncement.timscott.doc](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2dqv88odmjv1t2ggfq19ugavjtasslkqnags6qg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3ie1p32clh2bs "majorannouncement.timscott.doc")** 📎
---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z10pah3r8ism9fg6userljc5hf6iq89dd54ucp18_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3ie1p32clh2bs)
---

Senator Tim Scott here. Serving the people of South Carolina is the most incredible honor of my life, but none of this would be possible without your support.
I made a promise many years ago that I would do everything possible to restore the American Dream and create opportunities for other kids who grew up like I did-in a single-parent home with a mom who worked two jobs just to put food on the table and keep the lights on.

**_Only in our great country can the grandson of a cotton picker grow up to serve in both chambers of Congress. _**
This is just the beginning. **[Can I count on you to join my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z58ttf0grcbn75vh0ulq272gd17fb27b76ullna0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3ie1p32clh2bs "Can I count on you to join my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?")**

---

Thank you for everything, and God Bless,

Tim Scott
---

CHARLESTON, SC 29407

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: TODAY: Celebrating Black History Month With Leader Hakeem Jeffries — Wednesday, February 8th at 6:45 PM ET / 3:45 PM PT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58450771/391130765/909662492?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWU3ODE2MS1kYmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aEjzRCqsataxRvs07-BAqR8Ttpp0M_NuTQOAbEn3o1U=&emci=0564c14d-d9a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=f1e78161-dba7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=16320219) TODAY – Join me, House Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries and our grassroots VIPs to celebrate Black History Month, reflect on President Biden’s State of the Union Address on the outstanding results that Democrats delivered For The People, and discuss the work ahead for Democrats! Wednesday, February 8th, 2023, at 6:45 PM ET / 3:45 PM PT. Register here: [_**https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/7716757959601/WN_WdEquzWkQ5-Tw3iGeX5Ukw**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58450772/391130766/909662492?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWU3ODE2MS1kYmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aEjzRCqsataxRvs07-BAqR8Ttpp0M_NuTQOAbEn3o1U=&emci=0564c14d-d9a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=f1e78161-dba7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=16320219) I look forward to seeing you! Thank you! NANCY
* * *
Dear Friends, As we celebrate Black History Month throughout February, I am thrilled to announce that our very special guest for our first Grassroots Volunteers Update of the 118th Congress will be none other than House Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries! Join us on Wednesday, February 8th at 6:45 PM ET / 3:45 PM PT. Register here: [_**https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/7716757959601/WN_WdEquzWkQ5-Tw3iGeX5Ukw**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58450773/391130767/909662492?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWU3ODE2MS1kYmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aEjzRCqsataxRvs07-BAqR8Ttpp0M_NuTQOAbEn3o1U=&emci=0564c14d-d9a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=f1e78161-dba7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=16320219) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58450774/391130768/909662492?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWU3ODE2MS1kYmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aEjzRCqsataxRvs07-BAqR8Ttpp0M_NuTQOAbEn3o1U=&emci=0564c14d-d9a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=f1e78161-dba7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=16320219)
---

The highest-ranking Democrat in the House and the first African American to lead a party in either chamber of Congress, Leader Jeffries is a proud son of Brooklyn, NY, and a tireless advocate for social and economic justice.
He has devoted himself to helping his constituents and communities across our country recover from the devastation of the COVID-19 pandemic, reforming our criminal justice system, improving the economy for everyday Americans, protecting our healthcare and defending our Democracy.
We will talk about his historic ascent to lead House Democrats’ ongoing work For The People, the progress that we delivered in the 117th Congress working with President Biden and our reflections on the State of the Union. Leader Jeffries will share his priorities for this term and discuss the hard work ahead on key issues impacting the Black Community, including the need for Justice in Policing, protecting voting rights and defending our personal freedoms and Democracy.
Leader Jeffries takes pride in his connection to the families in his District and knows that we can only do so much with our inside maneuvering in the Congress without the passion of our VIPs, our Volunteers in Politics, and their outside mobilization that gets us across the finish line. Our Democratic House Caucus, our party, and the American people are well-served with House Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries at the helm for Democrats in the House.
Sign up now!
[_**https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/7716757959601/WN_WdEquzWkQ5-Tw3iGeX5Ukw**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58450775/391130769/909662492?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWU3ODE2MS1kYmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aEjzRCqsataxRvs07-BAqR8Ttpp0M_NuTQOAbEn3o1U=&emci=0564c14d-d9a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=f1e78161-dba7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=16320219)
NANCY

Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi is the U.S. Representative for California’s 11th District.
She's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy.
We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.
Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support?
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58450776/391130771/1694321165?refcode=footer&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWU3ODE2MS1kYmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aEjzRCqsataxRvs07-BAqR8Ttpp0M_NuTQOAbEn3o1U=)**

**[SHOP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58450777/391130772/-1622768287?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWU3ODE2MS1kYmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aEjzRCqsataxRvs07-BAqR8Ttpp0M_NuTQOAbEn3o1U=&emci=0564c14d-d9a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=f1e78161-dba7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=16320219)**
Nancy isn't one to back down from a fight, and we're in this for the long haul. We'd hate to see you leave our movement completely, but if you must, please click [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/D6uJxOgDQUu8umzAjMQV8g2?unsubscribedata=m4sq4cO5WIZtQ77sXnTxAQQqoEVvXsPrdyrwdmf2z%2BDj8zYza8lOrotHCW%2BvTMXmz%2Fc3YMBU7ntg74AYejiVq1%2Fpcxwr2sSSGLoVrWKJoUnX0c%2FWAajFgUj%2F4DmDn%2BrVxD0R470oSKzc1pareHljsllHJNWDmMug3zApPAYgafmM7QBzISZDsOoOEteknBRETueuIGTaB9RAcQiChpVmmQ9Ib4xAgX3nKz9RpBvgPOIa1nEjqa9p0aKFKzzcI836vIElDR3yfMNVfSITTkq5nFxzoaETNwKkDuSz9Kh8q%2FgYPVFJpK7NExtPune%2F6T97%2BLGevP5rUHn22lQi9Q7mYiiAdYh0VWqg2%2BWid2Gc2tiLNcRCAHF0pZDW9%2BgnqvNuqZk6IkAypYJnK2YXLhFCYxZgMdixOrRmwZvIwj%2BK8gClHhnom8KnmErD55zZf2hp).

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: A weak state of the union
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
The fight against the Left has never been more important
| [](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=d60ea89aba8d4866a74acdf10eee0c54&_e=Wv-bZnG-YYG0ssNgfeS3DUhisioL25GZi4koJ2adtuXx5OEaXHRdlKDqEedfhYLhlIB2JxftC1poDwYzWOz6qZmdHZ6-USIFBOr9_C2-BZprl0yYsEhA-rhPQ7bPlkZRS8JPk-ZdSsb8vHRUn4KGHGatH1Sk0DIfkwv2jWnPnvMnV3a97TXntEjRQuc6ps9-pjrGcCTOrg_uI0dKaU_EnpnH9Rn7UQbx5sMMz5rlFZzeKMa0DGFR8Gus3MnKzF5vNYhydpqHR88y-5ocxlNaL0Gvt-f3a2vS-x4bhGMZ2TgkWl2kJB2g6nJwf1aBx5egZYz5smLyD2KN1d0dts2a3NekiwkzDEP-1aNbAL74uMA%3D)
---
Peter,
---
Last night, Joe Biden issued another disappointing State of the Union address where he gloated about his so-called accomplishments over the past two years.
---
**The reality is all he’s done for this country is accomplish one failure after another.**
---
And his insistence that our country is doing great things under his leadership shows just how out of touch he really is.
---
_That’s why on the heels of Biden’s State of the Union Address, I am asking you to join me in this critical fight against his failing agenda to get our country back on track._
---

clean_body: The fight against the Left has never been more important | Peter, Last night, Joe Biden issued another disappointing State of the Union address where he gloated about his so-called accomplishments over the past two years. The reality is all he’s done for this country is accomplish one failure after another. And his insistence that our country is doing great things under his leadership shows just how out of touch he really is. That’s why on the heels of Biden’s State of the Union Address, I am asking you to join me in this critical fight against his failing agenda to get our country back on track. Americans are struggling to put food on their table due to the high cost of goods thanks to the record inflation plaguing the country. Fentanyl is crossing our border at unprecedented rates and killing our children due to this administration’s open-border policies. And most recently, Biden made America look weak by allowing a Chinese spy balloon to fly over our country for days before we FINALLY shot it down, threatening our national security. These are NOT signs of a strong state of the union. And now, the day after his inaccurate speech, he is traveling to our great state of Wisconsin, a top battleground state for 2024, to try to sway voters with more lies about his success. But we will no longer allow Biden to leave Americans behind in his fight for complete and total control. It’s up to us to fight against the Left’s failing agenda for a better future for our country. And with your help, I know that we can win this fight and restore America to its former glory. Thank you, Rep. name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: President Biden’s State of the Union
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress **[marcykaptur
body:
I’m ready to keep up the work. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58453201/391132345/-1372990689?refcode=EM_C_230208FR_N_MK_45DA_6_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTA0MGNiYi1kZWE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_TkCEbRKdnqZVRx9SP_nqxCDAr45jIqsM4RPl7jFwhY=)
---
Last night President Biden reflected on his first two years in office, laid out his vision for the future, and gave his report on the State of our Union.

I’ve listened to many State of the Union addresses, and I’ve never been prouder of what we’ve accomplished and our President’s vision for the future. After a successful 117th Congress, our work is now focused on making sure implementation reaches forgotten areas like the ones in our district.

In the last two years, we’ve been able to pass major legislation like the bipartisan infrastructure bill and the Inflation Reduction Act that will make meaningful impacts on the lives of everyday Ohioans. I’m proud to be able to bring these investments home to my constituents and know that we’re moving forward together.

I’ve said it before, but I know that we can still get things done regardless of who has the Speaker's gavel.

From funding for job training in our schools or constructing the World War II Memorial to securing funding for a vegetable garden at a senior housing complex and holding back the Asian carp’s invasion of the Great Lakes, no project can be too small or too daunting.

I’m ready to keep up the work, and I’m glad you’re on my team alongside me as we work to deliver for Northern Ohio.

Thank you,

Marcy Kaptur
---
| | Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. She is focused on getting big money out of politics, holding Wall Street accountable, fighting against bad trade deals that harm workers, ensuring access to health care for all, and restoring our Great Lakes. **Can you help Marcy by giving any amount today?** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58453204/391132346/-1372990689?refcode=EM_C_230208FR_N_MK_45DA_6_NG_N_Biobox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTA0MGNiYi1kZWE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_TkCEbRKdnqZVRx9SP_nqxCDAr45jIqsM4RPl7jFwhY=)

name: Andy Kim
subject: Improvements. Not cuts.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
I wanted to make sure you saw my note about Social Security and Medicare. I've seen firsthand how these programs are helping people, especially since the passage of the Inflation Reduction Act.

I was honored to be joined at President Biden's State of the Union address last evening by Marta Nelson from Southampton, New Jersey.

Marta used to pay hundreds of dollars for her insulin every month – even with Medicare. Because of the Inflation Reduction Act, her insulin is capped at $35 a month, saving her and so many like her thousands of dollars every year.

Now, as President Biden said last night, we've got to get the job done and cap insulin at $35 for every American.

As we take this week to reflect on the state of our union, I hope we can use the time to come together and support policies like this one that are quickly and effectively improving the lives of seniors like Marta.

Social Security and Medicare work. They need improvements, not cuts.

As I said, I have and always will work to protect and expand these vital programs.

Andy

Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-02-08-sotu&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=6bc9d8f9-dea7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73]

Forwarded Message

https://andykimforcongress.com/ [https://andykimforcongress.com/]

Social Security and Medicare work. These programs have kept millions of seniors out of poverty for decades. They're immensely popular for good reason.

Yet year after year, Washington Republicans target Social Security and Medicare.

Now they're using the debt ceiling as an excuse to gut these programs, holding seniors and our country hostage. Congressional Republican leaders have already shown that they'll grind our entire government to a halt to get their way.

I'll have and will always fight to protect the promises we make to seniors when they pay into Social Security and Medicare.

Our grassroots movement is about serving and looking out for one another – that includes protections and improvements for Social Security and Medicare. Every hard-working American deserves to retire with dignity.

With your help, I know we can protect seniors' retirement, and two important programs that have the ability to benefit seniors, our kids, and generations to come.

With hope and gratitude,

Andy

Peter, Last night marked the first State of the Union Address I attended as a Member of Congress, so I wanted to share a few takeaways:[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5gOujJU4G2FQlGZnk4uqA0WItqqJyJPc6AGRosYvZFm4qrr0IyTLLTGp1OjKivqRz22s4HVyjHHk41-T1HFy5O-2dIcewTz-vbcI5Kz-wZS1txDjHMzDCKOuE3Yox-LZZNe_QFeqsJ84Y-GAnS0BBWM6p1Doj3_kwYTMjjk_WLF_kQsK0cDP4eUq2S3LB_RmqU0xoPdWRlqunOj2nE6dlWuhvOLM-9OXYoIsR0X1PIBYyqg27cmJqDs7lgSmB2RhopmstLs543ZB-UubfLPKupFtYGW10O606r9H8ixkRIqk2vrtCTgHpLfo60O5FOhM31t3Dh3Jg-JLyg1-CzoZNIKHNEH3_-cZzS7wqnEmIfAa-HAudSmmr1b7qnlBHzWcbJ0As5PvssNShRcsHiqQCY6fMA1QzmWWmjfpUTGSmbHcTkpqTVXS8d6k3zMRGl5P8rOEZTaD_QdhFrudLu_2rqrx1PMm-wysE6lOqRRItcfeKM-RXxIffMtaEQO65vM8BQHxeiuzHwFF9HbXFdmMN7QbHPOuum8DF2YiPjfL6wz1Cb0pAZObWu1xRuSR74EUFaA40wMUs7NL2F1dEnduF/3tj/TMvAASx9RzC3EV0k2Smgpw/h1/gGtSQEr_x2ajNeFmHLN4BwfuxQF-gyPNd_a7SrC-bwk)
---
* The energy in the room last night was palpable. >From my vantage in the House chamber, it was clear that Senate and House Democrats were more than pleased with the President’s speech.

* The President effectively outlined his accomplishments – creating a record number of jobs and passing landmark legislation to address climate change. He also spoke directly to the American people with empathy and respect. As someone with a communications background, I was impressed with how he both recognized the hardships Americans face and gave tangible reasons as to why we can be optimistic about the future.

* There were a few disappointing moments. President Biden went above and beyond to strike a bipartisan tone, but was still obnoxiously heckled by Marjorie Taylor Greene and the ‘MAGA’ crew. After his speech, Sarah Huckabee Sanders delivered the GOP rebuttal, which really exposed the Republicans’ lack of policy priorities. Their focus is not on improving lives. It’s on waging divisive culture wars and getting in the way of progress.

---
**I want to be very clear here: Like President Biden, I have no issue working alongside Republicans if it means improving lives in my district. But last night showed us that one party is thinking deeply about addressing the needs of the American people, while the other is simply not.** [**Retaking the House has never been more important, and if we unite behind President Biden’s vision, we have a shot at keeping swing districts like mine blue. Will you help us win back our majority in 2024 by chipping in a grassroots donation?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5gOujJU4G2FQlGZnk4uqA0WItqqJyJPc6AGRosYvZFm4qrr0IyTLLTGp1OjKivqRz22s4HVyjHHk41-T1HFy5O-2dIcewTz-vbcI5Kz-wZS1txDjHMzDCKOuE3Yox-LZZNe_QFeqsJ84Y-GAnS0BB-GKAqTl-Ygm10UqXajLQvOmm28IDxYLxL2zifOWtmRTwMQZPxoL65t9XaKFKn4V8T9RtY-OzE_6auN2flFVMCZyHcbfxT54tH4PRxESnW27iekM8bJu4Tbp1Yg2bSgFLi34IQAa6WLCZOEQSUZePT4gv3AGucFrJ2EJrufO7XtvgZ2r9QATmkO512Aj-SkkTTEpQyBz9v7SIDfZDhN3fb8eQYJffwW3zCI9iMErgXBtl7ZTGA2AITc8Hn80rs6b3Mono4uWiLbMZIMY6LYC24yTxYXZBqXNEVOvDAVQ2MNwLZD38ccDpZ_zb7JJVfY3Jfz1anNNGY3UvVuv8Bi4R9G86AEzEmCf8mLCL4Zlt0-a9Zvp_XySu8IUhy09X9vqh_IVAE5PBivVe_iF296MTDbn8_MZPyyQpqGxfmek1shvHZPs1wfJZO0kl3w5pNeRH/3tj/TMvAASx9RzC3EV0k2Smgpw/h2/PPBVqgHm7wwas6iab8lpI3y5K1_tpucdhlDrjZm_pvU)

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Lie, after lie, after lie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | | |
---

Peter,

Last night Joe Biden came to the People's House and did what he does best... LIE.

He lied about the Border. He lied about the economy. And he lied about Republicans wanting to cut Social Security.

name: =?utf-8?Q?DNC=20Community=20Engagement?=
subject: He's Got Your Back!
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a7b9148e04b2/hes-got-your-back?e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
|
---
|
---
| | | Dear Friends, Last night, President Joe Biden reaffirmed his promises to the American people. He will continue to rebuild the backbone of the country, unite the nation, and put Americans first. He is asking Congress, and you, to help him **finish the job.** Over the past 2 years, he has worked across the aisle with Republicans to implement an economic plan that is built from the bottom up and the middle out, not the top down. The President highlighted a near-record unemployment rate for Black and Brown workers, and how his administration has seen a record-breaking 10 million applications for new small businesses in his term so far. In addition to this, President Biden hopes to continue to build proper infrastructure across our nation, using materials made in America and employing union jobs. He wants to bring broadband and robust infrastructure to rural and Native communities. He has asked Congress to **finish the job** and to give every worker the right to unionize. President Biden was also joined in the chamber by Brandon Tsay, a hero who survived gun violence in Monterey Park, CA, and Tyre Nichol’s mother and stepfather, who sat in the First Lady’s box. While acknowledging their strength and bravery, he asks Congress and other officials to**finish the job** and take stronger measures on gun violence and police accountability. The story of America is one of progress and resilience. “We are the only nation that has emerged from every crisis stronger than we got into it.” The President’s words ring true thanks to the strength of our democracy, and the will of you, the people. President Biden knows that when we put our communities first, America succeeds. So let’s keep going these next 2 years, and**finish the job**. Sincerely, The DNC Coalitions Team
---
|
---
|
---
| **Watch the State of the Union Below**

subject: we have the receipts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brittany Pettersen for Colorado

Republicans reacted with shock and outrage at the suggestion they want to cut Social Security, even though they've been threatening to do it for years.

Team — during last night’s State of the Union address, some Republicans reacted with shock and outrage when President Biden suggested they have threatened to cut Social Security and Medicare.
It was a baffling display, because leading Republicans have been threatening to cut these vital programs _for years._ Let’s check the receipts:
Sen. Mike Lee said, “It will be my objective to phase out Social Security. To pull it out by the roots, **and get rid of it.** ”
The Republican Study Committee — which includes 156 House Republicans, well over half the conference — released a plan to raise the Social Security and Medicare retirement age to 70, **forcing Americans to work several extra years before they receive their benefits.**
Former Vice President Mike Pence just last week told a group of corporate insiders at a closed-door meeting that he supports **privatizing Social Security.**
Sen. Rick Scott last year proposed a plan to **sunset Social Security and Medicare within five years.**
And even now, House and Senate Republicans are threatening to **default on our nation’s debt if they don’t extract steep cuts to vital programs** — with some suggesting that those cuts should come from means-testing Social Security, reducing Medicare benefits, or kicking kids off Medicaid._(1)_
**Team, we can promise you this: as long as Brittany is representing Colorado, she will fight day-in and day-out to protect Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid. And she won’t let Republicans get away with making life harder for regular families in order to serve their corporate campaign donors.**
[**If you’re with Brittany in this fight, we could really use your help. Will you pitch in $25 — or any amount that works for you — so that she can stand up for our families, continue serving our community, and help flip the House blue in the next election?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58458072/391134908/572529940?refcode=email_020823_socialsecurity&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzE3NGFhMi1lMmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-dCqr8u27zTyLH0enjgexdt_a4iyqEdG6jWiCsjozdc=)

Friend,

**What an incredible victory!**

Two years after we won one of the most competitive congressional elections in the country, we got 62% of the vote.

Through your support, we knocked on tens of thousands of doors and called voters from one end of the district to the other. This unbelievable grassroots effort powered our campaign to a historic win.

Friend, it's Senator Tim Scott. I've been trying to get a hold of you all week.

name: Chrissy
subject: Let me know your priorities, Derek. Take my survey today >>
body:
Last night, President Biden gave his second official State of the Union address
| | |
---
**Last night, President Biden gave his second official State of the Union address, Derek.**
Speaking to the nation, he reminded us of his legislative accomplishments, which have extended to nearly every aspect of American life, and his leadership in the global coalition to back Ukraine’s defenses and democracies worldwide. These achievements will certainly echo for decades.

In sharing his vision for our country, he laid out his top priorities for the coming year, which include paid leave. I couldn't agree more with the president. Paid family leave is an investment in our economic growth. That's why I led the effort to get Paid Family Leave for all federal employees, and why I continue to work to expand that right to all Americans.
**I truly appreciate President Biden’s call for progress and the importance of working together as we fight for democracy and our communities. Now our work begins.**
As we look to the coming weeks and months ahead, I am committed to doing everything in my power to put partisan politics aside and positively impact the daily lives of all Americans.

**I am ready to roll up my sleeves for working families across Pennsylvania**** – from protecting voting rights to securing investments in infrastructure and lowering costs. But hearing directly from you, Derek, is one of the best ways for me to do that.**
_[**I want to understand your perspectives and priorities so that I can represent us all in Washington. Derek, please, before our official survey closes at 11:59 p.m., will you take just two minutes to share your thoughts with me?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58458240/391136024/1192795497?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk790-su-nd&sustainers=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzk3ZTRjOC1lMmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oU88xm4xGHMprjAcG9pweXuencVEe54y9Bob-TKOI38=&emci=c4e7464f-bda7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=f797e4c8-e2a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=21278485)_
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58458246/391136033/1192795497?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk790-su-nd&sustainers=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzk3ZTRjOC1lMmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oU88xm4xGHMprjAcG9pweXuencVEe54y9Bob-TKOI38=&emci=c4e7464f-bda7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=f797e4c8-e2a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=21278485)

Serving as your representative is the honor of my lifetime, and I am excited to hear from you on how best I can advocate for you and your family.

Chrissy
| Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
P.O. Box 222
Devon, PA 19333

clean_body: | = We were going over the responses of our issues survey and noticed your name was missing, Peter. Your voice and opinions are crucial to this campaign, and that's why Phil asked us to reach out one more time before midnight to ask: What issues do you want Phil to focus on when he gets to Congress next year? Peter, we know that it feels redundant when campaigns send out these types of emails, but we're serious when we say we want your opinion. Phil is running a grassroots campaign to take the Central Valley back for the people. From fighting for a living wage to ensuring our farmers can continue feeding the country, Phil is dedicated to putting you first in Congress. ¡Vamos! name: Adam Schiff
subject: Can I explain?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
| Peter, can I have a moment to explain what is happening right now?

Two weeks ago, I announced my campaign for the United States Senate. **And then Republicans started piling on. Immediately.**

In reality, it started when Kevin McCarthy unilaterally removed me from the House Intelligence Committee.

But it’s continued. McCarthy posted a video on social media calling me a liar over, and over, and over again. Matt Gaetz introduced a resolution to prevent me from receiving classified briefings in Congress — called the _PENCIL Act._ Go figure. Even presidential wannabe Mike Pompeo joined the act attacking me.

No matter how much these MAGA Republicans hate each other, they are united in one cause: **Complete and total opposition to my efforts to provide oversight, demand accountability, and protect our democracy. And that’s why they are coming after me.**

Peter, this is bigger than me. They will try to destroy _anyone_ who stands up to them, and their leader Donald Trump. That’s why I need you to stand with me today.

[**Split a $10 donation to UniteDemocrats and our campaign to help me fight back against the vicious Republican attacks that they’re unleashing to stop our movement to save our democracy. clean_body: | Peter, can I have a moment to explain what is happening right now? Two weeks ago, I announced my campaign for the United States Senate. And then Republicans started piling on. Immediately. In reality, it started when Kevin McCarthy unilaterally removed me from the House Intelligence Committee. But it’s continued. McCarthy posted a video on social media calling me a liar over, and over, and over again. Matt Gaetz introduced a resolution to prevent me from receiving classified briefings in Congress — called the PENCIL Act. Go figure. Even presidential wannabe Mike Pompeo joined the act attacking me. No matter how much these MAGA Republicans hate each other, they are united in one cause: Complete and total opposition to my efforts to provide oversight, demand accountability, and protect our democracy. And that’s why they are coming after me. Peter, this is bigger than me. They will try to destroy anyone who stands up to them, and their leader Donald Trump. body:
Ohioans have the right to know how our state is doing business.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58458431/391136643/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjk4ZTRjOC1lMmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=32nvEyTSMlhSLc37GJp6a_rFX4N65EEaJZP1TTx72gE=) | Team,

**[In a moment, I'm going to ask you to chip in to help Ohio Democrats hold corrupt Ohio Republicans accountable.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58458433/391136672/-1614137971?refcode=em23_230208_corrup_fndd_gq_act___LW_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230208_corrup_fndd_gq_act___LW_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjk4ZTRjOC1lMmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=32nvEyTSMlhSLc37GJp6a_rFX4N65EEaJZP1TTx72gE=)** But first, let me explain why bringing transparency to our state is so crucial.

Last month, the trial of disgraced former Speaker Larry Householder and former Ohio Republican Party Chair Matt Borges began for their alleged role in a $60 million dollar bribery scheme involving a _$1 billion dollar_ bailout for FirstEnergy’s nuclear power plants.

We know that top-level GOP politicians and operatives took millions of dollars from dark money groups connected to FirstEnergy and used that money to enrich themselves and fellow Republicans. While Householder and Borges are the ones on trial, the corruption runs far deeper – from Governor Mike DeWine to Matt Dolan to Dave Yost and Frank LaRose.

Radical Republican politicians have been robbing hard-working Ohioans for far too long. Ohioans have the right to know how our state is doing business – and corruption and bribery at the expense of working people is **unacceptable**. Ohioans deserve leadership without exploitation – and we're fighting hard to ensure justice is delivered.

We’re hopeful Householder and Borges will be brought to justice soon – and we’re also working hard to ensure that Republican politicians who have stood complicit as they orchestrated their illegal schemes will be held accountable, too. But we can't win the fight for accountability and justice without your support, team.

clean_body: Did you see this? | | | | | Wow, friend. When President Biden addressed the nation last night, we figured it was going to be bad, but we didn’t think it would be THAT bad. Team Kean tried to keep a tally of how many lies were being told, but we lost count—quickly. Frankly, we weren’t sure which prosperous country Biden was talking about last night, but here in the United States: ❌ China spied on us from our own airspace ❌ Gas prices are climbing (again) ❌ The Southern Border remains open ...and that was just this week! Biden and his allies can try their best to spin the catastrophic failures of their two years of unchecked power in Washington, but they can’t spin the harsh reality that many Americans are facing. It’s time for Washington to get to work so we can face our problems head on and get to work solving them. Thank you, and let’s get to work. —Team Kean | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Kean for Congress Inc Copyright © 2023 Kean for Congress Our mailing address is: Kean for Congress Inc PO Box 999 Edison, NJ 08818 Click to mail your donation. body:
Time sensitive

Peter - our Membership Drive deadline is a few days away, and we're reaching out because we haven't heard from you yet (renew your membership here and your contribution will be tripled https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/~ ).

The truth is your membership matters, and it's particularly critical right now.

Here's the situation: Earlier this month, Senator Joe Manchin backed away from a climate deal after months of negotiations, choosing to side with Big Oil and Republicans. It leaves the deal one vote short -- stalling any real action in Congress for now.

In response, we're redoubling our efforts on pushing the White House to act decisively on climate. The Biden administration has massive amounts of power to curb climate pollution - but that will only happen if the environmental movement makes it happen.

Right now, we're facing a critical test: the Biden administration is weighing a plan to block all new oil and gas drilling leases on public waters.

This could be huge -- and a decision is coming. Right now, we're organizing volunteers from all over the country to flood the administration with letters, pressuring Biden to hold to his promises.

Peter -- it's your membership support that makes victory possible here. But we have to do more. A group of donors has put together a fund to triple match every contribution before Sunday's membership deadline:

Can we count on your support? Claim your membership now - it only takes $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/rNykfkeEevM_

The ban on new oil and gas leases is the first of many huge environmental decisions, Peter. And right now, we're pushing for serious action on so many fronts -- including:
Setting tight standards for power plants and other major emitters of climate pollution
Placing strict limits on air pollution to safeguard all communities Expediting requirements of 100% tailpipe pollution-free new cars by 2035 and trucks by 2040
Protecting communities from hazardous and super-polluting methane Conserving 30% of our public lands and waters by 2030 Declaring a climate emergency - and so much more. The best way you can help win each and every one of these fights right now is to claim your LCV membership - all it takes is a gift of $5 or more. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/j9y2f_

Thank you, thank you, thank you, Peter. This is such a critical moment for the environment, and we're so fortunate to have you on the team.

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9173640&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY4MDIwNTIxOQS2&spReportId=MTY4MDIwNTIxOQS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9173640&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY4MDIwNTIxOQS2&spReportId=MTY4MDIwNTIxOQS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/6Lg6B~ https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9173640&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY4MDIwNTIxOQS2&spReportId=MTY4MDIwNTIxOQS2

subject: Want to shrink Kevin McCarthy’s majority this month?
body:
Special election in Virginia
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7fa111d0-2a4c-4deb-887c-e38c754567fa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [**We Have Less than Two Weeks To Shrink Kevin McCarthy's Majority!!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1411f813-6f34-4741-bd0a-133f0c440100/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _In just 13 days, there will be a special election in Virginia's 4th Congressional District. Our incredible Democratic candidate, Jennifer McClellan, would be the first African-American to represent the district and another vote for Leader Hakeem Jeffries!_ She describes herself like this: \--- _I believe in the power of government to make people’s lives better — and I’ve spent the past 18 years as a public servant helping Virginians and solving problems, from passing the Voting Rights Act of Virginia to the Reproductive Health Protection Act.

**But my work doesn’t stop here – because there are still more people to help and problems to solve.**

My team has a plan to win. We’re distributing yard signs, airing new ads, and meeting voters all over the district – but our critical voter outreach efforts are expensive._ _\---_
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T99e64080-d3e0-4444-8199-8cdb1d969af4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **McClellan's opponent, Leon Benjamin, is a MAGA NUT who pushed the dangerous conspiracy theory Trump didn't lose the 2020 election and when Benjamin ran for this seat in 2022 and lost, he refused to concede. He's a bigot who attacks immigrants, a** nd _he'll provide Kevin McCarthy another vote in Congress._ **_We must ensure that in 13 days we send Jennifer McClellan, not this nutcase, to Congress. We don't need more Marjorie Taylor Greenes in the Capitol._** [**_Can you join us in rushing Jennifer McClellan $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can so she can put those funds to use and win this crucial congressional seat?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td3527288-6e4d-4d74-be94-746d9440cba7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you so much, Blue Amp Action community!_ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta6409fa5-7fba-4e7a-ab84-52047d57ea8c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | Friend, **The fight isn’t over. The fight has only just begun. ** As we welcome the Republican controlled house, we undertake an era of divided government. The Democratic rule is officially over, and house Republicans have promised to hold the out-of-touch Democrats accountable by launching major investigations. YET, this won’t stop the Democratic-controlled Senate from taking advantage of their majority and passing restrictive gun bills that harm law-abiding gun owners like **YOU** – as they continue to do nothing to prevent the rising crime rates facing our major cities.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Citizens=20Alliance=20New=20Hampshire?=
subject: Are you ready, Peter?
body:
Those who have not taken The Pledge in New Hampshire are seeking to impose gun control, rent control and additional licensure restrictions on our... | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/37a0f94f7b73/thank-you-for-signing-the-pledge-9248257?e=8c8e704ee6)
---
Peter,
My name is Dan Gray and I am the Executive Director of Citizens Alliance of New Hampshire.

Since July 2022, I have been leading our organization in an effort to garner support for liberty in the state and have had tremendous success thus far with over 70 lawmakers signing The Pledge.

I began my fight for liberty in New Hampshire back in 2018 when I started a campaign for State Representative. Since then, I have been an advocate for liberty through my previous work as Chair of the Rockingham County Young Republicans, and now with Citizens Alliance of New Hampshire.

At Citizens Alliance of New Hampshire, we've developed The Pledge. This is a guarantee that New Hampshire lawmakers must take their oath of office seriously by committing to important ideals like defending the rights of individuals, upholding the laws enshrined in our Constitutions, and protecting limited government.
[](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=10d0c94e65&e=8c8e704ee6)
| [CHIP IN $25 OR MORE TODAY TO HELP US ADVANCE INDIVIDUAL LIBERTY IN CONCORD >>>](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=c784380d58&e=8c8e704ee6)
---
By signing The Pledge, lawmakers demonstrate that they are determined to build a stronger and more prosperous future for all Granite Staters.

Our Pledge champions are fighting to reduce taxes, responsibly spend funds, expand school choice options, and protect our "Live Free or Die" state.
Others seek to impose gun control, rent control, and impose further restrictions on our liberties.

I am writing to ask for your help in spreading liberty throughout New Hampshire and keeping our state free from those who want to take away our rights.

Thank you so much for your support!
[](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=9ccd850857&e=8c8e704ee6)
Daniel Gray
Executive Director
Citizens Alliance of New Hampshire
| | | | [](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=c342d91d8d&e=8c8e704ee6)| [](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=a4151c4f41&e=8c8e704ee6)| [](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=ff785ec514&e=8c8e704ee6)
---|---|---

body:
Don’t delay: We need to hear from 83 more people in Pennsylvania!
| | | **BREAKING via CNN: 72% of viewers APPROVE of Biden's State of the Union address**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/11902?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230208-StateofTheUnionUpdate-BidenApprovalRipRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230208-StateofTheUnionUpdate-BidenApprovalRipRF-Pros-sl1&akid=9762%2E9716520%2ESAPgty)
**President Biden just earned MASSIVE approval numbers for his State of the Union address, but we still don’t know where you stand:**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/11902?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230208-StateofTheUnionUpdate-BidenApprovalRipRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230208-StateofTheUnionUpdate-BidenApprovalRipRF-Pros-sl1&akid=9762%2E9716520%2ESAPgty)
**Did you approve of President Biden's State of the Union address?**
| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/11902?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230208-StateofTheUnionUpdate-BidenApprovalRipRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230208-StateofTheUnionUpdate-BidenApprovalRipRF-Pros-sl1&akid=9762%2E9716520%2ESAPgty)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/11902?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230208-StateofTheUnionUpdate-BidenApprovalRipRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230208-StateofTheUnionUpdate-BidenApprovalRipRF-Pros-sl1&akid=9762%2E9716520%2ESAPgty)
---

Team -- A brand-new poll shows that nearly **_three quarters_** of viewers APPROVED of President Biden's address last night!

Americans are responding in a big way to our president's call to defend democracy at home and abroad, create millions of new jobs, and cut costs for families -- **but Republicans won’t stop until they’ve blocked _everything they can._**

We need to show that Democrats stand 100 percent behind President Biden and his bold vision, but **we’re missing 83 more responses from Pennsylvania!** So please tell us now:

**Did you approve of President Biden's State of the Union address?**

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Add your name: Pass legislation to lower the cost of insulin
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
#
Peter — At last night’s State of the Union address, President Biden reminded us of the great work we’ve accomplished so far — including passing the _Inflation Reduction Act_ , which capped insulin prices at $35 for seniors on Medicare. **Peter, President Biden said we should finish the job and cap the costs of insulin for the millions of remaining Americans who rely on insulin to stay alive.** No one should have to make the impossible decision to forgo groceries or other basic necessities to afford essential medications like insulin — but unfortunately, that’s the reality for far too many Americans. [**I agree with the President that it’s time to cap insulin costs for everyone in our country. If you agree too, I hope you’ll add your name alongside mine calling to pass legislation to cut the costs of lifesaving medications.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58460359/391145693/429535438?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230208_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2M5NjE1OS1lYmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BQ-ZHtrASVsTZsgVi9jYPVzuBlkmhsM6hReRvPHv-uQ=&emci=03c96159-eba7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=07c96159-eba7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=35007871) | | [ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58460360/391145694/429535438?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230208_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2M5NjE1OS1lYmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BQ-ZHtrASVsTZsgVi9jYPVzuBlkmhsM6hReRvPHv-uQ=&emci=03c96159-eba7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=07c96159-eba7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=35007871)
---
My guest at last night’s State of the Union was my friend David from Appleton, Wisconsin. David used to pay hundreds of dollars every month for insulin, just like millions of people on Medicare used to do.
**But since we passed the _Inflation Reduction Act_ , his out-of-pocket costs are now capped at $35 per month. We can and should make this a reality for all Americans who need this life-saving medicine.**
I’m committed to working alongside my colleagues in Congress to make it happen. For too long, big pharma companies have gotten away with charging exorbitant amounts for medicines needed to keep people healthy and alive. Well, I won’t stay silent while big pharma continues to price gouge the American people — enough is enough.
[**It’s time for Congress to cap insulin prices for everyone. If you’re with me, add your name to our petition to make this pledge a reality for millions of Americans.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58460361/391145695/429535438?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230208_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2M5NjE1OS1lYmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BQ-ZHtrASVsTZsgVi9jYPVzuBlkmhsM6hReRvPHv-uQ=&emci=03c96159-eba7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=07c96159-eba7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=35007871)
| [ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58460362/391145696/429535438?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230208_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2M5NjE1OS1lYmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BQ-ZHtrASVsTZsgVi9jYPVzuBlkmhsM6hReRvPHv-uQ=&emci=03c96159-eba7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=07c96159-eba7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=35007871)
---
Thank you for your support. I’m feeling fired up after President Biden’s speech, and I hope you are too.
— Tammy
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
---
Tammy Baldwin for Senate
P.O. Box 696
Madison, WI 53701
United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ben=20Gonzalez=2C=20Communications=20Director?=
subject: This week's Bad Bills
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Help us get the word out and submit your comments AGAINST these bad bills. | | |
---
| | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=47a741d3cf&e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| Peter,

**Democrats continue to push their bad bills through committees.** This week, Democrats on the Human services committee heard arguments for and against SB 5599, a radical gender reassignment bill that undermines parental rights.

Despite 4,536 people testifying AGAINST this bill and only 60 testifying in favor of it, radical Democrats are still likely to pass this bill through committee. We need as many voices as possible opposing this bad bill. Let your Senator know where you stand by registering your OPPOSE position through [this link.](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=84a96c3022&e=6a281f566d)
---
|
---
| Another bill recently passed out of committee, SB 5209, would REQUIRE Washington residents to vote in every major election. This bill goes completely against the principles outlined in our constitution. We have the RIGHT to vote - which implies a choice. Currently, there are no repercussions in place for not voting, however consequences were openly discussed and debated by Democrats during the committee's hearing on this bill.

[Bill sponsors talked about potential fines or community service for those choosing not to vote](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=57d2edf558&e=6a281f566d) \- consequences that could easily be added should this BAD BILL become law. [Comment on and oppose this bill here](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=b1bb495a92&e=6a281f566d).
---
|
---
| Another bill up for a hearing this week is a gun control bill that is a direct assault on your second amendment rights:
* **SB 5232:** Enhancing Requirements for purchase and transfers
* Background: This bill restricts a citizen's right to purchase firearms unless they complete a government sanctioned safety training every five years, including 'live fire' and obtain and maintain a government issued permit to purchase firearms, separate from the CPL currently in place. This bill also imposes an arbitrary ten-day delay on firearms purchases. The wait period would be delayed until the state gets around to processing the background check.
* [View Bill](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=5f30b742d3&e=6a281f566d) | [Submit a comment against](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=32025f998a&e=6a281f566d) | [Testify against this bill](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=7defb198ea&e=6a281f566d) (Register your position by TOMORROW!)

---
| One of the most important changes we need to see from Olympia is an update to the 2021 police pursuit laws that have allowed criminals to steal cars and commit crimes with impunity. There are several bills addressing this:
* **HB 1053:** Would restore the threshold to begin a vehicle puruit to reasonable suspicion that a crime has or is being committed. _Learn more about another solution, HB 1363 / SB 5352 [here](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=cc356db269&e=6a281f566d)._
* House: [View bill](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=2deed7a18e&e=6a281f566d) | [Submit a comment in support](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=884e78d893&e=6a281f566d)

While we must restore the ability of our officers to pursue criminals, we must also stop Democrats from adding more restrictions to our police. HB 1025 would eliminate qualified immunity for our officers, which would result in disasterous consequences for public safety in our state. Read this great article on what eliminating qualified immunity would mean for our officers and communities [here.](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=49c5a2d925&e=6a281f566d)
* **HB 1025:** Eliminating Qualified Immunity for Police Officers
* [View bill ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=48e099b096&e=6a281f566d)| [Submit a comment against](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=e3e8dee630&e=6a281f566d)

---
|
---

[You can view a full and updating list of bad bills on our Olympia Watch page.](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=9337dc7d6b&e=6a281f566d)

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: The State of the Union:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Last night, President Biden gave the second State of the Union Address of his presidency.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58469138/391203242/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2E1NTFjMjktMTdhOC1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5exOlaila60Tbe4nE2Zypl4cPLFfGD6_VIx0OQT8Eek=&emci=e0b55ce3-02a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=ca551c29-17a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)

Peter,

Last night, President Biden gave the second State of the Union Address of his presidency. He acknowledged the work ahead to build an even stronger nation _for all of us._

Since his last address to the nation, President Biden has made good on many of his promises. We are seeing the lowest unemployment rate since 1969, have made major strides in our infrastructure with the bipartisan infrastructure law, have codified same-sex and interracial marriage into law with the _Marriage Equality Act_ , and have fought the COVID-19 pandemic.

Peter, since he first ran, President Biden has promised to be the president for all Americans — regardless of who they voted for. And when he addressed the nation last night, it was clear that his promise had not changed.

**He is urging Democrats and Republicans to work together for the benefit of the American people. Together, we can:**

**➡️ Bring manufacturing jobs BACK to the U.S. to rebuild the nation's middle class
➡️ Cut health care costs for working families by expanding the insulin price cap to ALL Americans
➡️ Codify _Roe v. Wade_ to protect access to reproductive health care
➡️ Continue investing in climate resilience and moving America toward a clean energy future**

I am proud of all that we've been able to accomplish together – but our work is not over yet.

Like many Americans, I was disheartened by the disrespect and incivility shown by my colleagues across the aisle. Now, more than ever, it's crucial that we work towards uniting Americans from all walks of life to decide our nation's future. The American people want progress — not partisan games and chaos.

**Toward that end, I remain committed to working to deliver results for the American people. We’ll keep at it!**

It's an honor to serve you,

Derek

Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.

Donald J. Trump February 7th, 2023
**Never in American history has our right to free speech been under assault and threatened to this magnitude.**

The Biden White House pressured social media companies to censor users for posting “true, but inconvenient” information about government policy.[1]

The Department of Homeland Security was exposed coordinating with Twitter and Facebook to censor legally protected free speech.[2]

Joe Biden’s FBI paid Twitter $3.5 million in taxpayer funds to field requests related to Hunter Biden’s laptop scandal.[3]

Biden revoked a 2020 Trump order that would have allowed federal authorities to hold online platforms responsible for modifying or infringing on a user’s speech.[4]

Biden proposed an amendment to Title IX that would lower the threshold for what constitutes “harassment” that would extend beyond the school environment into personal social media comments.[5]

** **
**President Donald J. Trump understands that if we don’t have free speech in America, then we will no longer be a free country.**

Trump, 45th President of the United States of America | | | ---|---|--- Supporter: Notification Status: Signed Up Donald J. Trump February 7th, 2023 PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP’S RESPONSE TO THE STATE OF THE UNION Transcript: Here's the real State of the Union. Over the past two years under Biden, millions and millions of illegal aliens from 160 different countries have stormed across our Southern border. Drug cartels are now raking in billions of dollars from smuggling poison to kill our people and to kill our children. Savage killers, rapists and violent criminals are being released from jail to continue their crime wave and under Biden the murder rate has reached the highest in the history of our country. | ---|--- Donald J. Trump February 7th, 2023 Never in American history has our right to free speech been under assault and threatened to this magnitude. The Biden White House pressured social media companies to censor users for posting “true, but inconvenient” information about government policy.[1] The Department of Homeland Security was exposed coordinating with Twitter and Facebook to censor legally protected free speech.[2] Joe Biden’s FBI paid Twitter $3.5 million in taxpayer funds to field requests related to Hunter Biden’s laptop scandal.[3] Biden revoked a 2020 Trump order that would have allowed federal authorities to hold online platforms responsible for modifying or infringing on a user’s speech.[4] Biden proposed an amendment to Title IX that would lower the threshold for what constitutes “harassment” that would extend beyond the school environment into personal social media comments.[5] President Donald J. Trump understands that if we don’t have free speech in America, then we will no longer be a free country. . [[1]]() [[2]]() [[3]]() [[4]]() [[5]]() | ---|--- Donald J. Trump February 7th, 2023 In an unprecedented violation of US sovereignty and national security, Joe Biden allowed a Chinese spy balloon to surveil sensitive American military installations. In an effort to distract and deflect from their own weakness and failures, the Biden regime has resorted to peddling disinformation. The Biden Administration allowed the spy balloon to travel across the country, viewing sensitive military installations as it drifted along. If not for local reporting in Billings, Montana, we might have never known.[1] . [1] | ---|--- Donald J. Trump February 7th, 2023 President Donald J. Trump rebuilt America’s military, increased readiness, and destroyed our nation’s enemies. Joe Biden has weakened America’s national security, emboldened our adversaries, and betrayed our allies. Biden presided over a tragic and embarrassing military withdrawal in Afghanistan, which took the lives of 13 U.S. servicemembers. Joe Biden left 10,000 to 15,000 Americans behind in Afghanistan.[1] This was among the most embarrassing acts the United States has presided over. [[1]]() | ---|--- Donald J. Trump February 7th, 2023 President Donald J. Trump secured America’s southern border and will wage war on the deadly cartels once he returns to the Oval Office. Meanwhile, Joe Biden has handed over complete control of the U.S. southern border to the dangerous cartels and put American communities in danger. The U.S. Border Patrol has reported three times as many illegal border crossings under Joe Biden than while Donald Trump was President. The Biden administration continues to break records for historic illegal border crossings, tallying an estimated 5.5 million illegal border crossings since taking office.[1] [[1]]() | ---|--- Donald J. Trump February 7th, 2023 President Donald J. Trump reduced violent crime across the country and stood strongly with America’s law enforcement. On Joe Biden’s watch, violent crime has skyrocketed in virtually every American city. In Joe Biden’s first year in office, twelve major cities broke all-time high murder records.[1] Since Joe Biden has taken office, American cities have become violent crime havens. More than 779 people have been murdered in the city of Los Angeles, a 44% increase from the first two years of President Trump’s term.[2] Robberies, assaults, auto thefts in Los Angeles have increased every year since Joe Biden took office.[3] [1] [2] [3] Ibid. | ---|--- Donald J. Trump February 7th, 2023 Joe Biden’s Education Department is more focused on social justice indoctrination than teaching students. President Donald J. Trump protected the rights of parents and ensured children have every opportunity to receive the best education possible. The Biden administration abandoned their responsibility to parents and students by allowing teachers unions to install policies that delayed school reopening post-COVID. [1] [1] | ---|--- Donald J. Trump February 7th, 2023 President Donald J. Trump achieved American energy independence for the first time in nearly 70 years, lowering costs for consumers, and creating thousands of American jobs. Joe Biden has demolished America’s energy independence through radical policies, excessive regulation, and anti-fossil fuel fiction. In 2020, the U.S. Department of Energy projected that American consumers wouldn’t see gasoline prices over five dollars a gallon until the year 2040.[1] Clearly, their report failed to factor Joe Biden and his energy-killing policies into their projections. In reality, gasoline prices doubled in Joe Biden’s first two years in office[2], and diesel prices increased 75%.[3] [1] [2] [3] | ---|--- Donald J. Trump February 7th, 2023 Americans are experiencing a massive budget crunch with health services, premiums, and essential medications thanks to Joe Biden’s inflation disaster and mangled supply chains. From July 2021 to July 2022, the cost of more than 1,200 medications increased by an average of over 30 percent. Some drugs in 2022 increased by more than $20,000 or 500%.[1] [[1]]() | ---|--- Donald J. Trump February 7th, 2023 Joe Biden has overseen the worst economic decline since the Great Depression. When President Donald J. Trump returns to office, he will deliver economic opportunity and prosperity for Americans of all backgrounds, lower inflation and cut wasteful government spending. He did it before and he will do it again. Through Biden’s energy-crippling policies, Americans suffered the highest national average price of gasoline ever recorded in American history.[1] * [1] | ---|--- Donald J. **“LIAR!”** That’s what Marjorie Taylor Greene shouted at President Biden during his State of the Union address last night. The very same woman who talks about Jewish space lasers, is a QAnon truther, and insisted one Illinois elementary school received _$5.1 billion_ to teach critical race theory called Joe Biden a liar. In 2009, when Rep. Joe Wilson shouted “You lie!” during President Obama’s State of the Union, it was condemned by both sides of the aisle, Rep. WIlson issued a formal apology, and the House took the rare step of passing a resolution of disapproval. Now, MTG’s outburst is accepted as normal by the Republicans. They have allowed her and her brand of politics to run rampant for far too long. It’s time to kick her out of Congress once and for all. clean_body: | = “LIAR!” That’s what Marjorie Taylor Greene shouted at President Biden during his State of the Union address last night. The very same woman who talks about Jewish space lasers, is a QAnon truther, and insisted one Illinois elementary school received $5.1 billion to teach critical race theory called Joe Biden a liar. In 2009, when Rep. Joe Wilson shouted “You lie!” during President Obama’s State of the Union, it was condemned by both sides of the aisle, Rep. WIlson issued a formal apology, and the House took the rare step of passing a resolution of disapproval. Now, MTG’s outburst is accepted as normal by the Republicans. They have allowed her and her brand of politics to run rampant for far too long. It’s time to kick her out of Congress once and for all. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks, — HER Time HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

Whether Joe Biden believes this madness or is simply too weak to resist it, his administration has been completely hijacked by the radical left. subject: Historic

body:
| Adam’s candidacy for U.S. Senate is nothing short of historic — and we have the numbers to back that up:
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1743%2E5257348%2EWERVWK)
Derek —
Adam’s candidacy for U.S. Senate is nothing short of historic — and we have the numbers to back that up:
Out of more than **12,000** members of Congress in U.S. history, **36** have served as impeachment managers. And of those **36** , only **4** have ever been lead impeachment managers of a sitting United States president. And he was the first lead impeachment manager to ever obtain a bipartisan vote in the Senate to remove a sitting president.
Four people in the history of Congress — 0.03% — have the experience Adam Schiff has in holding a president accountable. And that experience is important to bring to the Senate.
When a dangerous demagogue tried to upend our democracy, Adam fought back. Adam showed his experience, grit, and courage to stand up for our country — and he made history doing it. And after Trump led an insurrection against the Congress, Adam was again at the forefront of holding him accountable for the January 6th attack.
Kevin McCarthy, Mitch McConnell, and Donald Trump are going to do all they can to stop Adam, just like they’ve done at every single turn. Let’s stand up to their attacks and make history one more time.
**[Adam is counting on a groundswell of grassroots support in these first few days of the campaign. Donate $3 or more right now to send Adam to the United States Senate:](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=feb2023_abs_em.nEPr_T&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC_20230208_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=1743%2E5257348%2EWERVWK)**

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. This sponsored message from Defend The Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3a37c0f7f2c74935bde6c0b113227785&_e=NmGBe63TUAjMyi12z0QhVZWblj51tmuF7_3-Swhd0GY1ZN7JI1bWKojOWzoGNlFhIvw77CHk0hVKqZrZpB8mtZ7_tsSB14n7vHawG2CTl6StsvRVDVvvnEI4zUgucgypAfEvulIDVwHHdtU8dM5Zk3wtRaF3gZqb0fXpeaWOSYngPTthrp4UxD_81rpsx8WZ5Mq9eT_5OhvjBu6tHeUCk5hNV8-NtNy0DVZzEv5vVk2Gozs0ulnyHQrtgJ-7SB5iNKkHElZ6opjHZUj4oiKFwNogpw8OumvvzMAptyPt4AtSUqBSPTrCESP8oulYDfsX9erRrxCc1jXptDVj0CJyZLsUxV4-MSs9miKMh5N9Hn5pIliOiCKoe2AtorbBvCe3DslgQRVrNXFKOvBvRm4xTA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3a37c0f7f2c74935bde6c0b113227785&_e=NmGBe63TUAjMyi12z0QhVZWblj51tmuF7_3-Swhd0GY1ZN7JI1bWKojOWzoGNlFhIvw77CHk0hVKqZrZpB8mtZ7_tsSB14n7vHawG2CTl6StsvRVDVvvnEI4zUgucgypAfEvulIDVwHHdtU8dM5Zk3wtRaF3gZqb0fXpeaWOSYngPTthrp4UxD_81rpsx8WZ5Mq9eT_5OhvjBu6tHeUCk5hNV8-NtNy0DVZzEv5vVk0591g8cUftIMcI5Gbg2C8NYVvY97_vALTly-guZ8pUgywHUFdhk9GHHmsuxaZJDrbPMHy3jZt_P9YRX0f05LaCHCVxQXnsEZBTLoafzkuhrVH6GwE-G1wZvLVFduXOEzWaRdu77StpZ-bGew36ThtqYPdMb64eZrYCvtj0oDlw-A%3D%3D)** For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible.
