clean_body: A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. This sponsored message from Defend The Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. name: Fair Fight Action
subject: re: the State of Voting Rights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
We need concrete plans and allies — on the national level — on our side, so we can continue to dismantle barriers to voting amongst voters of color and young voters. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58469280/391207119/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230208_e_state_v1s3&ms=bsc_emm_ffa_20230208_e_state_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTZhZTFiOS0xZGE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OGoHrTaJEXFS4t0wP2UQrcjIK6Hbl5MUVe1QaYN_T5Q=&emci=956ae1b9-1da8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a16ae1b9-1da8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

| | What comes to mind when you think of democracy? For us, the first image that pops up is a voting booth. Or a ballot. Or an “I Voted” sticker. Democracy cannot exist without the freedom to vote — yet many people across the country don’t have full and guaranteed access to that freedom. Particularly for voters of color and young voters, deep systemic barriers in the electoral process have meant that countless voices aren’t heard. A system that leaves out voices is not a reflection of a true democracy. President Biden delivered an uplifting State of the Union address last night, where he covered vital issues like rebuilding the middle class, recovering from the COVID-19 pandemic, and continuing to pursue racial justice. And, he hit the nail on the head when he said, “In America, we must protect the right to vote, not suppress that fundamental right. We honor the results of our elections, not subvert the will of the people. We must uphold the rule of the law and restore trust in our institutions of democracy.” Regardless of what’s in the headlines or what bills are prioritized in the halls of Congress, Fair Fight Action will always remain grounded in our mission of protecting the freedom to vote. **We need concrete plans and allies — on the national level — on our side, so we can continue to dismantle barriers to voting amongst voters of color and young voters.** Let's show the country that voting rights is an issue worth fighting for — today and every day. [_**Will you chip in $20 to join our movement to make the freedom to vote a local, state,_AND_ national priority?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58469281/391207120/-616966726?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230208_e_state_v1s3&ms=bsc_emm_ffa_20230208_e_state_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTZhZTFiOS0xZGE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OGoHrTaJEXFS4t0wP2UQrcjIK6Hbl5MUVe1QaYN_T5Q=) | [CHIP IN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58469282/391207121/308015883?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230208_e_state_v1s3&ms=bsc_emm_ffa_20230208_e_state_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTZhZTFiOS0xZGE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OGoHrTaJEXFS4t0wP2UQrcjIK6Hbl5MUVe1QaYN_T5Q=)
---
Fair Fight Action was founded to shine a spotlight on and work to dismantle modern-day voter suppression. Although not new, systemic racism resulted in rampant voter suppression in the Peach State, disproportionately affecting Black and brown folks. Our team became a key on-the-ground, activist-powered organization to combat voter suppression attempts in Georgia, and since then we’ve advocated for expanded voter access to make it possible for more voices to be heard at the ballot box.
In 2020, Black and brown voter turnout broke records. In 2022, the youth voter bloc boomed and early voter turnout reached high levels. Our people power is strong enough to scare the anti-democratic bigwigs — so they’ve spent every day since trying to make it harder for people to vote.
In 2023, we’re closely tracking threats to voting rights in the Georgia legislative session, reaching eligible voters in their communities, and advocating for expanding ballot access amongst Black, brown, and youth voters alike ahead of the 2024 election. Anti-voter lawmakers continue to introduce more voter suppression bills across the country — but Fair Fight Action remains laser-focused on stopping them.
There’s so much left to accomplish in the fight to secure our voting rights, in Georgia and on the national level. We’re committed to continuing to protect our democracy, and we hope you’ll be there with us every step of the way. [_**Donate $20 right now to support our efforts and help shine a national spotlight on the issue of voting rights.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58469283/391207122/-616966726?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230208_e_state_v1s3&ms=bsc_emm_ffa_20230208_e_state_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTZhZTFiOS0xZGE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OGoHrTaJEXFS4t0wP2UQrcjIK6Hbl5MUVe1QaYN_T5Q=)
Thank you for everything,
The Fair Fight Action Team

clean_body: We need concrete plans and allies — on the national level — on our side, so we can continue to dismantle barriers to voting amongst voters of color and young voters. | | | What comes to mind when you think of democracy? For us, the first image that pops up is a voting booth. Or a ballot. Or an “I Voted” sticker. Democracy cannot exist without the freedom to vote — yet many people across the country don’t have full and guaranteed access to that freedom. Particularly for voters of color and young voters, deep systemic barriers in the electoral process have meant that countless voices aren’t heard. A system that leaves out voices is not a reflection of a true democracy. President Biden delivered an uplifting State of the Union address last night, where he covered vital issues like rebuilding the middle class, recovering from the COVID-19 pandemic, and continuing to pursue racial justice. And, he hit the nail on the head when he said, “In America, we must protect the right to vote, not suppress that fundamental right. We honor the results of our elections, not subvert the will of the people. We must uphold the rule of the law and restore trust in our institutions of democracy.” Regardless of what’s in the headlines or what bills are prioritized in the halls of Congress, Fair Fight Action will always remain grounded in our mission of protecting the freedom to vote. We need concrete plans and allies — on the national level — on our side, so we can continue to dismantle barriers to voting amongst voters of color and young voters. Let's show the country that voting rights is an issue worth fighting for — today and every day. = | = Fair Fight Action was founded to shine a spotlight on and work to dismantle modern-day voter suppression. Although not new, systemic racism resulted in rampant voter suppression in the Peach State, disproportionately affecting Black and brown folks. Our team became a key on-the-ground, activist-powered organization to combat voter suppression attempts in Georgia, and since then we’ve advocated for expanded voter access to make it possible for more voices to be heard at the ballot box. In 2020, Black and brown voter turnout broke records. In 2022, the youth voter bloc boomed and early voter turnout reached high levels. Our people power is strong enough to scare the anti-democratic bigwigs — so they’ve spent every day since trying to make it harder for people to vote. In 2023, we’re closely tracking threats to voting rights in the Georgia legislative session, reaching eligible voters in their communities, and advocating for expanding ballot access amongst Black, brown, and youth voters alike ahead of the 2024 election. Anti-voter lawmakers continue to introduce more voter suppression bills across the country — but Fair Fight Action remains laser-focused on stopping them. There’s so much left to accomplish in the fight to secure our voting rights, in Georgia and on the national level. We’re committed to continuing to protect our democracy, and we hope you’ll be there with us every step of the way. = Thank you for everything, The Fair Fight Action Team = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2023 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58462690/391155926/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Njc1NzI4My1mNGE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qmi1WkbgjV7GogOnplLfVG-BBqOUWf5_4aEMSM7aYcs=&emci=4802d407-f3a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=96757283-f4a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=7731215)

| | Last night, President Biden made his vision for America clear. **It's an America where every family has opportunity, every community can thrive, and no one is forgotten.** I was born in the rural timber town of Myrtle Creek, Oregon, the son of a machinist who kept the machinery running at the sawmill. When the mill closed, we moved to Roseburg, and then further north following jobs in the timber and construction economy. My family's story is like many other families' stories. And Joe Biden's story is like so many other families' stories. When his dad's business faltered, the family had to move in with his mother's parents in Scranton. Eventually, they found their way to Delaware, where his father made ends meet selling used cars. That's how we grew up. And that's why I'm so enthusiastic about the work we've done—and the work we're still doing—to lift up every American family in every American community. **From Carlisle, Pennsylvania to Akron, Ohio; from Sheboygan, Wisconsin to Reno, Nevada; from Lansing, Michigan to Coos Bay, Oregon—we're rebuilding infrastructure, revitalizing unions, bringing back manufacturing, and doing it all with American workers and American products.** I just spent four days on the road doing nine town halls across Oregon. I heard it again and again: people want solutions and a chance to build a better life, not political fights and division. They want us to work together to make housing and childcare more affordable, improve mental health and stop fentanyl, stop the gouging of Americans on gas and drugs, get rid of corrupt dark money in campaigns, and move more boldly to address climate change. Last night, President Biden reminded America (and our Republican colleagues, who seem to need reminding now and again) that we're all in this together. _America does better when we all do better._ That's the mission. That's the job. Thank you for supporting my work. body:
I founded BACKROADS PAC to increase support for Democrats in rural districts, and we’ve got a lot of work to do.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58463155/391157613/1955960297?refcode=BLU-BRP-20230208-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDYwODY3MC1mN2E3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mN3vjqfEtAtr_xDCOfwyy8LbUQZwzKDp5yh08DF_26s=)

| Peter,

Research has shown that support for Democrats has grown across the country in recent years, but we do not see the same results in rural communities. While we’ve grown tremendously in some of these communities, electing numerous rural Democrats nationwide, there is still so much more we can do to improve Democratic representation in rural areas.

[_**I founded BACKROADS PAC to increase support for Democrats in rural districts, and we’ve got a lot of work to do if we want to turn the tide in 2024. Will you join our movement by chipping in $5 or more today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58463156/391157614/1955960297?refcode=BLU-BRP-20230208-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDYwODY3MC1mN2E3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mN3vjqfEtAtr_xDCOfwyy8LbUQZwzKDp5yh08DF_26s=)

Peter, In just her first month in office as a U.S. Senator, Katie Britt has hit the ground running, fighting for Alabama’s people, values, and interests every day! Read on below to learn about everything Katie’s already been doing:

---
---
| | **Katie Learns About Our Border Crisis**
---

---
| | **Katie Meets With Constituents Across Alabama**
---
| | [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=2dc15f60f9294988a4351fc92a62839e&_e=V1_W5eo3VJ07O_YdP892AEYeeRlNQHSazuRWRfNvLbXLELkF6gQeX-VcVGfsQUFH8UiZj6-L6duAY47bfI71wBswZBvvwhtwUio1BpcMurOYIbxkbD1F1NvU1_ioMudvrwbuJP5gWiq7JOFO-6c_FhgaQJ8FBreqgsvha-wfAFLImGnRzkf697jly7x2rYvO4wGE0Mt55iG97UmQ4w4vkx5YQK9KGZYgVphRp0DiNVFPUg13y2TdvbTyV-Zg0zvZmsJL6JSjGjN8F4CuGWFL9tf0fY2L46eTaH8vAVA4nFzmuugWRi3idqPlrumE38tN0fKxeI1OSSbl9ylny_FuCYg5UlZ2BLPHcz4RjbJl5Hf1obL4uUS-agsMa-aoz3ZPwMdeEPgO1Wj1N1FrOjo9CmJUHJ-DaaUzIkMMacHUEZQhhr1SbiqYnsLRIG7Bggw7)

Katie was selected to serve on three major Senate committees in the 118th Congress: _Appropriations_ ; _Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs_ ; and, _Rules & Administration_. clean_body: 71 To Go... | | | Peter, In just her first month in office as a U.S. Senator, Katie Britt has hit the ground running, fighting for Alabama’s people, values, and interests every day! Read on below to learn about everything Katie’s already been doing: | | Katie Learns About Our Border Crisis | | With visits to the Del Rio & San Diego Border sectors, Katie has been hard at work learning about the human & drug trafficking crisis at our Southern Border. | | Katie Meets With Constituents Across Alabama | | From Satsuma, to Mobile, to Autauga County, Katie has traveled across our state meeting with first responders, law enforcement officials, teachers, and students to hear about the issues that affect them the most and to offer support in times of need. | | Katie’s First Month On Capitol Hill | | Katie was selected to serve on three major Senate committees in the 118th Congress: Appropriations ; Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs ; and, Rules & Administration. In just her first month in office, Katie is already taking meaningful legislative action. As a co-sponsor to 8 bills, 7 resolutions, and 4 congressional letters, Katie is fighting for issues that matter most: Fighting for our Children Fighting for Alabama Standing Up to the Radical Left’s Agenda Protecting Americans’ Second Amendment Rights Picking the Fights that Matter Peter, thank you for your continued support! Team Britt | | Follow Katie On Social Media: | | | ---|---|--- SIGN UP FOR SMS ALERTS: **TEXT "KATIE" TO 27488 | | Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

_\- Forbes_
---
| [FIGHT BACK ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58463448/391158898/-1109429433?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230208-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDA5NzcwMC1mOWE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ebelNelV-tymehveqlR9OGrBq4dk8UuGM3w5bjN97j8=)

Peter –

name: Team Gallagher
subject: This should be a Sputnik moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin
body:
President Biden had an opportunity to bring the American people together to create a bipartisan response to the Chinese Communist Party’s threats.| | | [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=568e03fb1ac246218ebab067ec72544d&_e=qQme283FgMoD9CeWEvPlh892r2uzN_hmJ28oVdwdJD14hxkMmTK5zsz2Kz85LYbr0MmvZ9uZojPxvwJUQK-d4I0Sk4WxlRgDISSrLFRqetjMJZUkP_fsguTwI9btBOnUFII1TJZxBOsJB-6NNNrdUWviEBUY3Fakz5GDvZ1yq1knnF-NkMgoWIRREvZw0ip8GBAawM5uXF4J4whvLSJfaoijT3PueiaW5QUQ0ao_qUiy9MYT2f6LNPNvi2IOG8EpebOnixBcWDXAwSjhe1flCazKLTycYgdcqtKmYSHV-qYgTiSzA8EhSSs3A4Swf8q4xYfApnwzliFr3ZD5Yf_vaioZPgicBTat9UpQ-xaN1XE%3D)
---
| | Peter, President Biden had an opportunity to utilize his State of the Union address to rally the American people together and create a bipartisan response to the Chinese Communist Party’s recent threats. Biden could have used this moment to show American strength and resolve, but he chose not to. He dodged discussing China’s balloon flying over our country or the national security concerns surrounding TikTok.
---
| | **Congressman Gallagher on How Biden Should Talk About the CCP**
---
[](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=568e03fb1ac246218ebab067ec72544d&_e=qQme283FgMoD9CeWEvPlh892r2uzN_hmJ28oVdwdJD14hxkMmTK5zsz2Kz85LYbr0MmvZ9uZojPxvwJUQK-d4I0Sk4WxlRgDISSrLFRqetjMJZUkP_fsguTwI9btBOnUFII1TJZxBOsJB-6NNNrdUWviEBUY3Fakz5GDvZ1yq1knnF-NkMgoWIRREvZw0ip8GBAawM5uXF4J4whvLSJfagW56xdoZD2CETtHAtpZmqm7W7GZKvlIPeyszEbaGn7YERbIjj4rPI6ei6Bc-HtQwO5td71tZAYFFeaSvj_0CpC-p09E-J6CkKwIe9CtD-uYQfs_pUncgDsZEB20Ur-YYp6kxuXJdY1K1A87_58KYdQ%3D)
---
_“This should be a Sputnik moment. Not because the capabilities of this balloon were equivalent per say to Sputnik in the late ‘50s but because this illustrates that the threat posed by_** _the CCP isn't just an over there problem._**__**_It's a right here, at home problem. It’s a threat to our sovereignty_** _.**"**_
---
[**WATCH THE SEGMENT**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=568e03fb1ac246218ebab067ec72544d&_e=qQme283FgMoD9CeWEvPlh892r2uzN_hmJ28oVdwdJD14hxkMmTK5zsz2Kz85LYbr0MmvZ9uZojPxvwJUQK-d4I0Sk4WxlRgDISSrLFRqetjMJZUkP_fsguTwI9btBOnUFII1TJZxBOsJB-6NNNrdUWviEBUY3Fakz5GDvZ1yq1knnF-NkMgoWIRREvZw0ip8GBAawM5uXF4J4whvLSJfaiKbye_rAC0Rf84_5s27U-kIPhegEfyNCpTYbAKiSvj0HszhKqFQcpcGGW6fZf90e9Uc_AY99EZR13yMJcNtbcCZ1TZRvuT_ztHwO_WAJ84gvRc5GIjag9QTsa-ZDpBtl7eBrlp5zZeobKpIrT7IM98%3D)
---
| | President Biden should seize upon this moment to be honest with the American people about failures in our system leading to this incursion into our airspace that was not dealt with quickly enough. Then galvanize the American people around a bipartisan response to defend ourselves, to defend our sovereignty, to do what’s necessary to ensure the Chinese Communist Party doesn't think they can get away with something like this.
Agree? _[**Sign Mike’s petition.**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=568e03fb1ac246218ebab067ec72544d&_e=qQme283FgMoD9CeWEvPlh892r2uzN_hmJ28oVdwdJD14hxkMmTK5zsz2Kz85LYbr0MmvZ9uZojPxvwJUQK-d4I0Sk4WxlRgDISSrLFRqetjMJZUkP_fsguTwI9btBOnUFII1TJZxBOsJB-6NNNrdUWviEBUY3Fakz5GDvZ1yq1knnF-NkMgoWIRREvZw0ip8GBAawM5uXF4J4whvLSJfar5yiIvQ44SpA8AiTnEwvV66PG5VsRqQgQblSafHNABhyJYCkWfYIWnygm8ht0H06Qil1-hWpqj0g2GAvU1J4aMzbyqRCgmylcUOU6FrNnSno74IybasMnIXhS7McGw_fPJ4hFfOhKkXBQndFF0d3SU%3D)_

clean_body: President Biden had an opportunity to bring the American people together to create a bipartisan response to the Chinese Communist Party’s threats.| | | | | Peter, President Biden had an opportunity to utilize his State of the Union address to rally the American people together and create a bipartisan response to the Chinese Communist Party’s recent threats. Biden could have used this moment to show American strength and resolve, but he chose not to. He dodged discussing China’s balloon flying over our country or the national security concerns surrounding TikTok. | | Congressman Gallagher on How Biden Should Talk About the CCP “This should be a Sputnik moment. Not because the capabilities of this balloon were equivalent per say to Sputnik in the late ‘50s but because this illustrates that the threat posed by the CCP isn't just an over there problem.__It's a right here, at home problem. It’s a threat to our sovereignty ." | | President Biden should seize upon this moment to be honest with the American people about failures in our system leading to this incursion into our airspace that was not dealt with quickly enough. Then galvanize the American people around a bipartisan response to defend ourselves, to defend our sovereignty, to do what’s necessary to ensure the Chinese Communist Party doesn't think they can get away with something like this. Agree? \- Team Gallagher | | | No one has fought harder to make America safer and more secure than Mike Gallagher. He’s taking on the CCP so American principles lead the way in the 21st century. We’re grateful you’ve subscribed to receive our email updates. But if for some reason you would like to unsubscribe from our team updates, you can . | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | | Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin. | | P.O. BOX 1027 - GREEN BAY, WI 54305 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

clean_body: If you missed it, click here to watch the full recording of the WFP State of the Union response. | | | Peter, Last night, Congresswoman Delia Ramirez gave the official Working Families Party response to President Biden’s State of the Union address. Then if you’re inspired by Delia’s speech and our vision for a government that has working peoples' backs, please consider making a contribution to the Working Families Party today. Democrats can take back the House in 2024 — but only if they step it up and show working people that they will deliver big if they regain control. Whether it’s protecting Medicare, Social Security, and all other essential programs or lowering prescription drug costs — Democrats must stand in firm defense of working people’s wellbeing and fight back any and all attacks with the same amount of force Republicans are deploying against us. As MSNBC wrote, “[Delia] framed issues like the high cost of health care not as choices between ‘normal or crazy,’ but as real struggles facing working Americans.”1 We should always push for more, and our State of the Union response is a road map to a future that does just that — that truly uplifts working people. In solidarity, Working Families Party Source: 1\. , MSNBC , February 8, 2023 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: Team Ted Budd
subject: It's time for reform
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate
body:
Ted's leading the charge

|
---

**THE ONLY OFFICIAL EMAILS FROM TED BUDD**
Peter,

The United States has officially hit its debt limit, and it's time for serious and concrete fiscal reforms. Democrats want to raise the debt ceiling without cutting any spending, even though government spending increased $10 trillion in the last two years alone!

**Senator Ted Budd, alongside Senator Mike Lee, is leading the charge in opposing the debt limit increase without fiscal reforms.** Twenty-four Senate Republicans have signed onto the letter to President Biden, pledging not to vote for any bill which will raise the debt limit unless there are cuts in federal spending.

_**Enough is enough.**_

Only big-spending Washington politicians think that their debts will go away by borrowing more money without changing their spending habits. They think you won't ever stop them from taking your money and spending it on their priorities - with no limits in sight.

[**Will YOU sign the letter as well?**](http://links.savecarolina.org/u/click?_t=13365b87b52649cc8d23e393a66fd89d&_m=08eeabaa4fdb4029893c3ab1f5b4d030&_e=9DDf--gvcybiLDP55tsrLFXPZphRyfAFO13udaiN1Jm7hwNzXllnwLaJ9aHa170qyLfDEb0d--lgOF9RZ5cvxxUSfMN4bvSHtBF8aIf3kXArnRe9eAbaLQfsbDMU6u0LPJAYWllYpU1hrBGgWLUjsNnIro07kduF1rDxeCrXxgm0BAgD_S0_9RoH-tZt4G4OZoHyiZFAd3eRP9-GpiFso1FEx7ycItUrXQFjHji1t2HPev6ldkY4GP2eJGw1eu0Wf9u8AT6BBYchUliNCM9MZlJfPhP8cycXg76B0oIYo8BnAKsBrkNcMgvPOmtwAkj5_HHt_SHTZ7iioKbFQud25zNL_iZjQ48wnmXkLr6WoK-wj2NzyS5XkTY67vuoM5_Q00bJRUN0YL00u4SB0pG64OwE5le_uyqPXS_wmy3fhGUH4MyvtlkV224gsuiqbSpTtprEVgfRTC1y0AyrBV_5BB9QCBHtFuqhCypPnJna9yZH09n0sLhpH6v9MlX9isFX) Add your name now to show Washington that you demand change.

| [**SIGN HERE**](http://links.savecarolina.org/u/click?_t=13365b87b52649cc8d23e393a66fd89d&_m=08eeabaa4fdb4029893c3ab1f5b4d030&_e=9DDf--gvcybiLDP55tsrLFXPZphRyfAFO13udaiN1Jm7hwNzXllnwLaJ9aHa170qyLfDEb0d--lgOF9RZ5cvxxUSfMN4bvSHtBF8aIf3kXArnRe9eAbaLQfsbDMU6u0LPJAYWllYpU1hrBGgWLUjsNnIro07kduF1rDxeCrXxgm0BAgD_S0_9RoH-tZt4G4OZoHyiZFAd3eRP9-GpiFso1FEx7ycItUrXQFjHji1t2HPev6ldkY4GP2eJGw1eu0Wf9u8AT6BBYchUliNCM9MZlJfPhP8cycXg76B0oIYo8BnAKsBrkNcMgvPOmtwAkj5_HHt_SHTZ7iioKbFQud25zNL_iZjQ48wnmXkLr6WoK90VWQdQXvp3rLQwnShqtwtA03cai5h0kEKtVmhJRCGQJgoCcWQmMm46sUdDUSkz0oelnA307RKAeXP_eyiDzC_Lcd2FIRuQt_vJg7VTlRM-UCjgJj6OPQTDfpjSSclB8IxUkL9Rm4C3yIORQ-6d64B)
---

Thank you,
\- Team Budd

**Read the letter here:**
Dear President Biden,

We, the undersigned members of the Senate Republican Conference, write to express our outright opposition to a debt-ceiling hike without real structural spending reform that reduces deficit spending and brings fiscal sanity back to Washington. It is the policy of the Senate Republican Conference "that any increase in the debt ceiling must be accompanied by cuts in federal spending, such as the Prevent Government Shutdown Act or the Full Faith and Credit Act." We intend to stand by that policy.

Our nation's fiscal policy is a disaster. Our country owes $31 trillion, a level of debt that now well exceeds the size of our economy. Inflation is making life more expensive for American families every single day. Meanwhile, your administration is directing federal agencies to continue to spend billions in taxpayer resources, expanding the size and scope of the IRS to go after families and small businesses, policing the speech of Americans on social media, funding equity programs in the military, and pouring money into programs for a pandemic that your administration has declared over.

Americans are keenly aware that their government is not only failing to work for them -- but actively working against them. We do not intend to vote for a debt-ceiling increase without structural reforms to address current and future fiscal realities, actually enforce the budget and spending rules on the books, and manage out-of-control government policies.

Sincerely,
Mike Lee (R-UT)
Ted Budd (R-NC)
John Barrasso (R-WY)
Tommy Tuberville (R-AL)
Marsha Blackburn (R-TN)
J.D. Vance (R-OH)
Eric Schmitt (R-MO)
Ron Johnson (R-WI)
Mike Braun (R-IN)
Kevin Cramer (R-ND)
Ted Cruz (R-TX)
Cynthia Lummis (R-WY)
Rick Scott (R-FL)
Rand Paul (R-KY)
Markwayne Mullin (R-OK)
Mike Crapo (R-ID)
Roger Marshall (R-KS)
Joni Ernst (R-IA)
James Risch (R-ID)
James Lankford (R-OK)
Deb Fischer (R-NE)
Pete Ricketts (R-NE)
Katie Britt (R-AL)
Tim Scott (R-SC)

|

clean_body: Ted's leading the charge | THE ONLY OFFICIAL EMAILS FROM TED BUDD Peter, The United States has officially hit its debt limit, and it's time for serious and concrete fiscal reforms. Democrats want to raise the debt ceiling without cutting any spending, even though government spending increased $10 trillion in the last two years alone! Senator Ted Budd, alongside Senator Mike Lee, is leading the charge in opposing the debt limit increase without fiscal reforms. Twenty-four Senate Republicans have signed onto the letter to President Biden, pledging not to vote for any bill which will raise the debt limit unless there are cuts in federal spending. Enough is enough. Only big-spending Washington politicians think that their debts will go away by borrowing more money without changing their spending habits. They think you won't ever stop them from taking your money and spending it on their priorities - with no limits in sight. Add your name now to show Washington that you demand change. | Thank you, \- Team Budd Read the letter here: Dear President Biden, We, the undersigned members of the Senate Republican Conference, write to express our outright opposition to a debt-ceiling hike without real structural spending reform that reduces deficit spending and brings fiscal sanity back to Washington. It is the policy of the Senate Republican Conference "that any increase in the debt ceiling must be accompanied by cuts in federal spending, such as the Prevent Government Shutdown Act or the Full Faith and Credit Act." We intend to stand by that policy. Our nation's fiscal policy is a disaster. Our country owes $31 trillion, a level of debt that now well exceeds the size of our economy. Inflation is making life more expensive for American families every single day. Meanwhile, your administration is directing federal agencies to continue to spend billions in taxpayer resources, expanding the size and scope of the IRS to go after families and small businesses, policing the speech of Americans on social media, funding equity programs in the military, and pouring money into programs for a pandemic that your administration has declared over. Americans are keenly aware that their government is not only failing to work for them -- but actively working against them. We do not intend to vote for a debt-ceiling increase without structural reforms to address current and future fiscal realities, actually enforce the budget and spending rules on the books, and manage out-of-control government policies. Sincerely, Mike Lee (R-UT) Ted Budd (R-NC) John Barrasso (R-WY) Tommy Tuberville (R-AL) Marsha Blackburn (R-TN) J.D. Vance (R-OH) Eric Schmitt (R-MO) Ron Johnson (R-WI) Mike Braun (R-IN) Kevin Cramer (R-ND) Ted Cruz (R-TX) Cynthia Lummis (R-WY) Rick Scott (R-FL) Rand Paul (R-KY) Markwayne Mullin (R-OK) Mike Crapo (R-ID) Roger Marshall (R-KS) Joni Ernst (R-IA) James Risch (R-ID) James Lankford (R-OK) Deb Fischer (R-NE) Pete Ricketts (R-NE) Katie Britt (R-AL) Tim Scott (R-SC) | Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader from North Carolina. | Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

**What a night, Peter!**

President Biden laid out Democrats’ vision for our country – and he did it with style.

The president deftly navigated obnoxious boos and heckles from the GOP seats, ultimately forcing Republican members to promise (on camera!) not to cut Social Security and Medicare.

From his touching acknowledgment of Tyre Nichols’ parents to his firebrand calls to “finish the job” that his administration has already done to put our economy back on track, **this was easily one of the most memorable State of the Union addresses we’ve seen.**

Democrats Serve is a national organization that backs Democrats running for office with frontline public service backgrounds, including first responders, firefighters, social workers, police officers, prosecutors, judges, public defenders, educators, and more.

Democratic candidates with professional experience serving their communities in government have a pragmatic approach to governing and know how to get things done, making for strong narratives and an ability to connect with voters uniquely.

However, when running for office, they often lack access to the professional campaign staff and wealthy donor networks that non-working class candidates do.

clean_body: | = What a night, Peter! President Biden laid out Democrats’ vision for our country – and he did it with style. The president deftly navigated obnoxious boos and heckles from the GOP seats, ultimately forcing Republican members to promise (on camera!) not to cut Social Security and Medicare. From his touching acknowledgment of Tyre Nichols’ parents to his firebrand calls to “finish the job” that his administration has already done to put our economy back on track, this was easily one of the most memorable State of the Union addresses we’ve seen. | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Democrats Serve, DemocratsServe.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. | =

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Josh Hawley’s record on Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Hint: It’s not good.
| Josh Hawley has been going around DC acting like he’s a champion for Social Security. **But his record speaks for itself:** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39918?t=6&akid=6335%2E878179%2EWAg_qw) Republican politicians like Hawley had no problem spending trillions on subsidies, bailouts, and tax breaks for Wall Street, Big Tech, and Big Oil — all the industries responsible for stripping our communities for parts. But now, when it comes to fulfilling their promise to working Americans, they squabble over every penny.

**When I’m in the U.S. Senate, I’ll fight like hell to protect Social Security and give our seniors what they’re owed.[If you’re with me, please split a $10 donation between Voter Protection Project and my grassroots campaign to defeat Josh Hawley today.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39918?t=7&akid=6335%2E878179%2EWAg_qw)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Lucas Kunce and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39919?t=8&akid=6335%2E878179%2EWAg_qw)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39920?t=9&akid=6335%2E878179%2EWAg_qw)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39921?t=10&akid=6335%2E878179%2EWAg_qw)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39922?t=11&akid=6335%2E878179%2EWAg_qw)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39918?t=12&akid=6335%2E878179%2EWAg_qw)
**Any politician who says we can’t afford to deliver the American people what they’re owed is a liar.**

When I’m in the U.S. Senate, you’ll never have to wonder if I’m fighting for everyday Americans over the massive corporations tearing our country up — and the corrupt politicians standing in my way won’t have to wonder either.

Let’s flip this seat and take back power for working people across the country.

Thanks for standing with me,

— Lucas Kunce

(www.protectvoting.org)

name: Rick Larsen
subject: Jobs, jobs, jobs, jobs.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58464986/391164612/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTYxMDI5Yy0wMWE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tyrA3KdNOtkFjRAiAYNFiIOBTa5S6db3ftunkW143to=&emci=319044b1-00a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=6e61029c-01a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=9494239)
---

| | Last night, President Biden got it exactly right: _"To maintain the strongest economy in the world, we also need the best infrastructure in the world."_ That means well-maintained roads and bridges, efficient ports and airports, strong mass transit (including ferries), safe and clean water pipes, and a nationwide electric car-charging system to take us into our clean-energy future. **America will compete with the world by investing in our infrastructure so that we can keep good-paying jobs here at home.** As President Biden said last night, we are going to make sure that all this new infrastructure is built with American-made materials — lumber, glass, fiber optic cables, and more. That also means more good-paying jobs here at home. And with the CHIPS Act, we are making sure that computer chips are made right here in the Pacific Northwest, creating good jobs, ensuring that our supply chains start in America, and protecting our national security from threats to chip plants overseas. **President Biden is getting the job done.** I am proud to be working closely with him and his team. And I am very thankful that you are on our side. _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | name: Team NPP
subject: The results are in…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project_
body:
Democratic candidates were able to secure seats in all three races!

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58465011/391164778/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230208SpecResults_N_TEAM_90DO_4_NG_B_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBiMTNmYmM2LTAxYTgtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iPCOAbNDr7NSZFwBgl21JDp-Uqek9bhridBjPHv3LPo=)
| We did it, fellow activist,

The results are in from yesterday's special elections, and the Democratic candidates were able to secure seats in all three races!

Roy has committed to vetoing _any_ legislation that infringes upon the right to make one’s own reproductive health care decisions.
But here’s the deal: _Republicans have a veto-proof supermajority in the state Senate and are just one seat short of the same supermajority in the state House._
_We can’t afford to lose a _single_ Democratic vote on this critical issue._
This is the most critical legislative fight on our plate right now, Peter. The GOP has made no secret of their intention to BAN abortion care in our state — and we cannot let them succeed.

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Ohio was center stage last night
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
Sherrod Brown - Senator from Ohio [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87645/images/brown_2018_logo-outlined.png]
Ohio was in the spotlight last night at the State of the Union. In a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a contribution so we can, like President Biden said, restore the Dignity of Work and keep making transformative investments in our state, [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230208sotu?refcode=sbe230208sotu] but first, I want to share some of the highlights from the president’s speech:
BURYING THE TERM “RUST BELT” ONCE AND FOR ALL
President Biden shouted out Saria Gwin-Maye, a Cincinnati ironworker and member of Ironworkers Local 44 who is helping rebuild the Brent Spence Bridge. It’s one of many bridges that is being rebuilt thanks to investments from the bipartisan infrastructure law I supported.

“Saria said she can’t wait to be 10 stories above the Ohio River building that new bridge. God bless her. That’s pride, and that’s what else we’re building; we’re building back pride.”
- President Biden

We’re creating new jobs in people’s hometowns, and it’s not just infrastructure jobs. We’re also adding tech manufacturing jobs, like Intel’s new semiconductor factory in New Albany.

“Outside of Columbus, Intel is building a semiconductor factory on 1,000 acres -- literally a field of dreams... These jobs, where people don’t have to leave home to search for opportunity, it’s just getting started. Think about the new homes, the small businesses... that [are] going to be needed to support those 3,000 permanent jobs.”
- President Biden

TAKING CARE OF OUR VETERANS
I invited an Ohio Army veteran battling multiple lung diseases due to toxic burn pit smoke she encountered while deployed in Iraq. Together, veterans, my colleagues, and I fought for the PACT Act, which is now providing disability benefits and care for toxic-exposed veterans, including over 3 million post-9/11 combat vets.
FOCUSING ON MENTAL HEALTH
First Lady Jill Biden invited Harry Miller, a former Ohio State University football player who retired to focus on his mental health. President Biden is making strengthening mental health resources a centerpiece of his agenda.
We’re building historic progress for working people and I want to continue making Ohio a big part of that process.
I’m up for re-election next year, and I’m hoping you’ll be part of our campaign. Will you start by making a contribution of $26 -- or any amount that makes sense for you -- today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230208sotu?refcode=sbe230208sotu&amount=26]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Express Donate $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe230208sotu?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe230208sotu_express_lane_5]

Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe230208sotu?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe230208sotu_express_lane_10]

Express Donate $26 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe230208sotu?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe230208sotu_express_lane_26]

Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe230208sotu?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=sbe230208sotu_express_lane_100]

Donate Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe230208sotu?refcode=sbe230208sotu]

With gratitude,
Sherrod
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
Contributions or gifts to Friends of Sherrod Brown are not tax deductible.
Friends of Sherrod Brown
3867 West Market Street
Ste. 289
Akron, OH 44333
United States

And I’ll tell you why...
_**THEY HATE ME, BECAUSE I CAN’T BE BOUGHT!**_

That means, every liberal special interest donor like George Soros is now cutting massive checks to Biden to reach this new federal limit. But I have a plan to fight back that involves YOU. Our average campaign donation is $29, so I’m asking our millions of supporters to go 14% higher – to $33 – to stop Biden’s special interest donors from buying the 2024 election. | Every day, I see a new story about a billionaire globalist trying to stop our presidential campaign. The Koch brothers and the “Club for No Growth” are even secretly interviewing presidential candidates to try and take down our America First movement. And I’ll tell you why... THEY HATE ME, BECAUSE I CAN’T BE BOUGHT! | Since 2016, I’ve SHUNNED the billionaire globalist donors who’ve sold out our country to the highest bidder. Instead, I decided to turn to the American citizens who have been neglected, betrayed, and abandoned by the globalist donors who’ve made a fortune off of destroying our nation. Friend, your donation of $29 scares the living hell out of these globalists. Because it’s not just you giving $29... ...You are backed by millions of grassroots donors who REFUSE to let the greatest nation in history get ripped apart by the globalist swamp. But with the FEC increasing the maximum these swamp monsters can donate, we need to pick up the pace and give 14% more! Thank you, | Donald J. name: Jennifer Wexton
subject: A handful of seats makes a world of difference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58466613/391170524/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230208SOTU_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWNkZTkzNC0wOWE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=05UbiCTd2_XAHRLabE3ihWQv6AXcRzJ52HHlxMroN0Y=)
---
Friend,

As I sat in attendance for President Biden's State of the Union address last night, I couldn't help but think of the profound impact that a handful of close elections can have on the course of a country. [**VA-10 is likely to see another close race in 2024, and it's a must-win for Democrats in our fight to retake the majority. Can you help jumpstart my re-election campaign by donating $10 today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58466614/391170525/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230208SOTU_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWNkZTkzNC0wOWE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=05UbiCTd2_XAHRLabE3ihWQv6AXcRzJ52HHlxMroN0Y=)

President Biden spoke of the landmark policies advanced in the first two years of his administration — including COVID relief, infrastructure revitalization, a major expansion of clean energy jobs, and legislation to cap insulin prices.

**None of this would have happened without the narrow majority that House Democrats held last Congress. Even though we had only a 5-vote margin, we stuck together when it counted, and we helped move our country in the right direction after the chaos of the Trump years.**

It was deeply disappointing to lose our majority in November. But we held far more of our seats than the pundits expected, and now we need only 5 seats to gain back the majority.

**I saw what we accomplished in our last House majority, and I know that we can achieve even greater heights if we take back the chamber in 2024.**

I'll never stop fighting for more progress, but I can't do it alone — and Republicans are sure to target me again this cycle because they know my record of taking on the special interests (such as the gun lobby and Big Pharma) that fill their campaign coffers.

[**Will you make a grassroots contribution of $10 or more? VA-10 is shaping up to be a battleground district once again, and we need to prevent the GOP from having any surprise pickups if we want to flip the House next year.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58466615/391170526/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230208SOTU_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_L2&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWNkZTkzNC0wOWE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=05UbiCTd2_XAHRLabE3ihWQv6AXcRzJ52HHlxMroN0Y=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58466616/391170527/-772585877?express_lane=true&refcode=EM_FR_230208SOTU_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_EB10&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWNkZTkzNC0wOWE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=05UbiCTd2_XAHRLabE3ihWQv6AXcRzJ52HHlxMroN0Y=)**

clean_body: = Friend, As I sat in attendance for President Biden's State of the Union address last night, I couldn't help but think of the profound impact that a handful of close elections can have on the course of a country. = President Biden spoke of the landmark policies advanced in the first two years of his administration — including COVID relief, infrastructure revitalization, a major expansion of clean energy jobs, and legislation to cap insulin prices. None of this would have happened without the narrow majority that House Democrats held last Congress. Even though we had only a 5-vote margin, we stuck together when it counted, and we helped move our country in the right direction after the chaos of the Trump years. It was deeply disappointing to lose our majority in November. But we held far more of our seats than the pundits expected, and now we need only 5 seats to gain back the majority. I saw what we accomplished in our last House majority, and I know that we can achieve even greater heights if we take back the chamber in 2024. I'll never stop fighting for more progress, but I can't do it alone — and Republicans are sure to target me again this cycle because they know my record of taking on the special interests (such as the gun lobby and Big Pharma) that fill their campaign coffers. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Thank you, Jennifer Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America. **=** Paid for by Wexton for Congress Wexton for Congress PO Box 650550 Sterling, VA 20165 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Peter Willis,

Between sitting with Republicans at last
night’s state of the union and making CNBC headlines for raising sickening
amounts of cash from Wall Street donors, Kyrsten Sinema has been busy.

But that’s not all, and according to a new ethics complaint, she’s just as
terrible to her staff as she is to voters — treating them as servants to
carry out her every whim and ordering them to violate Senate ethics rules
to serve her corporate donors.

Sinema's treatment of her staff makes sense in light of her shockingly
anti-worker voting record, and we have a great solution: unionize!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/kyrsten_sinema_union_petition/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230208_PT_KyrstenSinema_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_NA&t=1010&akid=3991%2E5885482%2Eug_L9H ]Add your name here to join Our Revolution in calling on Kyrsten

telling her official Senate staff (who draw taxpayer-funded salaries) to
set up fundraisers and meetings with campaign donors.

Using our tax dollars to give corporate power brokers more access to shape

If Senator Sinema is willing to order her staff to violate Senate ethics
rules, they clearly need protection from their abusive boss.

---
| | Last night at the State of the Union, Joe Biden told lie after lie about me, claiming that I want to cut Social Security and Medicare.

_**Let me be clear: I don’t know a SINGLE Republican who wants to cut Social Security OR Medicare. **_

_But meanwhile, Joe Biden has a history of proposing cuts to BOTH._
And just last year, the radical Left CUT Medicare - and the woke media is REFUSING to cover it.
**Peter, I’m honored to be attacked by the Washington insiders. I represent the people of Florida, not them, and I’m not about to be intimidated by their lies. **

Joe Biden rambled for a while last night, so let me get the facts straight.

In my plan to rescue America, I suggested that all federal legislation sunsets in five years. And if a law is worth keeping, Congress can pass it again.
**This is aimed at dealing with ALL the crazy new laws our Congress is passing as of late. **
_Does he really think I intend to get rid of Social Security, Medicare, the U.S. Navy, and border patrol?_
**I’ve NEVER advocated cutting Social Security or Medicare and I never would. **
I will not be intimidated by Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, Mitch McConnell, or anyone else twisting my words.
**I’ll NEVER back down, no matter how much the Washington insiders try to silence me. And I know you won’t either. **

This is aimed at dealing with ALL the crazy new laws our Congress is passing as of late. Does he really think I intend to get rid of Social Security, Medicare, the U.S. Navy, and border patrol? I’ve NEVER advocated cutting Social Security or Medicare and I never would. I will not be intimidated by Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, Mitch McConnell, or anyone else twisting my words. I’ll NEVER back down, no matter how much the Washington insiders try to silence me. And I know you won’t either. | | Thank you, Rick Scott | | | A message for you, from Senator Rick Scott: Joe Biden’s America includes record high inflation, open borders, unlimited spending, and increasing crime. Defeating the radical Left has never been more important and it will be no easy task. Peter, with your support, I can continue to protect our Conservative values. I can’t do it without patriots like you, so Thank you for your support, Senator Rick Scott | | Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida | | Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Rick Scott for Florida. If you no longer wish to receive emails, please click here: .

* Working Together (Below)

Working Together Like many in Michigan's First District, I worry about my country. Can we work together to solve our problems? When half of the leadership offered ovations and others jeered, our national divisions were on full display during President Biden's SOTU address.
Is this what America needs? We need problem-solving, regardless of the source. We need leadership for all. We need unity, not divisive rhetoric. We must work together to address the needs of the 1st District, Michigan, and the Nation. It isn't a Republican-led House and Democratic-led Senate and President. It's the People's House, Senate, and President. The same goes for our State, county, and city governments. Throughout it all, we can never forget ordinary everyday people — the rural worker, our seniors, and our youth. We need to invest in people, protect our environment, and celebrate each other's individuality. We must embrace America's multiculturalism and our distinct vantage points. We must remember the role of government at all levels — local, state, and federal — is to serve, protect, and provide for the general well-being of its citizens. The people of Michigan's 1st District embody resiliency. Politically, we are as diverse as anywhere in the United States, but our commonalities allow us to show the Nation how united we can be. In Northern Michigan and the UP, we work hard and play hard, and we're all intricately linked with the hardships and successes of each other. We tackle problems with grit, strength, and loyalty to our friends, family, neighbors, and communities. If our representatives legislated with the same fiercely independent spirit as their constituents, the strength of our district would rival anywhere in the country.
